```typescriptreact
                  aria-label="Unpin Application"
                  icon={<FiTrash2 />}
                  size="xs"
                  variant="ghost"
                  colorScheme="red"
                  opacity={0}
                  _groupHover={{ opacity: 1 }}
                  transition="opacity 0.2s"
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    onUnpin(application.id)
                  }}
                />
              </Tooltip>
            )}
          </HStack>
          <HStack spacing={2} w="100%">
            {application.category && (
              <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="blue" variant="subtle">
                {application.category}
              </Badge>
            )}
            {application.area && (
              <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="green" variant="subtle">
                {application.area}
              </Badge>
            )}
          </HStack>
          {application.owner && (
            <Text fontSize="xs" color="gray.400">
              by {application.owner.full_name || application.owner.email}
            </Text>
          )}
        </VStack>
      </CardBody>
    </Card>
  )
})

interface AIGridSidebarProps {
  onGridSpaceSelect: (gridSpaceId: string) => void
  currentGridSpaceId: string | null
  onCreateGridSpace?: () => Promise<string | null> // 返回新创建的 gridSpaceId
  onSaveGridSpace?: (gridSpaceId: string) => Promise<void> // 保存 Grid Space
  unsavedSpaces?: Map<string, boolean> // 未保存的 space ID 映射
  w?: string
}

function AIGridSidebar({ 
  onGridSpaceSelect, 
  currentGridSpaceId, 
  onCreateGridSpace, 
  onSaveGridSpace,
  unsavedSpaces = new Map(),
  w = "280px" 
}: AIGridSidebarProps) {
  const toast = useToast()
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("")
  const [isSearchFocused, setIsSearchFocused] = useState(false)
  const [isMarketplaceOpen, setIsMarketplaceOpen] = useState(false)
  const [pinnedApps, setPinnedApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [dropdownHighlight, setDropdownHighlight] = useState(true)
  const [savedGridSpaces, setSavedGridSpaces] = useState<GridSpace[]>([])
  const [currentGridSpace, setCurrentGridSpace] = useState<GridSpace | null>(null)

  // Load grid spaces
  const loadGridSpaces = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const spaces = await GridSpaceService.getUserGridSpaces()
      setSavedGridSpaces(spaces)
      
      if (currentGridSpaceId) {
        const space = spaces.find((s) => s.id === currentGridSpaceId)
        setCurrentGridSpace(space || null)
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load grid spaces:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to load grid spaces",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, toast])

  useEffect(() => {
    loadGridSpaces()
  }, [loadGridSpaces])

  // Load pinned applications
  useEffect(() => {
    try {
      const stored = localStorage.getItem("pinned_apps")
      if (stored) {
        setPinnedApps(JSON.parse(stored))
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("Failed to parse pinned_apps from localStorage", e)
    }
  }, [])

  const handleAppPin = (app: AppNode) => {
    const isAlreadyPinned = pinnedApps.some((p) => p.id === app.id)
    if (isAlreadyPinned) return
    const next = [...pinnedApps, app]
    setPinnedApps(next)
    localStorage.setItem("pinned_apps", JSON.stringify(next))
    toast({
      title: "Application Pinned",
      description: `${app.name} added to menu`,
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
      isClosable: true,
    })
  }

  const handleGridSpaceRename = async (gridSpaceId: string, newName: string) => {
    try {
      await GridSpaceService.updateGridSpace(gridSpaceId, { name: newName })
      await loadGridSpaces()
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to rename grid space:", error)
      throw error
    }
  }

  const handleGridSpaceDelete = async (gridSpaceId: string) => {
    try {
      await GridSpaceService.deleteGridSpace(gridSpaceId)
      await loadGridSpaces()
      if (currentGridSpaceId === gridSpaceId) {
        onGridSpaceSelect("")
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to delete grid space:", error)
      throw error
    }
  }

  const filteredGridSpaces = useMemo(() => {
    const allSpaces: GridSpace[] = []
    
    if (currentGridSpace) {
      allSpaces.push(currentGridSpace)
    }
    
    const otherSpaces = savedGridSpaces.filter(
      (space) => !currentGridSpace || space.id !== currentGridSpace.id
    )
    allSpaces.push(...otherSpaces)
    
    return allSpaces.filter(
      (space) =>
        space.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
        (space.description &&
          space.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()))
    )
  }, [savedGridSpaces, currentGridSpace, searchQuery])

  const filteredApplications = useMemo(
    () =>
      pinnedApps.filter(
        (app) =>
          app.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
          (app.description &&
            app.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()))
      ),
    [pinnedApps, searchQuery]
  )

  return (
    <Box
      w={w}
      h="100%"
      bg="white"
      borderRight="1px solid"
      borderColor="gray.200"
      display="flex"
      flexDirection="column"
    >
      {/* Search Section */}
      <Box p={4} borderBottom="1px solid" borderColor="gray.100" position="relative">
        <InputGroup size="sm">
          <InputLeftElement pointerEvents="none">
            <FiSearch color="gray.400" />
          </InputLeftElement>
          <Input
            placeholder="Search Space/Agents/Cards"
            value={searchQuery}
            onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
            onFocus={() => setIsSearchFocused(true)}
            onBlur={() => setTimeout(() => setIsSearchFocused(false), 150)}
            onKeyDown={(e) => {
              if (searchQuery.trim() === "" && isSearchFocused) {
                if (e.key === "ArrowDown" || e.key === "ArrowUp") {
                  setDropdownHighlight(true)
                } else if (e.key === "Enter" && dropdownHighlight) {
                  setIsMarketplaceOpen(true)
                  setDropdownHighlight(false)
                } else if (e.key === "Escape") {
                  setDropdownHighlight(false)
                }
              }
            }}
            bg="gray.50"
            border="none"
            _focus={{ bg: "white", border: "1px solid", borderColor: "blue.200" }}
          />
        </InputGroup>
        {isSearchFocused && searchQuery.trim() === "" && (
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            top="56px"
            left="16px"
            right="16px"
            zIndex={20}
            border="1px solid"
            borderColor="gray.200"
            borderRadius="md"
            shadow="md"
            bg="white"
          >
            <Box
              px={3}
              py={2}
              cursor="pointer"
              bg={dropdownHighlight ? "blue.50" : undefined}
              _hover={{ bg: "blue.50" }}
              onMouseEnter={() => setDropdownHighlight(true)}
              onMouseLeave={() => setDropdownHighlight(false)}
              onMouseDown={(e) => {
                e.preventDefault()
                setIsMarketplaceOpen(true)
              }}
            >
              <HStack spacing={2}>
                <FiGrid color="gray.500" />
                <Text fontSize="sm">Application Marketplace</Text>
              </HStack>
            </Box>
          </Box>
        )}
      </Box>

      {/* Content Sections */}
      <VStack flex="1" spacing={0} align="stretch" overflow="hidden">
        {/* SPACES Section */}
        <Box flex="1" overflow="hidden" data-section="spaces">
          <HStack p={3} justify="space-between" bg="gray.50">
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <FiGrid size={14} color="gray.600" />
              <Text fontSize="xs" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.600" textTransform="uppercase">
                SPACES
              </Text>
            </HStack>
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="gray" variant="subtle">
                {filteredGridSpaces.length}
              </Badge>
              {onCreateGridSpace && (
                <Tooltip label="Create New Grid Space" placement="top">
                  <IconButton
                    aria-label="Create New Grid Space"
                    icon={<FiPlus />}
                    size="xs"
                    variant="ghost"
                    colorScheme="blue"
                    onClick={async () => {
                      const newId = await onCreateGridSpace()
                      if (newId) {
                        onGridSpaceSelect(newId)
                      }
                    }}
                  />
                </Tooltip>
              )}
            </HStack>
          </HStack>

          <Box p={3} overflow="auto" maxH="300px">
            {filteredGridSpaces.length > 0 ? (
              <SimpleGrid columns={1} spacing={3}>
                {filteredGridSpaces.map((space) => {
                  const isCurrent = currentGridSpace && space.id === currentGridSpace.id
                  return (
                    <GridSpaceCard
                      key={space.id}
                      gridSpace={{
                        id: space.id,
                        name: space.name,
                        description: space.description,
                        createdAt: space.create_time,
                        isTemporary: (space as any).isTemporary,
                      }}
                      onClick={onGridSpaceSelect}
                      onRename={handleGridSpaceRename}
                      onDelete={handleGridSpaceDelete}
                      isCurrent={isCurrent || false}
                    />
                  )
                })}
              </SimpleGrid>
            ) : (
              <VStack spacing={3} py={4}>
                <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500" textAlign="center">
                  {searchQuery ? "No matching spaces" : "No grid spaces yet"}
                </Text>
                {onCreateGridSpace && !searchQuery && (
                  <Button
                    size="sm"
                    colorScheme="blue"
                    leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
                    onClick={async () => {
                      const newId = await onCreateGridSpace()
                      if (newId) {
                        onGridSpaceSelect(newId)
                      }
                    }}
                  >
                    Create New Grid Space
                  </Button>
                )}
              </VStack>
            )}
          </Box>
        </Box>

        <Divider />

        {/* AGENTS Section */}
        <Box flex="1" overflow="hidden" data-section="agents">
          <HStack p={3} justify="space-between" bg="gray.50">
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <FiUsers size={14} color="gray.600" />
              <Text fontSize="xs" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.600" textTransform="uppercase">
                AGENTS
              </Text>
            </HStack>
            <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="gray" variant="subtle">
              {pinnedApps.length}
            </Badge>
          </HStack>
          <Box p={3} overflow="auto" maxH="400px">
            {pinnedApps.length === 0 ? (
              <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500" textAlign="center" py={4}>
                No pinned applications, add them from Application Marketplace
              </Text>
            ) : (
              <SimpleGrid columns={1} spacing={2}>
                {filteredApplications.map((app) => {
                  const handleUnpin = (applicationId: number) => {
                    setPinnedApps((prev) => {
                      const updated = prev.filter((a) => a.id !== applicationId)
                      localStorage.setItem("pinned_apps", JSON.stringify(updated))
                      return updated
                    })
                    toast({
                      title: "Unpinned",
                      description: `${app.name} removed from AGENTS area`,
                      status: "info",
                      duration: 2000,
                      isClosable: true,
                    })
                  }

                  return (
                    <ApplicationCard
                      key={app.id}
                      application={app}
                      showUnpinButton={true}
                      onUnpin={handleUnpin}
                    />
                  )
                })}
              </SimpleGrid>
            )}
          </Box>
        </Box>
      </VStack>

      {/* Marketplace Modal */}
      <Modal
        isOpen={isMarketplaceOpen}
        onClose={() => setIsMarketplaceOpen(false)}
        size="6xl"
        motionPreset="scale"
        closeOnOverlayClick={false}
      >
        <ModalOverlay />
        <ModalContent maxW="90vw">
          <ModalHeader>Application Marketplace</ModalHeader>
          <ModalCloseButton />
          <ModalBody p={0}>
            <ApplicationMarketplace
              isOpen={isMarketplaceOpen}
              onAppPin={(app) => {
                handleAppPin(app)
                setPinnedApps(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("pinned_apps") || "[]"))
              }}
              pinnedApps={pinnedApps}
              onBack={() => setIsMarketplaceOpen(false)}
              onAppSelect={() => {
                setPinnedApps(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("pinned_apps") || "[]"))
              }}
            />
          </ModalBody>
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>
    </Box>
  )
}

export default React.memo(AIGridSidebar)


```

```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo, useCallback } from "react"
import {
  Box,
  VStack,
  HStack,
  Text,
  Input,
  InputGroup,
  InputLeftElement,
  Card,
  CardBody,
  SimpleGrid,
  Badge,
  IconButton,
  Tooltip,
  Divider,
  useToast,
  Modal,
  ModalOverlay,
  ModalContent,
  ModalHeader,
  ModalBody,
  ModalCloseButton,
  useDisclosure,
  Button,
} from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { FiSearch, FiGrid, FiUsers, FiEdit3, FiTrash2, FiPlus, FiSave } from "react-icons/fi"
import { useDrag } from "react-dnd"
import AppNodeService from "@/services/appNodeService"
import ApplicationMarketplace from "@/components/ApplicationMarketplace/ApplicationMarketplace"
import { GridSpaceService, type GridSpace } from "@/services/gridSpaceService"
import type { AppNode } from "@/types/appNode"

// GridSpace Card Component for SPACES section
interface GridSpaceCardProps {
  gridSpace: {
    id: string
    name: string
    description?: string
    createdAt: string
    isTemporary?: boolean
  }
  onClick: (id: string) => void
  onRename?: (id: string, newName: string) => void
  onDelete?: (id: string) => void
  onSave?: (id: string) => Promise<void>
  isCurrent?: boolean
  hasUnsavedChanges?: boolean
}

const GridSpaceCard = React.memo(function GridSpaceCard({
  gridSpace,
  onClick,
  onRename,
  onDelete,
  onSave,
  isCurrent = false,
  hasUnsavedChanges = false,
}: GridSpaceCardProps) {
  const { isOpen, onOpen, onClose } = useDisclosure()
  const { isOpen: isDeleteOpen, onOpen: onDeleteOpen, onClose: onDeleteClose } = useDisclosure()
  const [newName, setNewName] = useState(gridSpace.name)
  const [isRenaming, setIsRenaming] = useState(false)
  const [isDeleting, setIsDeleting] = useState(false)
  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)
  const toast = useToast()

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    const date = new Date(dateString)
    return date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
      month: "short",
      day: "numeric",
      hour: "2-digit",
      minute: "2-digit",
    })
  }

  const handleRename = async () => {
    if (!onRename || newName.trim() === "" || newName === gridSpace.name) {
      onClose()
      return
    }

    try {
      setIsRenaming(true)
      await onRename(gridSpace.id, newName.trim())
      toast({
        title: "Grid Space Renamed",
        description: `Grid Space renamed to "${newName.trim()}"`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      onClose()
    } catch (error) {
      toast({
        title: "Rename Failed",
        description: "Failed to rename grid space",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
    } finally {
      setIsRenaming(false)
    }
  }

  const handleKeyPress = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
    if (e.key === "Enter") {
      handleRename()
    } else if (e.key === "Escape") {
      setNewName(gridSpace.name)
      onClose()
    }
  }

  const handleDelete = async () => {
    if (!onDelete) return

    try {
      setIsDeleting(true)
      await onDelete(gridSpace.id)
      toast({
        title: "Grid Space Deleted",
        description: `Grid Space "${gridSpace.name}" has been deleted`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      onDeleteClose()
    } catch (error) {
      toast({
        title: "Delete Failed",
        description: "Failed to delete grid space",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      setIsDeleting(false)
    }
  }

  const handleSave = async () => {
    if (!onSave) return

    try {
      setIsSaving(true)
      await onSave(gridSpace.id)
    } catch (error) {
      // Error toast is handled by the save function
    } finally {
      setIsSaving(false)
    }
  }

  return (
    <>
      <Card
        size="sm"
        cursor="pointer"
        _hover={{ transform: "translateY(-2px)", shadow: "md" }}
        transition="all 0.2s"
        w="100%"
        position="relative"
        role="group"
      >
        <CardBody p={3}>
          <VStack spacing={3} align="stretch">
            <HStack justify="space-between" align="flex-start">
              <VStack align="flex-start" spacing={1} flex="1">
                <HStack spacing={2} align="center">
                  <Text
                    fontSize="md"
                    fontWeight="semibold"
                    color="gray.800"
                    noOfLines={2}
                    title={gridSpace.name}
                    lineHeight="1.3"
                    cursor="pointer"
                    onClick={() => onClick(gridSpace.id)}
                  >
                    {gridSpace.name}
                  </Text>
                  {isCurrent && (
                    <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="green" variant="subtle" fontSize="xs">
                      Current
                    </Badge>
                  )}
                  {isCurrent && gridSpace.isTemporary && (
                    <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="orange" variant="subtle" fontSize="xs">
                      Unsaved
                    </Badge>
                  )}
                  {isCurrent && hasUnsavedChanges && (
                    <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="orange" variant="subtle" fontSize="xs">
                      Unsaved Changes
                    </Badge>
                  )}
                </HStack>
              </VStack>

              <HStack spacing={1} opacity={0} _groupHover={{ opacity: 1 }} transition="opacity 0.2s">
                {onSave && isCurrent && (
                  <Tooltip label={hasUnsavedChanges ? "Save Changes" : "Save"} placement="top">
                    <IconButton
                      aria-label="Save Grid Space"
                      icon={<FiSave />}
                      size="xs"
                      variant={hasUnsavedChanges ? "solid" : "ghost"}
                      colorScheme={hasUnsavedChanges ? "blue" : "gray"}
                      _hover={{ bg: hasUnsavedChanges ? "blue.600" : "gray.100" }}
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation()
                        handleSave()
                      }}
                      isLoading={isSaving}
                      loadingText="Saving..."
                      isDisabled={!hasUnsavedChanges && !gridSpace.isTemporary}
                    />
                  </Tooltip>
                )}

                {onRename && !gridSpace.isTemporary && (
                  <Tooltip label="Rename Grid Space" placement="top">
                    <IconButton
                      aria-label="Rename Grid Space"
                      icon={<FiEdit3 />}
                      size="xs"
                      variant="ghost"
                      _hover={{ bg: "gray.100" }}
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation()
                        setNewName(gridSpace.name)
                        onOpen()
                      }}
                    />
                  </Tooltip>
                )}

                {onDelete && !gridSpace.isTemporary && (
                  <Tooltip label="Delete Grid Space" placement="top">
                    <IconButton
                      aria-label="Delete Grid Space"
                      icon={<FiTrash2 />}
                      size="xs"
                      variant="ghost"
                      colorScheme="red"
                      _hover={{ bg: "red.50" }}
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation()
                        onDeleteOpen()
                      }}
                    />
                  </Tooltip>
                )}
              </HStack>
            </HStack>

            <Text fontSize="xs" color="gray.500">
              {formatDate(gridSpace.createdAt)}
            </Text>
          </VStack>
        </CardBody>
      </Card>

      <Modal isOpen={isOpen} onClose={onClose} isCentered>
        <ModalOverlay />
        <ModalContent>
          <ModalHeader>Rename Grid Space</ModalHeader>
          <ModalCloseButton />
          <ModalBody>
            <Input
              value={newName}
              onChange={(e) => setNewName(e.target.value)}
              onKeyDown={handleKeyPress}
              placeholder="Enter grid space name"
              autoFocus
            />
          </ModalBody>
          <ModalBody>
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              mr={3}
              onClick={() => {
                setNewName(gridSpace.name)
                onClose()
              }}
            >
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button
              colorScheme="blue"
              onClick={handleRename}
              isLoading={isRenaming}
              loadingText="Renaming..."
              isDisabled={newName.trim() === "" || newName === gridSpace.name}
            >
              Save
            </Button>
          </ModalBody>
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>

      <Modal isOpen={isDeleteOpen} onClose={onDeleteClose} isCentered>
        <ModalOverlay />
        <ModalContent>
          <ModalHeader>Delete Grid Space</ModalHeader>
          <ModalCloseButton />
          <ModalBody>
            <Text>
              Are you sure you want to delete "{gridSpace.name}"? This action cannot be undone.
            </Text>
          </ModalBody>
          <ModalBody>
            <Button variant="ghost" mr={3} onClick={onDeleteClose}>
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button colorScheme="red" onClick={handleDelete} isLoading={isDeleting} loadingText="Deleting...">
              Delete
            </Button>
          </ModalBody>
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>
    </>
  )
})

// Application Card Component for AGENTS section
interface ApplicationCardProps {
  application: AppNode
  onUnpin?: (applicationId: number) => void
  showUnpinButton?: boolean
}

const ApplicationCard = React.memo(function ApplicationCard({
  application,
  onUnpin,
  showUnpinButton = false,
}: ApplicationCardProps) {
  const dragItem = React.useMemo(() => ({ application }), [application.id])

  const [{ isDragging }, drag] = useDrag(
    () => ({
      type: "application",
      item: dragItem,
      collect: (monitor) => ({
        isDragging: monitor.isDragging(),
      }),
    }),
    [dragItem]
  )

  return (
    <Card
      ref={drag}
      size="sm"
      cursor="grab"
      opacity={isDragging ? 0.5 : 1}
      _hover={{ transform: "translateY(-2px)", shadow: "md" }}
      transition="all 0.2s"
      _active={{ cursor: "grabbing" }}
      position="relative"
      role="group"
    >
      <CardBody p={3}>
        <VStack align="start" spacing={2}>
          <HStack justify="space-between" w="100%" align="flex-start">
            <Box flex="1">
              <Text fontSize="sm" fontWeight="medium" noOfLines={1}>
                {application.name}
              </Text>
              {application.description && (
                <Text fontSize="xs" color="gray.500" noOfLines={2} mt={1}>
                  {application.description}
                </Text>
              )}
            </Box>
            {showUnpinButton && onUnpin && (
              <Tooltip label="Unpin" placement="top">
                <IconButton
                  aria-label="Unpin Application"
                  icon={<FiTrash2 />}
                  size="xs"
                  variant="ghost"
                  colorScheme="red"
                  opacity={0}
                  _groupHover={{ opacity: 1 }}
                  transition="opacity 0.2s"
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    onUnpin(application.id)
                  }}
                />
              </Tooltip>
            )}
          </HStack>
          <HStack spacing={2} w="100%">
            {application.category && (
              <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="blue" variant="subtle">
                {application.category}
              </Badge>
            )}
            {application.area && (
              <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="green" variant="subtle">
                {application.area}
              </Badge>
            )}
          </HStack>
          {application.owner && (
            <Text fontSize="xs" color="gray.400">
              by {application.owner.full_name || application.owner.email}
            </Text>
          )}
        </VStack>
      </CardBody>
    </Card>
  )
})

interface AIGridSidebarProps {
  onGridSpaceSelect: (gridSpaceId: string) => void
  currentGridSpaceId: string | null
  onCreateGridSpace?: () => Promise<string | null> // 返回新创建的 gridSpaceId
  onSaveGridSpace?: (gridSpaceId: string) => Promise<void> // 保存 Grid Space
  unsavedSpaces?: Map<string, boolean> // 未保存的 space ID 映射
  w?: string
}

function AIGridSidebar({ 
  onGridSpaceSelect, 
  currentGridSpaceId, 
  onCreateGridSpace, 
  onSaveGridSpace,
  unsavedSpaces = new Map(),
  w = "280px" 
}: AIGridSidebarProps) {
  const toast = useToast()
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("")
  const [isSearchFocused, setIsSearchFocused] = useState(false)
  const [isMarketplaceOpen, setIsMarketplaceOpen] = useState(false)
  const [pinnedApps, setPinnedApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [dropdownHighlight, setDropdownHighlight] = useState(true)
  const [savedGridSpaces, setSavedGridSpaces] = useState<GridSpace[]>([])
  const [currentGridSpace, setCurrentGridSpace] = useState<GridSpace | null>(null)

  // Load grid spaces
  const loadGridSpaces = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const spaces = await GridSpaceService.getUserGridSpaces()
      setSavedGridSpaces(spaces)
      
      if (currentGridSpaceId) {
        const space = spaces.find((s) => s.id === currentGridSpaceId)
        setCurrentGridSpace(space || null)
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load grid spaces:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to load grid spaces",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, toast])

  useEffect(() => {
    loadGridSpaces()
  }, [loadGridSpaces])

  // Load pinned applications
  useEffect(() => {
    try {
      const stored = localStorage.getItem("pinned_apps")
      if (stored) {
        setPinnedApps(JSON.parse(stored))
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("Failed to parse pinned_apps from localStorage", e)
    }
  }, [])

  const handleAppPin = (app: AppNode) => {
    const isAlreadyPinned = pinnedApps.some((p) => p.id === app.id)
    if (isAlreadyPinned) return
    const next = [...pinnedApps, app]
    setPinnedApps(next)
    localStorage.setItem("pinned_apps", JSON.stringify(next))
    toast({
      title: "Application Pinned",
      description: `${app.name} added to menu`,
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
      isClosable: true,
    })
  }

  const handleGridSpaceRename = async (gridSpaceId: string, newName: string) => {
    try {
      await GridSpaceService.updateGridSpace(gridSpaceId, { name: newName })
      await loadGridSpaces()
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to rename grid space:", error)
      throw error
    }
  }

  const handleGridSpaceDelete = async (gridSpaceId: string) => {
    try {
      await GridSpaceService.deleteGridSpace(gridSpaceId)
      await loadGridSpaces()
      if (currentGridSpaceId === gridSpaceId) {
        onGridSpaceSelect("")
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to delete grid space:", error)
      throw error
    }
  }

  const filteredGridSpaces = useMemo(() => {
    const allSpaces: GridSpace[] = []
    
    if (currentGridSpace) {
      allSpaces.push(currentGridSpace)
    }
    
    const otherSpaces = savedGridSpaces.filter(
      (space) => !currentGridSpace || space.id !== currentGridSpace.id
    )
    allSpaces.push(...otherSpaces)
    
    return allSpaces.filter(
      (space) =>
        space.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
        (space.description &&
          space.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()))
    )
  }, [savedGridSpaces, currentGridSpace, searchQuery])

  const filteredApplications = useMemo(
    () =>
      pinnedApps.filter(
        (app) =>
          app.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
          (app.description &&
            app.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()))
      ),
    [pinnedApps, searchQuery]
  )

  return (
    <Box
      w={w}
      h="100%"
      bg="white"
      borderRight="1px solid"
      borderColor="gray.200"
      display="flex"
      flexDirection="column"
    >
      {/* Search Section */}
      <Box p={4} borderBottom="1px solid" borderColor="gray.100" position="relative">
        <InputGroup size="sm">
          <InputLeftElement pointerEvents="none">
            <FiSearch color="gray.400" />
          </InputLeftElement>
          <Input
            placeholder="Search Space/Agents/Cards"
            value={searchQuery}
            onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
            onFocus={() => setIsSearchFocused(true)}
            onBlur={() => setTimeout(() => setIsSearchFocused(false), 150)}
            onKeyDown={(e) => {
              if (searchQuery.trim() === "" && isSearchFocused) {
                if (e.key === "ArrowDown" || e.key === "ArrowUp") {
                  setDropdownHighlight(true)
                } else if (e.key === "Enter" && dropdownHighlight) {
                  setIsMarketplaceOpen(true)
                  setDropdownHighlight(false)
                } else if (e.key === "Escape") {
                  setDropdownHighlight(false)
                }
              }
            }}
            bg="gray.50"
            border="none"
            _focus={{ bg: "white", border: "1px solid", borderColor: "blue.200" }}
          />
        </InputGroup>
        {isSearchFocused && searchQuery.trim() === "" && (
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            top="56px"
            left="16px"
            right="16px"
            zIndex={20}
            border="1px solid"
            borderColor="gray.200"
            borderRadius="md"
            shadow="md"
            bg="white"
          >
            <Box
              px={3}
              py={2}
              cursor="pointer"
              bg={dropdownHighlight ? "blue.50" : undefined}
              _hover={{ bg: "blue.50" }}
              onMouseEnter={() => setDropdownHighlight(true)}
              onMouseLeave={() => setDropdownHighlight(false)}
              onMouseDown={(e) => {
                e.preventDefault()
                setIsMarketplaceOpen(true)
              }}
            >
              <HStack spacing={2}>
                <FiGrid color="gray.500" />
                <Text fontSize="sm">Application Marketplace</Text>
              </HStack>
            </Box>
          </Box>
        )}
      </Box>

      {/* Content Sections */}
      <VStack flex="1" spacing={0} align="stretch" overflow="hidden">
        {/* SPACES Section */}
        <Box flex="1" overflow="hidden" data-section="spaces">
          <HStack p={3} justify="space-between" bg="gray.50">
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <FiGrid size={14} color="gray.600" />
              <Text fontSize="xs" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.600" textTransform="uppercase">
                SPACES
              </Text>
            </HStack>
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="gray" variant="subtle">
                {filteredGridSpaces.length}
              </Badge>
              {onCreateGridSpace && (
                <Tooltip label="Create New Grid Space" placement="top">
                  <IconButton
                    aria-label="Create New Grid Space"
                    icon={<FiPlus />}
                    size="xs"
                    variant="ghost"
                    colorScheme="blue"
                    onClick={async () => {
                      const newId = await onCreateGridSpace()
                      if (newId) {
                        onGridSpaceSelect(newId)
                      }
                    }}
                  />
                </Tooltip>
              )}
            </HStack>
          </HStack>

          <Box p={3} overflow="auto" maxH="300px">
            {filteredGridSpaces.length > 0 ? (
              <SimpleGrid columns={1} spacing={3}>
                {filteredGridSpaces.map((space) => {
                  const isCurrent = currentGridSpace && space.id === currentGridSpace.id
                  const hasUnsavedChanges = unsavedSpaces.get(space.id) || false
                  return (
                    <GridSpaceCard
                      key={space.id}
                      gridSpace={{
                        id: space.id,
                        name: space.name,
                        description: space.description,
                        createdAt: space.create_time,
                        isTemporary: (space as any).isTemporary,
                      }}
                      onClick={onGridSpaceSelect}
                      onRename={handleGridSpaceRename}
                      onDelete={handleGridSpaceDelete}
                      onSave={onSaveGridSpace}
                      isCurrent={isCurrent || false}
                      hasUnsavedChanges={hasUnsavedChanges}
                    />
                  )
                })}
              </SimpleGrid>
            ) : (
              <VStack spacing={3} py={4}>
                <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500" textAlign="center">
                  {searchQuery ? "No matching spaces" : "No grid spaces yet"}
                </Text>
                {onCreateGridSpace && !searchQuery && (
                  <Button
                    size="sm"
                    colorScheme="blue"
                    leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
                    onClick={async () => {
                      const newId = await onCreateGridSpace()
                      if (newId) {
                        onGridSpaceSelect(newId)
                      }
                    }}
                  >
                    Create New Grid Space
                  </Button>
                )}
              </VStack>
            )}
          </Box>
        </Box>

        <Divider />

        {/* AGENTS Section */}
        <Box flex="1" overflow="hidden" data-section="agents">
          <HStack p={3} justify="space-between" bg="gray.50">
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <FiUsers size={14} color="gray.600" />
              <Text fontSize="xs" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.600" textTransform="uppercase">
                AGENTS
              </Text>
            </HStack>
            <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="gray" variant="subtle">
              {pinnedApps.length}
            </Badge>
          </HStack>
          <Box p={3} overflow="auto" maxH="400px">
            {pinnedApps.length === 0 ? (
              <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500" textAlign="center" py={4}>
                No pinned applications, add them from Application Marketplace
              </Text>
            ) : (
              <SimpleGrid columns={1} spacing={2}>
                {filteredApplications.map((app) => {
                  const handleUnpin = (applicationId: number) => {
                    setPinnedApps((prev) => {
                      const updated = prev.filter((a) => a.id !== applicationId)
                      localStorage.setItem("pinned_apps", JSON.stringify(updated))
                      return updated
                    })
                    toast({
                      title: "Unpinned",
                      description: `${app.name} removed from AGENTS area`,
                      status: "info",
                      duration: 2000,
                      isClosable: true,
                    })
                  }

                  return (
                    <ApplicationCard
                      key={app.id}
                      application={app}
                      showUnpinButton={true}
                      onUnpin={handleUnpin}
                    />
                  )
                })}
              </SimpleGrid>
            )}
          </Box>
        </Box>
      </VStack>

      {/* Marketplace Modal */}
      <Modal
        isOpen={isMarketplaceOpen}
        onClose={() => setIsMarketplaceOpen(false)}
        size="6xl"
        motionPreset="scale"
        closeOnOverlayClick={false}
      >
        <ModalOverlay />
        <ModalContent maxW="90vw">
          <ModalHeader>Application Marketplace</ModalHeader>
          <ModalCloseButton />
          <ModalBody p={0}>
            <ApplicationMarketplace
              isOpen={isMarketplaceOpen}
              onAppPin={(app) => {
                handleAppPin(app)
                setPinnedApps(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("pinned_apps") || "[]"))
              }}
              pinnedApps={pinnedApps}
              onBack={() => setIsMarketplaceOpen(false)}
              onAppSelect={() => {
                setPinnedApps(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("pinned_apps") || "[]"))
              }}
            />
          </ModalBody>
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>
    </Box>
  )
}

export default React.memo(AIGridSidebar)


```

修改 `aigrid.tsx`，连接保存功能并追踪未保存状态：


```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react"
import { createFileRoute } from "@tanstack/react-router"
import { Box, useToast } from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { DndProvider } from "react-dnd"
import { HTML5Backend } from "react-dnd-html5-backend"
import AIGridSidebar from "@/components/AIGrid/AIGridSidebar"
import { AIGridLayout } from "@/components/AIGrid/AIGridLayout"
import { GridSpaceService, type GridSpace } from "@/services/gridSpaceService"

export const Route = createFileRoute("/_layout/aigrid")({
  component: AIGrid,
})

function AIGrid() {
  const toast = useToast()
  const [currentGridSpaceId, setCurrentGridSpaceId] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [gridSpaces, setGridSpaces] = useState<GridSpace[]>([])
  const [unsavedSpaces, setUnsavedSpaces] = useState<Map<string, boolean>>(new Map())
  const [saveFunction, setSaveFunction] = useState<(() => Promise<void>) | null>(null)

  // Load grid spaces on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    loadGridSpaces()
  }, [])

  const loadGridSpaces = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const spaces = await GridSpaceService.getUserGridSpaces()
      setGridSpaces(spaces)

      // Auto-select first space if available and no current space selected
      if (spaces.length > 0 && !currentGridSpaceId) {
        setCurrentGridSpaceId(spaces[0].id)
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load grid spaces:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to load grid spaces",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, toast])

  // Create new Grid Space
  const handleCreateGridSpace = useCallback(async (): Promise<string | null> => {
    try {
      const defaultName = GridSpaceService.generateDefaultGridSpaceName(gridSpaces)
      const newSpace = await GridSpaceService.createGridSpace({
        name: defaultName,
      })
      
      // Refresh grid spaces list
      await loadGridSpaces()
      
      toast({
        title: "Grid Space Created",
        description: `Created "${newSpace.name}"`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
      })
      
      return newSpace.id
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to create grid space:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to create grid space",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
      return null
    }
  }, [gridSpaces, loadGridSpaces, toast])

  // Handle when Grid Space is created (e.g., from drop)
  const handleGridSpaceCreated = useCallback((gridSpaceId: string) => {
    setCurrentGridSpaceId(gridSpaceId)
  }, [])

  const handleGridSpaceSelect = useCallback((gridSpaceId: string) => {
    setCurrentGridSpaceId(gridSpaceId)
  }, [])

  const handleLayoutChange = useCallback(
    async (layouts: any) => {
      if (!currentGridSpaceId) return

      try {
        const layoutData = {
          layouts,
          items: [], // Items will be saved separately through grid items state
        }
        const serialized = GridSpaceService.serializeGridLayoutData(layoutData)
        await GridSpaceService.autoSaveGridSpace(currentGridSpaceId, serialized)
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Failed to save layout:", error)
      }
    },
    [currentGridSpaceId]
  )

  return (
    <DndProvider backend={HTML5Backend}>
      <Box w="100vw" h="100vh" display="flex" overflow="hidden">
        {/* Left Sidebar */}
        <AIGridSidebar
          onGridSpaceSelect={handleGridSpaceSelect}
          currentGridSpaceId={currentGridSpaceId}
          onCreateGridSpace={handleCreateGridSpace}
        />

        {/* Main Grid Layout Area */}
        <Box flex="1" display="flex" flexDirection="column" overflow="hidden" position="relative">
          <AIGridLayout
            currentGridSpaceId={currentGridSpaceId}
            onLayoutChange={handleLayoutChange}
            onCreateGridSpace={handleCreateGridSpace}
            onGridSpaceCreated={handleGridSpaceCreated}
          />
          {!currentGridSpaceId && (
            <Box
              position="absolute"
              top={0}
              left={0}
              right={0}
              bottom={0}
              display="flex"
              alignItems="center"
              justifyContent="center"
              bg="rgba(249, 250, 251, 0.95)"
              zIndex={10}
              pointerEvents="none"
            >
              <Box textAlign="center" pointerEvents="auto">
                <Box fontSize="xl" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.500" mb={2}>
                  No Grid Space Selected
                </Box>
                <Box fontSize="sm" color="gray.400" mb={4}>
                  Select or create a grid space to start, or drag an application to create one automatically
                </Box>
              </Box>
            </Box>
          )}
        </Box>
      </Box>
    </DndProvider>
  )
}


```

```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react"
import { createFileRoute } from "@tanstack/react-router"
import { Box, useToast } from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { DndProvider } from "react-dnd"
import { HTML5Backend } from "react-dnd-html5-backend"
import AIGridSidebar from "@/components/AIGrid/AIGridSidebar"
import { AIGridLayout } from "@/components/AIGrid/AIGridLayout"
import { GridSpaceService, type GridSpace } from "@/services/gridSpaceService"

export const Route = createFileRoute("/_layout/aigrid")({
  component: AIGrid,
})

function AIGrid() {
  const toast = useToast()
  const [currentGridSpaceId, setCurrentGridSpaceId] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [gridSpaces, setGridSpaces] = useState<GridSpace[]>([])
  const [unsavedSpaces, setUnsavedSpaces] = useState<Map<string, boolean>>(new Map())
  const [saveFunction, setSaveFunction] = useState<(() => Promise<void>) | null>(null)

  // Load grid spaces on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    loadGridSpaces()
  }, [])

  const loadGridSpaces = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const spaces = await GridSpaceService.getUserGridSpaces()
      setGridSpaces(spaces)

      // Auto-select first space if available and no current space selected
      if (spaces.length > 0 && !currentGridSpaceId) {
        setCurrentGridSpaceId(spaces[0].id)
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load grid spaces:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to load grid spaces",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, toast])

  // Create new Grid Space
  const handleCreateGridSpace = useCallback(async (): Promise<string | null> => {
    try {
      const defaultName = GridSpaceService.generateDefaultGridSpaceName(gridSpaces)
      const newSpace = await GridSpaceService.createGridSpace({
        name: defaultName,
      })
      
      // Refresh grid spaces list
      await loadGridSpaces()
      
      toast({
        title: "Grid Space Created",
        description: `Created "${newSpace.name}"`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
      })
      
      return newSpace.id
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to create grid space:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to create grid space",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
      return null
    }
  }, [gridSpaces, loadGridSpaces, toast])

  // Handle when Grid Space is created (e.g., from drop)
  const handleGridSpaceCreated = useCallback((gridSpaceId: string) => {
    setCurrentGridSpaceId(gridSpaceId)
  }, [])

  const handleGridSpaceSelect = useCallback((gridSpaceId: string) => {
    setCurrentGridSpaceId(gridSpaceId)
  }, [])

  const handleLayoutChange = useCallback(
    async (layouts: any) => {
      // Layout change is handled by AIGridLayout, no auto-save here
    },
    []
  )

  // Handle unsaved changes notification from AIGridLayout
  const handleUnsavedChange = useCallback((gridSpaceId: string, hasUnsavedChanges: boolean) => {
    setUnsavedSpaces((prev) => {
      const next = new Map(prev)
      if (hasUnsavedChanges) {
        next.set(gridSpaceId, true)
      } else {
        next.delete(gridSpaceId)
      }
      return next
    })
  }, [])

  // Register save function from AIGridLayout
  const handleSaveRequest = useCallback((saveFn: () => Promise<void>) => {
    setSaveFunction(() => saveFn)
  }, [])

  // Handle save button click from sidebar
  const handleSaveGridSpace = useCallback(async (gridSpaceId: string) => {
    if (gridSpaceId === currentGridSpaceId && saveFunction) {
      await saveFunction()
      // Clear unsaved state after successful save
      setUnsavedSpaces((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        next.delete(gridSpaceId)
        return next
      })
    } else {
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Cannot save: space is not currently active",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, saveFunction, toast])

  return (
    <DndProvider backend={HTML5Backend}>
      <Box w="100vw" h="100vh" display="flex" overflow="hidden">
        {/* Left Sidebar */}
        <AIGridSidebar
          onGridSpaceSelect={handleGridSpaceSelect}
          currentGridSpaceId={currentGridSpaceId}
          onCreateGridSpace={handleCreateGridSpace}
        />

        {/* Main Grid Layout Area */}
        <Box flex="1" display="flex" flexDirection="column" overflow="hidden" position="relative">
          <AIGridLayout
            currentGridSpaceId={currentGridSpaceId}
            onLayoutChange={handleLayoutChange}
            onCreateGridSpace={handleCreateGridSpace}
            onGridSpaceCreated={handleGridSpaceCreated}
          />
          {!currentGridSpaceId && (
            <Box
              position="absolute"
              top={0}
              left={0}
              right={0}
              bottom={0}
              display="flex"
              alignItems="center"
              justifyContent="center"
              bg="rgba(249, 250, 251, 0.95)"
              zIndex={10}
              pointerEvents="none"
            >
              <Box textAlign="center" pointerEvents="auto">
                <Box fontSize="xl" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.500" mb={2}>
                  No Grid Space Selected
                </Box>
                <Box fontSize="sm" color="gray.400" mb={4}>
                  Select or create a grid space to start, or drag an application to create one automatically
                </Box>
              </Box>
            </Box>
          )}
        </Box>
      </Box>
    </DndProvider>
  )
}
```

```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react"
import { createFileRoute } from "@tanstack/react-router"
import { Box, useToast } from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { DndProvider } from "react-dnd"
import { HTML5Backend } from "react-dnd-html5-backend"
import AIGridSidebar from "@/components/AIGrid/AIGridSidebar"
import { AIGridLayout } from "@/components/AIGrid/AIGridLayout"
import { GridSpaceService, type GridSpace } from "@/services/gridSpaceService"

export const Route = createFileRoute("/_layout/aigrid")({
  component: AIGrid,
})

function AIGrid() {
  const toast = useToast()
  const [currentGridSpaceId, setCurrentGridSpaceId] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [gridSpaces, setGridSpaces] = useState<GridSpace[]>([])
  const [unsavedSpaces, setUnsavedSpaces] = useState<Map<string, boolean>>(new Map())
  const [saveFunction, setSaveFunction] = useState<(() => Promise<void>) | null>(null)

  // Load grid spaces on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    loadGridSpaces()
  }, [])

  const loadGridSpaces = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const spaces = await GridSpaceService.getUserGridSpaces()
      setGridSpaces(spaces)

      // Auto-select first space if available and no current space selected
      if (spaces.length > 0 && !currentGridSpaceId) {
        setCurrentGridSpaceId(spaces[0].id)
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load grid spaces:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to load grid spaces",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, toast])

  // Create new Grid Space
  const handleCreateGridSpace = useCallback(async (): Promise<string | null> => {
    try {
      const defaultName = GridSpaceService.generateDefaultGridSpaceName(gridSpaces)
      const newSpace = await GridSpaceService.createGridSpace({
        name: defaultName,
      })
      
      // Refresh grid spaces list
      await loadGridSpaces()
      
      toast({
        title: "Grid Space Created",
        description: `Created "${newSpace.name}"`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
      })
      
      return newSpace.id
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to create grid space:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to create grid space",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
      return null
    }
  }, [gridSpaces, loadGridSpaces, toast])

  // Handle when Grid Space is created (e.g., from drop)
  const handleGridSpaceCreated = useCallback((gridSpaceId: string) => {
    setCurrentGridSpaceId(gridSpaceId)
  }, [])

  const handleGridSpaceSelect = useCallback((gridSpaceId: string) => {
    setCurrentGridSpaceId(gridSpaceId)
  }, [])

  const handleLayoutChange = useCallback(
    async (layouts: any) => {
      // Layout change is handled by AIGridLayout, no auto-save here
    },
    []
  )

  // Handle unsaved changes notification from AIGridLayout
  const handleUnsavedChange = useCallback((gridSpaceId: string, hasUnsavedChanges: boolean) => {
    setUnsavedSpaces((prev) => {
      const next = new Map(prev)
      if (hasUnsavedChanges) {
        next.set(gridSpaceId, true)
      } else {
        next.delete(gridSpaceId)
      }
      return next
    })
  }, [])

  // Register save function from AIGridLayout
  const handleSaveRequest = useCallback((saveFn: () => Promise<void>) => {
    setSaveFunction(() => saveFn)
  }, [])

  // Handle save button click from sidebar
  const handleSaveGridSpace = useCallback(async (gridSpaceId: string) => {
    if (gridSpaceId === currentGridSpaceId && saveFunction) {
      await saveFunction()
      // Clear unsaved state after successful save
      setUnsavedSpaces((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        next.delete(gridSpaceId)
        return next
      })
    } else {
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Cannot save: space is not currently active",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, saveFunction, toast])

  return (
    <DndProvider backend={HTML5Backend}>
      <Box w="100vw" h="100vh" display="flex" overflow="hidden">
        {/* Left Sidebar */}
        <AIGridSidebar
          onGridSpaceSelect={handleGridSpaceSelect}
          currentGridSpaceId={currentGridSpaceId}
          onCreateGridSpace={handleCreateGridSpace}
          onSaveGridSpace={handleSaveGridSpace}
          unsavedSpaces={unsavedSpaces}
        />

        {/* Main Grid Layout Area */}
        <Box flex="1" display="flex" flexDirection="column" overflow="hidden" position="relative">
          <AIGridLayout
            currentGridSpaceId={currentGridSpaceId}
            onLayoutChange={handleLayoutChange}
            onCreateGridSpace={handleCreateGridSpace}
            onGridSpaceCreated={handleGridSpaceCreated}
            onUnsavedChange={handleUnsavedChange}
            onSaveRequest={handleSaveRequest}
          />
          {!currentGridSpaceId && (
            <Box
              position="absolute"
              top={0}
              left={0}
              right={0}
              bottom={0}
              display="flex"
              alignItems="center"
              justifyContent="center"
              bg="rgba(249, 250, 251, 0.95)"
              zIndex={10}
              pointerEvents="none"
            >
              <Box textAlign="center" pointerEvents="auto">
                <Box fontSize="xl" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.500" mb={2}>
                  No Grid Space Selected
                </Box>
                <Box fontSize="sm" color="gray.400" mb={4}>
                  Select or create a grid space to start, or drag an application to create one automatically
                </Box>
              </Box>
            </Box>
          )}
        </Box>
      </Box>
    </DndProvider>
  )
}
```

实现页面离开前的未保存更改提示：


```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from "react"
import { createFileRoute, useRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router"
import { Box, useToast, useDisclosure } from "@chakra-ui/react"
import {
  AlertDialog,
  AlertDialogBody,
  AlertDialogFooter,
  AlertDialogHeader,
  AlertDialogContent,
  AlertDialogOverlay,
  Button,
} from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { DndProvider } from "react-dnd"
import { HTML5Backend } from "react-dnd-html5-backend"
import AIGridSidebar from "@/components/AIGrid/AIGridSidebar"
import { AIGridLayout } from "@/components/AIGrid/AIGridLayout"
import { GridSpaceService, type GridSpace } from "@/services/gridSpaceService"

export const Route = createFileRoute("/_layout/aigrid")({
  component: AIGrid,
})

function AIGrid() {
  const toast = useToast()
  const [currentGridSpaceId, setCurrentGridSpaceId] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [gridSpaces, setGridSpaces] = useState<GridSpace[]>([])
  const [unsavedSpaces, setUnsavedSpaces] = useState<Map<string, boolean>>(new Map())
  const [saveFunction, setSaveFunction] = useState<(() => Promise<void>) | null>(null)

  // Load grid spaces on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    loadGridSpaces()
  }, [])

  const loadGridSpaces = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const spaces = await GridSpaceService.getUserGridSpaces()
      setGridSpaces(spaces)

      // Auto-select first space if available and no current space selected
      if (spaces.length > 0 && !currentGridSpaceId) {
        setCurrentGridSpaceId(spaces[0].id)
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load grid spaces:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to load grid spaces",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, toast])

  // Create new Grid Space
  const handleCreateGridSpace = useCallback(async (): Promise<string | null> => {
    try {
      const defaultName = GridSpaceService.generateDefaultGridSpaceName(gridSpaces)
      const newSpace = await GridSpaceService.createGridSpace({
        name: defaultName,
      })
      
      // Refresh grid spaces list
      await loadGridSpaces()
      
      toast({
        title: "Grid Space Created",
        description: `Created "${newSpace.name}"`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
      })
      
      return newSpace.id
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to create grid space:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to create grid space",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
      return null
    }
  }, [gridSpaces, loadGridSpaces, toast])

  // Handle when Grid Space is created (e.g., from drop)
  const handleGridSpaceCreated = useCallback((gridSpaceId: string) => {
    setCurrentGridSpaceId(gridSpaceId)
  }, [])

  const handleGridSpaceSelect = useCallback((gridSpaceId: string) => {
    setCurrentGridSpaceId(gridSpaceId)
  }, [])

  const handleLayoutChange = useCallback(
    async (layouts: any) => {
      // Layout change is handled by AIGridLayout, no auto-save here
    },
    []
  )

  // Handle unsaved changes notification from AIGridLayout
  const handleUnsavedChange = useCallback((gridSpaceId: string, hasUnsavedChanges: boolean) => {
    setUnsavedSpaces((prev) => {
      const next = new Map(prev)
      if (hasUnsavedChanges) {
        next.set(gridSpaceId, true)
      } else {
        next.delete(gridSpaceId)
      }
      return next
    })
  }, [])

  // Register save function from AIGridLayout
  const handleSaveRequest = useCallback((saveFn: () => Promise<void>) => {
    setSaveFunction(() => saveFn)
  }, [])

  // Handle save button click from sidebar
  const handleSaveGridSpace = useCallback(async (gridSpaceId: string) => {
    if (gridSpaceId === currentGridSpaceId && saveFunction) {
      await saveFunction()
      // Clear unsaved state after successful save
      setUnsavedSpaces((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        next.delete(gridSpaceId)
        return next
      })
    } else {
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Cannot save: space is not currently active",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, saveFunction, toast])

  return (
    <DndProvider backend={HTML5Backend}>
      <Box w="100vw" h="100vh" display="flex" overflow="hidden">
        {/* Left Sidebar */}
        <AIGridSidebar
          onGridSpaceSelect={handleGridSpaceSelect}
          currentGridSpaceId={currentGridSpaceId}
          onCreateGridSpace={handleCreateGridSpace}
          onSaveGridSpace={handleSaveGridSpace}
          unsavedSpaces={unsavedSpaces}
        />

        {/* Main Grid Layout Area */}
        <Box flex="1" display="flex" flexDirection="column" overflow="hidden" position="relative">
          <AIGridLayout
            currentGridSpaceId={currentGridSpaceId}
            onLayoutChange={handleLayoutChange}
            onCreateGridSpace={handleCreateGridSpace}
            onGridSpaceCreated={handleGridSpaceCreated}
            onUnsavedChange={handleUnsavedChange}
            onSaveRequest={handleSaveRequest}
          />
          {!currentGridSpaceId && (
            <Box
              position="absolute"
              top={0}
              left={0}
              right={0}
              bottom={0}
              display="flex"
              alignItems="center"
              justifyContent="center"
              bg="rgba(249, 250, 251, 0.95)"
              zIndex={10}
              pointerEvents="none"
            >
              <Box textAlign="center" pointerEvents="auto">
                <Box fontSize="xl" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.500" mb={2}>
                  No Grid Space Selected
                </Box>
                <Box fontSize="sm" color="gray.400" mb={4}>
                  Select or create a grid space to start, or drag an application to create one automatically
                </Box>
              </Box>
            </Box>
          )}
        </Box>
      </Box>
    </DndProvider>
  )
}
```
