```typescriptreact
            borderColor="gray.200"
            borderRadius="md"
            shadow="md"
            bg="white"
          >
            <Box
              px={3}
              py={2}
              cursor="pointer"
              bg={dropdownHighlight ? "blue.50" : undefined}
              _hover={{ bg: "blue.50" }}
              onMouseEnter={() => setDropdownHighlight(true)}
              onMouseLeave={() => setDropdownHighlight(false)}
              onMouseDown={(e) => {
                e.preventDefault()
                setIsMarketplaceOpen(true)
              }}
            >
              <HStack spacing={2}>
                <FiGrid color="gray.500" />
                <Text fontSize="sm">Application Marketplace</Text>
              </HStack>
            </Box>
          </Box>
        )}
      </Box>

      {/* Content Sections */}
      <VStack flex="1" spacing={0} align="stretch" overflow="hidden">
        {/* SPACES Section */}
        <Box flex="1" overflow="hidden" data-section="spaces">
          <HStack p={3} justify="space-between" bg="gray.50">
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <FiGrid size={14} color="gray.600" />
              <Text fontSize="xs" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.600" textTransform="uppercase">
                SPACES
              </Text>
            </HStack>
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="gray" variant="subtle">
                {filteredGridSpaces.length}
              </Badge>
              {onCreateGridSpace && (
                <Tooltip label="Create New Grid Space" placement="top">
                  <IconButton
                    aria-label="Create New Grid Space"
                    icon={<FiPlus />}
                    size="xs"
                    variant="ghost"
                    colorScheme="blue"
                    onClick={async () => {
                      const newId = await onCreateGridSpace()
                      if (newId) {
                        onGridSpaceSelect(newId)
                      }
                    }}
                  />
                </Tooltip>
              )}
            </HStack>
          </HStack>

          <Box p={3} overflow="auto" maxH="300px">
            {filteredGridSpaces.length > 0 ? (
              <SimpleGrid columns={1} spacing={3}>
                {filteredGridSpaces.map((space) => {
                  const isCurrent = currentGridSpace && space.id === currentGridSpace.id
                  const hasUnsavedChanges = unsavedSpaces.get(space.id) || false
                  return (
                    <GridSpaceCard
                      key={space.id}
                      gridSpace={{
                        id: space.id,
                        name: space.name,
                        description: space.description,
                        createdAt: space.create_time,
                        isTemporary: (space as any).isTemporary,
                      }}
                      onClick={onGridSpaceSelect}
                      onRename={handleGridSpaceRename}
                      onDelete={handleGridSpaceDelete}
                      onSave={onSaveGridSpace}
                      isCurrent={isCurrent || false}
                      hasUnsavedChanges={hasUnsavedChanges}
                    />
                  )
                })}
              </SimpleGrid>
            ) : (
              <VStack spacing={3} py={4}>
                <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500" textAlign="center">
                  {searchQuery ? "No matching spaces" : "No grid spaces yet"}
                </Text>
                {onCreateGridSpace && !searchQuery && (
                  <Button
                    size="sm"
                    colorScheme="blue"
                    leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
                    onClick={async () => {
                      const newId = await onCreateGridSpace()
                      if (newId) {
                        onGridSpaceSelect(newId)
                      }
                    }}
                  >
                    Create New Grid Space
                  </Button>
                )}
              </VStack>
            )}
          </Box>
        </Box>

        <Divider />

        {/* AGENTS Section */}
        <Box flex="1" overflow="hidden" data-section="agents">
          <HStack p={3} justify="space-between" bg="gray.50">
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <FiUsers size={14} color="gray.600" />
              <Text fontSize="xs" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.600" textTransform="uppercase">
                AGENTS
              </Text>
            </HStack>
            <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="gray" variant="subtle">
              {pinnedApps.length}
            </Badge>
          </HStack>
          <Box p={3} overflow="auto" maxH="400px">
            {pinnedApps.length === 0 ? (
              <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500" textAlign="center" py={4}>
                No pinned applications, add them from Application Marketplace
              </Text>
            ) : (
              <SimpleGrid columns={1} spacing={2}>
                {filteredApplications.map((app) => {
                  const handleUnpin = (applicationId: number) => {
                    setPinnedApps((prev) => {
                      const updated = prev.filter((a) => a.id !== applicationId)
                      localStorage.setItem("pinned_apps", JSON.stringify(updated))
                      return updated
                    })
                    toast({
                      title: "Unpinned",
                      description: `${app.name} removed from AGENTS area`,
                      status: "info",
                      duration: 2000,
                      isClosable: true,
                    })
                  }

                  return (
                    <ApplicationCard
                      key={app.id}
                      application={app}
                      showUnpinButton={true}
                      onUnpin={handleUnpin}
                    />
                  )
                })}
              </SimpleGrid>
            )}
          </Box>
        </Box>
      </VStack>

      {/* Marketplace Modal */}
      <Modal
        isOpen={isMarketplaceOpen}
        onClose={() => setIsMarketplaceOpen(false)}
        size="6xl"
        motionPreset="scale"
        closeOnOverlayClick={false}
      >
        <ModalOverlay />
        <ModalContent maxW="90vw">
          <ModalHeader>Application Marketplace</ModalHeader>
          <ModalCloseButton />
          <ModalBody p={0}>
            <ApplicationMarketplace
              isOpen={isMarketplaceOpen}
              onAppPin={(app) => {
                handleAppPin(app)
                setPinnedApps(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("pinned_apps") || "[]"))
              }}
              pinnedApps={pinnedApps}
              onBack={() => setIsMarketplaceOpen(false)}
              onAppSelect={() => {
                setPinnedApps(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("pinned_apps") || "[]"))
              }}
            />
          </ModalBody>
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>
    </Box>
  )
}

export default React.memo(AIGridSidebar)


```

```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo, useCallback } from "react"
import {
  Box,
  VStack,
  HStack,
  Text,
  Input,
  InputGroup,
  InputLeftElement,
  Card,
  CardBody,
  SimpleGrid,
  Badge,
  IconButton,
  Tooltip,
  Divider,
  useToast,
  Modal,
  ModalOverlay,
  ModalContent,
  ModalHeader,
  ModalBody,
  ModalCloseButton,
  useDisclosure,
  Button,
} from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { FiSearch, FiGrid, FiUsers, FiEdit3, FiTrash2, FiPlus, FiSave } from "react-icons/fi"
import { useDrag } from "react-dnd"
import AppNodeService from "@/services/appNodeService"
import ApplicationMarketplace from "@/components/ApplicationMarketplace/ApplicationMarketplace"
import { GridSpaceService, type GridSpace } from "@/services/gridSpaceService"
import type { AppNode } from "@/types/appNode"

// GridSpace Card Component for SPACES section
interface GridSpaceCardProps {
  gridSpace: {
    id: string
    name: string
    description?: string
    createdAt: string
    isTemporary?: boolean
  }
  onClick: (id: string) => void
  onRename?: (id: string, newName: string) => void
  onDelete?: (id: string) => void
  onSave?: (id: string) => Promise<void>
  isCurrent?: boolean
  hasUnsavedChanges?: boolean
}

const GridSpaceCard = React.memo(function GridSpaceCard({
  gridSpace,
  onClick,
  onRename,
  onDelete,
  onSave,
  isCurrent = false,
  hasUnsavedChanges = false,
}: GridSpaceCardProps) {
  const { isOpen, onOpen, onClose } = useDisclosure()
  const { isOpen: isDeleteOpen, onOpen: onDeleteOpen, onClose: onDeleteClose } = useDisclosure()
  const [newName, setNewName] = useState(gridSpace.name)
  const [isRenaming, setIsRenaming] = useState(false)
  const [isDeleting, setIsDeleting] = useState(false)
  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)
  const toast = useToast()

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    const date = new Date(dateString)
    return date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
      month: "short",
      day: "numeric",
      hour: "2-digit",
      minute: "2-digit",
    })
  }

  const handleRename = async () => {
    if (!onRename || newName.trim() === "" || newName === gridSpace.name) {
      onClose()
      return
    }

    try {
      setIsRenaming(true)
      await onRename(gridSpace.id, newName.trim())
      toast({
        title: "Grid Space Renamed",
        description: `Grid Space renamed to "${newName.trim()}"`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      onClose()
    } catch (error) {
      toast({
        title: "Rename Failed",
        description: "Failed to rename grid space",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
    } finally {
      setIsRenaming(false)
    }
  }

  const handleKeyPress = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
    if (e.key === "Enter") {
      handleRename()
    } else if (e.key === "Escape") {
      setNewName(gridSpace.name)
      onClose()
    }
  }

  const handleDelete = async () => {
    if (!onDelete) return

    try {
      setIsDeleting(true)
      await onDelete(gridSpace.id)
      toast({
        title: "Grid Space Deleted",
        description: `Grid Space "${gridSpace.name}" has been deleted`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      onDeleteClose()
    } catch (error) {
      toast({
        title: "Delete Failed",
        description: "Failed to delete grid space",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      setIsDeleting(false)
    }
  }

  const handleSave = async () => {
    if (!onSave) return

    try {
      setIsSaving(true)
      await onSave(gridSpace.id)
    } catch (error) {
      // Error toast is handled by the save function
    } finally {
      setIsSaving(false)
    }
  }

  return (
    <>
      <Card
        size="sm"
        cursor="pointer"
        _hover={{ transform: "translateY(-2px)", shadow: "md" }}
        transition="all 0.2s"
        w="100%"
        position="relative"
        role="group"
        bg={isCurrent ? "gray.50" : "white"}
        borderLeft={isCurrent ? "3px solid" : "none"}
        borderLeftColor={isCurrent ? "green.500" : "transparent"}
        borderRadius="md"
      >
        <CardBody p={1}>
          <VStack spacing={0.5} align="stretch">
            {/* First row: Name + Action buttons */}
            <HStack justify="space-between" align="center">
              <Text
                fontSize="sm"
                fontWeight="semibold"
                color="gray.800"
                noOfLines={1}
                title={gridSpace.name}
                lineHeight="1.3"
                cursor="pointer"
                onClick={() => onClick(gridSpace.id)}
                flex="1"
                minW={0}
              >
                {gridSpace.name}
              </Text>

              {/* Action buttons - show on hover */}
              <HStack spacing={1} opacity={0} _groupHover={{ opacity: 1 }} transition="opacity 0.2s" flexShrink={0}>
                {onSave && isCurrent && (
                  <Tooltip label={hasUnsavedChanges || gridSpace.isTemporary ? "Save Changes" : "Save"} placement="top">
                    <IconButton
                      aria-label="Save Grid Space"
                      icon={<FiSave />}
                      size="xs"
                      variant={hasUnsavedChanges || gridSpace.isTemporary ? "solid" : "ghost"}
                      colorScheme={hasUnsavedChanges || gridSpace.isTemporary ? "blue" : "gray"}
                      _hover={{ bg: hasUnsavedChanges || gridSpace.isTemporary ? "blue.600" : "gray.100" }}
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation()
                        handleSave()
                      }}
                      isLoading={isSaving}
                      loadingText="Saving..."
                      isDisabled={!hasUnsavedChanges && !gridSpace.isTemporary}
                    />
                  </Tooltip>
                )}

                {onRename && !gridSpace.isTemporary && (
                  <Tooltip label="Rename Grid Space" placement="top">
                    <IconButton
                      aria-label="Rename Grid Space"
                      icon={<FiEdit3 />}
                      size="xs"
                      variant="ghost"
                      _hover={{ bg: "gray.100" }}
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation()
                        setNewName(gridSpace.name)
                        onOpen()
                      }}
                    />
                  </Tooltip>
                )}

                {onDelete && !gridSpace.isTemporary && (
                  <Tooltip label="Delete Grid Space" placement="top">
                    <IconButton
                      aria-label="Delete Grid Space"
                      icon={<FiTrash2 />}
                      size="xs"
                      variant="ghost"
                      colorScheme="red"
                      _hover={{ bg: "red.50" }}
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation()
                        onDeleteOpen()
                      }}
                    />
                  </Tooltip>
                )}
              </HStack>
            </HStack>

            {/* Second row: Timestamp + Status indicators - compact single line, no wrapping */}
            <HStack 
              spacing={3} 
              align="center" 
              fontSize="9px" 
              color="gray.500"
              flexWrap="nowrap"
              minW={0}
            >
              <Text fontSize="9px" color="gray.500" flexShrink={0}>
                {formatDate(gridSpace.createdAt)}
              </Text>
              {isCurrent && (
                <Badge 
                  size="sm" 
                  colorScheme="green" 
                  variant="subtle" 
                  fontSize="9px"
                  fontWeight="medium"
                  px={1}
                  py={0}
                  flexShrink={0}
                >
                  CURRENT
                </Badge>
              )}
              {isCurrent && (gridSpace.isTemporary || hasUnsavedChanges) && (
                <HStack spacing={1} align="center" flexShrink={0}>
                  <Text fontSize="8px" color="gray.500">
                    UNSAVED
                  </Text>
                  <Box
                    w="6px"
                    h="6px"
                    borderRadius="full"
                    bg="orange.500"
                    flexShrink={0}
                    title="Unsaved Changes"
                    boxShadow="0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)"
                  />
                </HStack>
              )}
            </HStack>
          </VStack>
        </CardBody>
      </Card>

      <Modal isOpen={isOpen} onClose={onClose} isCentered>
        <ModalOverlay />
        <ModalContent>
          <ModalHeader>Rename Grid Space</ModalHeader>
          <ModalCloseButton />
          <ModalBody>
            <Input
              value={newName}
              onChange={(e) => setNewName(e.target.value)}
              onKeyDown={handleKeyPress}
              placeholder="Enter grid space name"
              autoFocus
            />
          </ModalBody>
          <ModalBody>
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              mr={3}
              onClick={() => {
                setNewName(gridSpace.name)
                onClose()
              }}
            >
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button
              colorScheme="blue"
              onClick={handleRename}
              isLoading={isRenaming}
              loadingText="Renaming..."
              isDisabled={newName.trim() === "" || newName === gridSpace.name}
            >
              Save
            </Button>
          </ModalBody>
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>

      <Modal isOpen={isDeleteOpen} onClose={onDeleteClose} isCentered>
        <ModalOverlay />
        <ModalContent>
          <ModalHeader>Delete Grid Space</ModalHeader>
          <ModalCloseButton />
          <ModalBody>
            <Text>
              Are you sure you want to delete "{gridSpace.name}"? This action cannot be undone.
            </Text>
          </ModalBody>
          <ModalBody>
            <Button variant="ghost" mr={3} onClick={onDeleteClose}>
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button colorScheme="red" onClick={handleDelete} isLoading={isDeleting} loadingText="Deleting...">
              Delete
            </Button>
          </ModalBody>
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>
    </>
  )
})

// Application Card Component for AGENTS section
interface ApplicationCardProps {
  application: AppNode
  onUnpin?: (applicationId: number) => void
  showUnpinButton?: boolean
}

const ApplicationCard = React.memo(function ApplicationCard({
  application,
  onUnpin,
  showUnpinButton = false,
}: ApplicationCardProps) {
  const dragItem = React.useMemo(() => ({ application }), [application.id])

  const [{ isDragging }, drag] = useDrag(
    () => ({
      type: "application",
      item: dragItem,
      collect: (monitor) => ({
        isDragging: monitor.isDragging(),
      }),
    }),
    [dragItem]
  )

  return (
    <Card
      ref={drag}
      size="sm"
      cursor="grab"
      opacity={isDragging ? 0.5 : 1}
      _hover={{ transform: "translateY(-2px)", shadow: "md" }}
      transition="all 0.2s"
      _active={{ cursor: "grabbing" }}
      position="relative"
      role="group"
    >
      <CardBody p={3}>
        <VStack align="start" spacing={2}>
          <HStack justify="space-between" w="100%" align="flex-start">
            <Box flex="1">
              <Text fontSize="sm" fontWeight="medium" noOfLines={1}>
                {application.name}
              </Text>
              {application.description && (
                <Text fontSize="xs" color="gray.500" noOfLines={2} mt={1}>
                  {application.description}
                </Text>
              )}
            </Box>
            {showUnpinButton && onUnpin && (
              <Tooltip label="Unpin" placement="top">
                <IconButton
                  aria-label="Unpin Application"
                  icon={<FiTrash2 />}
                  size="xs"
                  variant="ghost"
                  colorScheme="red"
                  opacity={0}
                  _groupHover={{ opacity: 1 }}
                  transition="opacity 0.2s"
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    onUnpin(application.id)
                  }}
                />
              </Tooltip>
            )}
          </HStack>
          <HStack spacing={2} w="100%">
            {application.category && (
              <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="blue" variant="subtle">
                {application.category}
              </Badge>
            )}
            {application.area && (
              <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="green" variant="subtle">
                {application.area}
              </Badge>
            )}
          </HStack>
          {application.owner && (
            <Text fontSize="xs" color="gray.400">
              by {application.owner.full_name || application.owner.email}
            </Text>
          )}
        </VStack>
      </CardBody>
    </Card>
  )
})

interface AIGridSidebarProps {
  onGridSpaceSelect: (gridSpaceId: string) => void
  currentGridSpaceId: string | null
  onCreateGridSpace?: () => Promise<string | null> // 返回新创建的 gridSpaceId
  onSaveGridSpace?: (gridSpaceId: string) => Promise<void> // 保存 Grid Space
  unsavedSpaces?: Map<string, boolean> // 未保存的 space ID 映射
  w?: string
}

function AIGridSidebar({ 
  onGridSpaceSelect, 
  currentGridSpaceId, 
  onCreateGridSpace, 
  onSaveGridSpace,
  unsavedSpaces = new Map(),
  w = "280px" 
}: AIGridSidebarProps) {
  const toast = useToast()
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("")
  const [isSearchFocused, setIsSearchFocused] = useState(false)
  const [isMarketplaceOpen, setIsMarketplaceOpen] = useState(false)
  const [pinnedApps, setPinnedApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [dropdownHighlight, setDropdownHighlight] = useState(true)
  const [savedGridSpaces, setSavedGridSpaces] = useState<GridSpace[]>([])
  const [currentGridSpace, setCurrentGridSpace] = useState<GridSpace | null>(null)

  // Load grid spaces
  const loadGridSpaces = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const spaces = await GridSpaceService.getUserGridSpaces()
      setSavedGridSpaces(spaces)
      
      if (currentGridSpaceId) {
        const space = spaces.find((s) => s.id === currentGridSpaceId)
        setCurrentGridSpace(space || null)
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load grid spaces:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to load grid spaces",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, toast])

  useEffect(() => {
    loadGridSpaces()
  }, [loadGridSpaces])

  // Load pinned applications
  useEffect(() => {
    try {
      const stored = localStorage.getItem("pinned_apps")
      if (stored) {
        setPinnedApps(JSON.parse(stored))
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("Failed to parse pinned_apps from localStorage", e)
    }
  }, [])

  const handleAppPin = (app: AppNode) => {
    const isAlreadyPinned = pinnedApps.some((p) => p.id === app.id)
    if (isAlreadyPinned) return
    const next = [...pinnedApps, app]
    setPinnedApps(next)
    localStorage.setItem("pinned_apps", JSON.stringify(next))
    toast({
      title: "Application Pinned",
      description: `${app.name} added to menu`,
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
      isClosable: true,
    })
  }

  const handleGridSpaceRename = async (gridSpaceId: string, newName: string) => {
    try {
      await GridSpaceService.updateGridSpace(gridSpaceId, { name: newName })
      await loadGridSpaces()
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to rename grid space:", error)
      throw error
    }
  }

  const handleGridSpaceDelete = async (gridSpaceId: string) => {
    try {
      await GridSpaceService.deleteGridSpace(gridSpaceId)
      await loadGridSpaces()
      if (currentGridSpaceId === gridSpaceId) {
        onGridSpaceSelect("")
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to delete grid space:", error)
      throw error
    }
  }

  const filteredGridSpaces = useMemo(() => {
    const allSpaces: GridSpace[] = []
    
    if (currentGridSpace) {
      allSpaces.push(currentGridSpace)
    }
    
    const otherSpaces = savedGridSpaces.filter(
      (space) => !currentGridSpace || space.id !== currentGridSpace.id
    )
    allSpaces.push(...otherSpaces)
    
    return allSpaces.filter(
      (space) =>
        space.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
        (space.description &&
          space.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()))
    )
  }, [savedGridSpaces, currentGridSpace, searchQuery])

  const filteredApplications = useMemo(
    () =>
      pinnedApps.filter(
        (app) =>
          app.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
          (app.description &&
            app.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()))
      ),
    [pinnedApps, searchQuery]
  )

  return (
    <Box
      w={w}
      h="100%"
      bg="white"
      borderRight="1px solid"
      borderColor="gray.200"
      display="flex"
      flexDirection="column"
    >
      {/* Search Section */}
      <Box p={4} borderBottom="1px solid" borderColor="gray.100" position="relative">
        <InputGroup size="sm">
          <InputLeftElement pointerEvents="none">
            <FiSearch color="gray.400" />
          </InputLeftElement>
          <Input
            placeholder="Search Space/Agents/Cards"
            value={searchQuery}
            onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
            onFocus={() => setIsSearchFocused(true)}
            onBlur={() => setTimeout(() => setIsSearchFocused(false), 150)}
            onKeyDown={(e) => {
              if (searchQuery.trim() === "" && isSearchFocused) {
                if (e.key === "ArrowDown" || e.key === "ArrowUp") {
                  setDropdownHighlight(true)
                } else if (e.key === "Enter" && dropdownHighlight) {
                  setIsMarketplaceOpen(true)
                  setDropdownHighlight(false)
                } else if (e.key === "Escape") {
                  setDropdownHighlight(false)
                }
              }
            }}
            bg="gray.50"
            border="none"
            _focus={{ bg: "white", border: "1px solid", borderColor: "blue.200" }}
          />
        </InputGroup>
        {isSearchFocused && searchQuery.trim() === "" && (
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            top="56px"
            left="16px"
            right="16px"
            zIndex={20}
            border="1px solid"
            borderColor="gray.200"
            borderRadius="md"
            shadow="md"
            bg="white"
          >
            <Box
              px={3}
              py={2}
              cursor="pointer"
              bg={dropdownHighlight ? "blue.50" : undefined}
              _hover={{ bg: "blue.50" }}
              onMouseEnter={() => setDropdownHighlight(true)}
              onMouseLeave={() => setDropdownHighlight(false)}
              onMouseDown={(e) => {
                e.preventDefault()
                setIsMarketplaceOpen(true)
              }}
            >
              <HStack spacing={2}>
                <FiGrid color="gray.500" />
                <Text fontSize="sm">Application Marketplace</Text>
              </HStack>
            </Box>
          </Box>
        )}
      </Box>

      {/* Content Sections */}
      <VStack flex="1" spacing={0} align="stretch" overflow="hidden">
        {/* SPACES Section */}
        <Box flex="1" overflow="hidden" data-section="spaces">
          <HStack p={3} justify="space-between" bg="gray.50">
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <FiGrid size={14} color="gray.600" />
              <Text fontSize="xs" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.600" textTransform="uppercase">
                SPACES
              </Text>
            </HStack>
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="gray" variant="subtle">
                {filteredGridSpaces.length}
              </Badge>
              {onCreateGridSpace && (
                <Tooltip label="Create New Grid Space" placement="top">
                  <IconButton
                    aria-label="Create New Grid Space"
                    icon={<FiPlus />}
                    size="xs"
                    variant="ghost"
                    colorScheme="blue"
                    onClick={async () => {
                      const newId = await onCreateGridSpace()
                      if (newId) {
                        onGridSpaceSelect(newId)
                      }
                    }}
                  />
                </Tooltip>
              )}
            </HStack>
          </HStack>

          <Box p={3} overflow="auto" maxH="300px">
            {filteredGridSpaces.length > 0 ? (
              <SimpleGrid columns={1} spacing={3}>
                {filteredGridSpaces.map((space) => {
                  const isCurrent = currentGridSpace && space.id === currentGridSpace.id
                  const hasUnsavedChanges = unsavedSpaces.get(space.id) || false
                  return (
                    <GridSpaceCard
                      key={space.id}
                      gridSpace={{
                        id: space.id,
                        name: space.name,
                        description: space.description,
                        createdAt: space.create_time,
                        isTemporary: (space as any).isTemporary,
                      }}
                      onClick={onGridSpaceSelect}
                      onRename={handleGridSpaceRename}
                      onDelete={handleGridSpaceDelete}
                      onSave={onSaveGridSpace}
                      isCurrent={isCurrent || false}
                      hasUnsavedChanges={hasUnsavedChanges}
                    />
                  )
                })}
              </SimpleGrid>
            ) : (
              <VStack spacing={3} py={4}>
                <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500" textAlign="center">
                  {searchQuery ? "No matching spaces" : "No grid spaces yet"}
                </Text>
                {onCreateGridSpace && !searchQuery && (
                  <Button
                    size="sm"
                    colorScheme="blue"
                    leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
                    onClick={async () => {
                      const newId = await onCreateGridSpace()
                      if (newId) {
                        onGridSpaceSelect(newId)
                      }
                    }}
                  >
                    Create New Grid Space
                  </Button>
                )}
              </VStack>
            )}
          </Box>
        </Box>

        <Divider />

        {/* AGENTS Section */}
        <Box flex="1" overflow="hidden" data-section="agents">
          <HStack p={3} justify="space-between" bg="gray.50">
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <FiUsers size={14} color="gray.600" />
              <Text fontSize="xs" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.600" textTransform="uppercase">
                AGENTS
              </Text>
            </HStack>
            <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="gray" variant="subtle">
              {pinnedApps.length}
            </Badge>
          </HStack>
          <Box p={3} overflow="auto" maxH="400px">
            {pinnedApps.length === 0 ? (
              <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500" textAlign="center" py={4}>
                No pinned applications, add them from Application Marketplace
              </Text>
            ) : (
              <SimpleGrid columns={1} spacing={2}>
                {filteredApplications.map((app) => {
                  const handleUnpin = (applicationId: number) => {
                    setPinnedApps((prev) => {
                      const updated = prev.filter((a) => a.id !== applicationId)
                      localStorage.setItem("pinned_apps", JSON.stringify(updated))
                      return updated
                    })
                    toast({
                      title: "Unpinned",
                      description: `${app.name} removed from AGENTS area`,
                      status: "info",
                      duration: 2000,
                      isClosable: true,
                    })
                  }

                  return (
                    <ApplicationCard
                      key={app.id}
                      application={app}
                      showUnpinButton={true}
                      onUnpin={handleUnpin}
                    />
                  )
                })}
              </SimpleGrid>
            )}
          </Box>
        </Box>
      </VStack>

      {/* Marketplace Modal */}
      <Modal
        isOpen={isMarketplaceOpen}
        onClose={() => setIsMarketplaceOpen(false)}
        size="6xl"
        motionPreset="scale"
        closeOnOverlayClick={false}
      >
        <ModalOverlay />
        <ModalContent maxW="90vw">
          <ModalHeader>Application Marketplace</ModalHeader>
          <ModalCloseButton />
          <ModalBody p={0}>
            <ApplicationMarketplace
              isOpen={isMarketplaceOpen}
              onAppPin={(app) => {
                handleAppPin(app)
                setPinnedApps(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("pinned_apps") || "[]"))
              }}
              pinnedApps={pinnedApps}
              onBack={() => setIsMarketplaceOpen(false)}
              onAppSelect={() => {
                setPinnedApps(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("pinned_apps") || "[]"))
              }}
            />
          </ModalBody>
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>
    </Box>
  )
}

export default React.memo(AIGridSidebar)


```

已完成方案二的更紧凑调整。具体修改如下：

## 已完成的优化（方案二）

### 1. **CardBody 内边距**
   - 从 `p={2}`（8px）改为 `p={1}`（4px）

### 2. **VStack 间距**
   - 从 `spacing={1.5}`（6px）改为 `spacing={0.5}`（2px）

### 3. **时间戳字体**
   - 从 `fontSize="xs"`（12px）改为 `fontSize="9px"`（9px）

### 4. **CURRENT Badge 字体**
   - 从 `fontSize="xs"`（12px）改为 `fontSize="9px"`（9px）

### 5. **UNSAVED 文字字体**
   - 从 `fontSize="10px"`（10px）改为 `fontSize="8px"`（8px）

### 6. **HStack 默认字体大小**
   - 从 `fontSize="xs"` 改为 `fontSize="9px"`，确保整体一致性

现在卡片布局更紧凑，间隙和字体大小已减小。Space 名字保持 `fontSize="sm"`（14px），相对时间等文字更大，保持清晰的视觉层级。

请刷新页面查看效果。如需进一步调整，请告知。

---

**User**

很好，space字体边框调整的基本满意，很棒。现在有个新问题，图一是我拖拽了两个application到中央区域，但是，当我拖动第二个application，想让第二个application与第一个横向排列时，第一个application跑到了中央区域的很下面，几乎看不到了，请问如何解决这种问题，是增加个移动中央区域以找生成的grid还是怎么弄，请给个建议，在修改前，请征求我的意见

---

**Cursor**

分析该问题，查看相关代码：


查看拖拽处理逻辑：


分析问题并提出解决方案：


问题分析：
- 当前逻辑：新项目直接使用拖拽的 `gridX` 和 `gridY`，若与现有项目重叠，react-grid-layout 会自动调整已有项目位置，可能将其推到很远。
- 配置：`compactType={null}`，不会自动压缩，导致项目被推到不可见区域。

解决方案：
方案一（推荐）：智能位置查找 + 自动滚动
- 实现碰撞检测：检查新位置是否与现有项目重叠
- 智能查找下一个可用位置：优先向右，其次向下
- 自动滚动：新项目添加后，滚动到该位置确保可见
- 优点：避免位置冲突，自动滚动到新项目
- 缺点：需要实现碰撞检测算法

方案二：紧凑布局 + 自动滚动
- 启用 `compactType="vertical"`，让项目自动向上压缩
- 添加自动滚动功能
- 优点：实现简单，自动压缩布局
- 缺点：可能改变用户期望的布局

方案三：碰撞检测 + 视图调整按钮
- 实现碰撞检测和智能位置查找
- 添加“适合所有项目”按钮，自动调整视图显示所有项目
- 优点：用户可控，功能完整
- 缺点：需要额外的 UI 按钮

推荐采用方案一，结合方案三的“适合所有项目”按钮作为补充。

是否采用方案一，或需要调整？


## 推荐方案：方案一 + 方案三（智能位置查找 + 自动滚动 + 视图调整按钮）

### 实现内容：

1. **碰撞检测函数**
   - 检查新位置是否与现有项目重叠
   - 返回是否冲突

2. **智能位置查找函数**
   - 优先向右查找（横向排列）
   - 如果右侧空间不足，向下查找
   - 确保不与现有项目重叠

3. **自动滚动功能**
   - 新项目添加后，自动滚动到该位置
   - 确保新项目在可视区域内

4. **“适合所有项目”按钮（可选）**
   - 在网格容器右上角添加按钮
   - 点击后自动调整视图，显示所有项目

### 具体实现逻辑：

```typescript
// 1. 碰撞检测
const checkCollision = (x, y, w, h, existingItems) => {
  // 检查是否与现有项目重叠
}

// 2. 智能查找位置
const findNextAvailablePosition = (preferredX, preferredY, existingItems, cols) => {
  // 优先尝试横向排列（x+4）
  // 如果冲突，向下查找（y+4）
}

// 3. 自动滚动
const scrollToItem = (itemId) => {
  // 使用 scrollIntoView 或计算位置滚动
}
```

### 优势：
- 避免位置冲突，智能排列
- 自动滚动确保新项目可见
- 保持用户期望的横向排列
- 可选按钮提供额外控制

请确认是否采用该方案，或需要调整。

```typescript
// 1. 碰撞检测

  // 检查是否与现有项目重叠
}

// 2. 智能查找位置
const findNextAvailablePosition = (preferredX, preferredY, existingItems, cols) => {
  // 优先尝试横向排列（x+4）
  // 如果冲突，向下查找（y+4）
}

// 3. 自动滚动
const scrollToItem = (itemId) => {
  // 使用 scrollIntoView 或计算位置滚动
}
```

---

**User**

采用该方案，请开始

---

**Cursor**

实现智能位置查找、自动滚动和视图调整按钮。


添加智能位置查找和自动滚动功能：


```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useCallback, useEffect, useMemo } from "react"
import { Responsive, WidthProvider } from "react-grid-layout"
import type { Layout, Layouts } from "react-grid-layout"
import { Box, useToast } from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { useDrop } from "react-dnd"
import { AIGridItem } from "./AIGridItem"
import { GridItemData, LayoutItem, ResponsiveLayout } from "./types"
import AppNodeService from "@/services/appNodeService"
import { DiskService } from "@/services/diskService"
import { GridSpaceService } from "@/services/gridSpaceService"
import "react-grid-layout/css/styles.css"
import "react-resizable/css/styles.css"

const ResponsiveGridLayout = WidthProvider(Responsive)

interface AIGridLayoutProps {
  currentGridSpaceId: string | null
  onLayoutChange?: (layouts: Layouts) => void
  onCreateGridSpace?: () => Promise<string | null> // 返回新创建的 gridSpaceId
  onGridSpaceCreated?: (gridSpaceId: string) => void // 当 Grid Space 创建后调用
  onUnsavedChange?: (gridSpaceId: string, hasUnsavedChanges: boolean) => void // 通知未保存状态变化
  onSaveRequest?: (saveFunction: () => Promise<void>) => void // 注册保存函数
}

// 默认网格配置
const GRID_CONFIG = {
  cols: { lg: 12, md: 10, sm: 6, xs: 4, xxs: 2 },
  rowHeight: 100,
  containerPadding: [16, 16] as [number, number],
  margin: [16, 16] as [number, number],
}

// 默认网格项大小（建议：宽4列，高4行）
const DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE = {
  w: 4,
  h: 4,
  minW: 3,
  minH: 3,
  maxW: 8,
  maxH: 8,
}

// 碰撞检测函数：检查新位置是否与现有项目重叠
const checkCollision = (
  x: number,
  y: number,
  w: number,
  h: number,
  existingItems: Layout[]
): boolean => {
  for (const item of existingItems) {
    // 检查是否重叠
    if (
      x < item.x + item.w &&
      x + w > item.x &&
      y < item.y + item.h &&
      y + h > item.y
    ) {
      return true // 有碰撞
    }
  }
  return false // 无碰撞
}

// 智能位置查找函数：优先横向排列，如果冲突则向下查找
const findNextAvailablePosition = (
  preferredX: number,
  preferredY: number,
  existingItems: Layout[],
  cols: number,
  itemWidth: number = DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w,
  itemHeight: number = DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.h,
  maxAttempts: number = 50
): { x: number; y: number } => {
  // 首先尝试使用首选位置
  if (!checkCollision(preferredX, preferredY, itemWidth, itemHeight, existingItems)) {
    return { x: preferredX, y: preferredY }
  }

  // 优先尝试横向排列（向右查找）
  for (let offset = 1; offset <= cols - itemWidth; offset++) {
    const tryX = preferredX + offset
    if (tryX + itemWidth <= cols) {
      if (!checkCollision(tryX, preferredY, itemWidth, itemHeight, existingItems)) {
        return { x: tryX, y: preferredY }
      }
    }
  }

  // 如果横向排列失败，向下查找
  let tryY = preferredY
  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maxAttempts; attempt++) {
    // 尝试在当前行找到位置
    for (let tryX = 0; tryX <= cols - itemWidth; tryX++) {
      if (!checkCollision(tryX, tryY, itemWidth, itemHeight, existingItems)) {
        return { x: tryX, y: tryY }
      }
    }
    // 如果当前行没有位置，向下移动一行
    tryY += itemHeight
  }

  // 如果所有尝试都失败，返回首选位置（让 react-grid-layout 处理）
  return { x: preferredX, y: preferredY }
}

export const AIGridLayout: React.FC<AIGridLayoutProps> = ({
  currentGridSpaceId,
  onLayoutChange,
  onCreateGridSpace,
  onGridSpaceCreated,
  onUnsavedChange,
  onSaveRequest,
}) => {
  const toast = useToast()
  const [gridItems, setGridItems] = useState<Map<string, GridItemData>>(new Map())
  const [layouts, setLayouts] = useState<Layouts>({
    lg: [],
    md: [],
    sm: [],
    xs: [],
    xxs: [],
  })
  const [lastSavedData, setLastSavedData] = useState<string | null>(null) // 记录最后保存的数据
  const [hasUnsavedChanges, setHasUnsavedChanges] = useState(false) // 未保存状态

  // Load grid layout data from database
  useEffect(() => {
    if (currentGridSpaceId) {
      loadGridSpaceData(currentGridSpaceId)
      setHasUnsavedChanges(false)
      setLastSavedData(null)
    } else {
      // Clear grid items when no space is selected
      setGridItems(new Map())
      setLayouts({
        lg: [],
        md: [],
        sm: [],
        xs: [],
        xxs: [],
      })
      setHasUnsavedChanges(false)
      setLastSavedData(null)
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId])

  const loadGridSpaceData = useCallback(async (gridSpaceId: string) => {
    try {
      const gridSpace = await GridSpaceService.getGridSpace(gridSpaceId)
      const layoutData = GridSpaceService.parseGridLayoutData(gridSpace.grid_layout_data)
      
      // Restore layouts
      if (layoutData.layouts) {
        setLayouts(layoutData.layouts)
      } else {
        setLayouts({
          lg: [],
          md: [],
          sm: [],
          xs: [],
          xxs: [],
        })
      }

      // Restore grid items data
      if (layoutData.items && Array.isArray(layoutData.items)) {
        const itemsMap = new Map<string, GridItemData>()
        
        // Collect all latestResultIds that need to be loaded
        const resultIdsToLoad: number[] = []
        const diskIdToResultIdMap = new Map<number, number>()
        
        layoutData.items.forEach((item: GridItemData) => {
          itemsMap.set(item.i, item)
          
          // Collect latestResultIds from all disks
          if (item.disks && Array.isArray(item.disks)) {
            item.disks.forEach((disk) => {
              // Only query for non-dashboard disks with latestResultId
              if (disk.latestResultId && disk.category !== "dashboard") {
                resultIdsToLoad.push(disk.latestResultId)
                diskIdToResultIdMap.set(disk.id, disk.latestResultId)
              }
            })
          }
        })
        
        // Batch load execution results for all disks
        if (resultIdsToLoad.length > 0) {
          try {
            // Load execution results for each disk
            // Note: We need to query by disk.id to get all results, then find the one matching latestResultId
            const diskIds = Array.from(new Set(
              Array.from(itemsMap.values())
                .flatMap(item => item.disks?.map(disk => disk.id) || [])
                .filter(id => id !== undefined)
            ))
            
            // Load results for all disks in parallel
            const diskResultsPromises = diskIds.map(async (diskId) => {
              try {
                const results = await DiskService.getDiskExecutionResults(diskId)
                return { diskId, results }
              } catch (error) {
                console.error(`Failed to load results for disk ${diskId}:`, error)
                return { diskId, results: [] }
              }
            })
            
            const diskResultsArray = await Promise.all(diskResultsPromises)
            
            // Create a map: diskId -> results array
            const diskResultsMap = new Map<number, any[]>()
            diskResultsArray.forEach(({ diskId, results }) => {
              diskResultsMap.set(diskId, results)
            })
            
            // Update items with loaded latestResult
            itemsMap.forEach((item, itemId) => {
              if (item.disks && Array.isArray(item.disks)) {
                const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
                  // For non-dashboard disks with latestResultId, load the result
                  if (disk.latestResultId && disk.category !== "dashboard") {
                    const results = diskResultsMap.get(disk.id) || []
                    const latestResult = results.find((r: any) => r.id === disk.latestResultId)
                    return {
                      ...disk,
                      latestResult: latestResult || null,
                    }
                  }
                  // For dashboard disks, keep dashboardCharts as is
                  return disk
                })
                
                // Update the item with loaded results
                itemsMap.set(itemId, {
                  ...item,
                  disks: updatedDisks,
                })
              }
            })
          } catch (error) {
            console.error("Failed to batch load execution results:", error)
            // Continue without execution results rather than failing completely
          }
        }
        
        setGridItems(itemsMap)
      }

      // 记录当前保存的数据作为基准
      const serialized = GridSpaceService.serializeGridLayoutData(layoutData)
      setLastSavedData(serialized)
      setHasUnsavedChanges(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load grid space data:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to load grid space data",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [toast])

  // Save grid layout data to database (manual save)
  // Note: static property is a runtime property and should not be saved
  const saveGridSpaceData = useCallback(
    async () => {
      if (!currentGridSpaceId) {
        toast({
          title: "Error",
          description: "No grid space selected",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }

      try {
        // Get current layouts and items
        const currentLayouts = layouts
        const currentItems = gridItems

        // Remove static property from layouts before saving (it's a runtime property)
        const layoutsWithoutStatic: Layouts = {}
        Object.keys(currentLayouts).forEach((breakpoint) => {
          const layout = currentLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] || []
          layoutsWithoutStatic[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] = layout.map((layoutItem) => {
            // Create a new object without the static property
            const { static: _, ...layoutItemWithoutStatic } = layoutItem
            return layoutItemWithoutStatic
          })
        })

        // Prepare items for saving - remove runtime data (latestResult)
        const itemsToSave = Array.from(currentItems.values()).map(item => ({
          ...item,
          disks: item.disks?.map(disk => {
            // Remove latestResult (runtime data) before saving, keep only latestResultId
            const { latestResult, ...diskWithoutResult } = disk
            return diskWithoutResult
          }),
        }))
        
        const layoutData = {
          layouts: layoutsWithoutStatic,
          items: itemsToSave,
        }
        
        const serialized = GridSpaceService.serializeGridLayoutData(layoutData)
        
        await GridSpaceService.autoSaveGridSpace(currentGridSpaceId, serialized)
        
        // Update saved data baseline
        setLastSavedData(serialized)
        setHasUnsavedChanges(false)
        onUnsavedChange?.(currentGridSpaceId, false)
        
        toast({
          title: "Saved",
          description: "Grid space saved successfully",
          status: "success",
          duration: 2000,
        })
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Failed to save grid space:", error)
        toast({
          title: "Save Failed",
          description: "Failed to save grid space",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        throw error
      }
    },
    [currentGridSpaceId, layouts, gridItems, toast, onUnsavedChange]
  )

  // Register save function with parent component
  useEffect(() => {
    if (onSaveRequest && currentGridSpaceId) {
      onSaveRequest(saveGridSpaceData)
    }
  }, [onSaveRequest, currentGridSpaceId, saveGridSpaceData])

  // Check for unsaved changes
  const checkUnsavedChanges = useCallback(() => {
    if (!currentGridSpaceId) return

    // Prepare current data for comparison - remove runtime data
    const currentData = {
      layouts: Object.keys(layouts).reduce((acc, breakpoint) => {
        const layout = layouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] || []
        acc[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] = layout.map((layoutItem) => {
          const { static: _, ...layoutItemWithoutStatic } = layoutItem
          return layoutItemWithoutStatic
        })
        return acc
      }, {} as Layouts),
      items: Array.from(gridItems.values()).map(item => ({
        ...item,
        disks: item.disks?.map(disk => {
          // Remove latestResult (runtime data) before comparison
          const { latestResult, ...diskWithoutResult } = disk
          return diskWithoutResult
        }),
      })),
    }
    const serialized = GridSpaceService.serializeGridLayoutData(currentData)
    
    const hasChanges = lastSavedData !== serialized
    if (hasChanges !== hasUnsavedChanges) {
      setHasUnsavedChanges(hasChanges)
      onUnsavedChange?.(currentGridSpaceId, hasChanges)
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, layouts, gridItems, lastSavedData, hasUnsavedChanges, onUnsavedChange])

  // Check for unsaved changes whenever data changes
  useEffect(() => {
    if (currentGridSpaceId && lastSavedData !== null) {
      checkUnsavedChanges()
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, layouts, gridItems, lastSavedData, checkUnsavedChanges])

  const handleApplicationDrop = useCallback(async (
    application: any,
    gridX: number,
    gridY: number,
    targetGridSpaceId?: string | null
  ) => {
    // 使用传入的 targetGridSpaceId，如果没有则使用 currentGridSpaceId
    const spaceId = targetGridSpaceId || currentGridSpaceId
    if (!spaceId) {
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "No grid space selected",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
      return
    }
    try {
      // Get complete application information
      const completeApp = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(application.id)

      // Filter disk children
      const disks = completeApp.children?.filter(
        (child) => child.node_type === "disk"
      ) || []

      // Process disks - save full disk object, only save latestResultId
      const disksWithResults = await Promise.all(
        disks.map(async (disk) => {
          // Handle dashboard type disks - parse requirement to dashboardCharts
          if (disk.category === "dashboard") {
            try {
              // Parse requirement field for dashboard charts
              if (disk.requirement) {
                try {
                  const charts = JSON.parse(disk.requirement)
                  if (Array.isArray(charts) && charts.length > 0) {
                    // Validate and extract echarts_option from each chart
                    const dashboardCharts = charts
                      .filter((chart: any) => chart.echarts_option)
                      .map((chart: any) => ({
                        chart_type: chart.chart_type || "unknown",
                        question_title: chart.question_title || "Untitled Chart",
                        echarts_option: chart.echarts_option,
                        echarts_template: chart.echarts_template,
                        queries: chart.queries,
                        data_source: chart.data_source,
                        created_at: chart.created_at,
                        pinned_at: chart.pinned_at,
                        pinned_by: chart.pinned_by,
                      }))

                    if (dashboardCharts.length > 0) {
                      // Save full disk object with parsed dashboardCharts
                      return {
                        ...disk, // Full AppNode fields
                        latestResultId: null, // Dashboard disks don't have execution results
                        dashboardCharts,
                        dashboardError: undefined,
                      }
                    } else {
                      return {
                        ...disk,
                        latestResultId: null,
                        dashboardCharts: undefined,
                        dashboardError: "No valid chart configuration found in requirement",
                      }
                    }
                  } else {
                    return {
                      ...disk,
                      latestResultId: null,
                      dashboardCharts: undefined,
                      dashboardError: "Requirement is not a valid array",
                    }
                  }
                } catch (parseError) {
                  console.error(
                    `Failed to parse dashboard requirement for disk ${disk.id}:`,
                    parseError
                  )
                  return {
                    ...disk,
                    latestResultId: null,
                    dashboardCharts: undefined,
                    dashboardError: `Failed to parse requirement: ${parseError instanceof Error ? parseError.message : "Unknown error"}`,
                  }
                }
              } else {
                return {
                  ...disk,
                  latestResultId: null,
                  dashboardCharts: undefined,
                  dashboardError: "Requirement field is empty",
                }
              }
            } catch (error) {
              console.error(`Failed to process dashboard disk ${disk.id}:`, error)
              return {
                ...disk,
                latestResultId: null,
                dashboardCharts: undefined,
                dashboardError: `Failed to process dashboard: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`,
              }
            }
          }

          // Handle regular disks (non-dashboard) - save latestResultId and fill latestResult for display
          try {
            const executionResults = await DiskService.getDiskExecutionResults(disk.id)
            const latestResult =
              executionResults && executionResults.length > 0
                ? executionResults.sort(
                    (a: any, b: any) =>
                      new Date(b.created_at).getTime() -
                      new Date(a.created_at).getTime()
                  )[0]
                : null

            // Save full disk object, save latestResultId for persistence, fill latestResult for immediate display
            return {
              ...disk, // Full AppNode fields
              latestResultId: latestResult ? latestResult.id : null, // Save ID for persistence
              latestResult: latestResult ? { // Fill for immediate display (will be removed before saving)
                id: latestResult.id,
                product_agent_id: latestResult.product_agent_id ?? null,
                graph_id: latestResult.graph_id ? (typeof latestResult.graph_id === 'string' ? parseInt(latestResult.graph_id, 10) || null : latestResult.graph_id) : null,
                is_processed: latestResult.is_processed,
                conclusion_detail: latestResult.conclusion_detail,
                created_at: latestResult.created_at,
                updated_at: latestResult.updated_at,
              } : null,
            }
          } catch (error) {
            console.error(`Failed to fetch execution results for disk ${disk.id}:`, error)
            return {
              ...disk,
              latestResultId: null,
              latestResult: null,
            }
          }
        })
      )

      // Create grid item
      const itemId = `grid-item-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`
      const newItem: GridItemData = {
        i: itemId,
        x: Math.max(0, gridX),
        y: Math.max(0, gridY),
        w: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w,
        h: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.h,
        minW: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.minW,
        minH: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.minH,
        maxW: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.maxW,
        maxH: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.maxH,
        applicationId: completeApp.id,
        applicationName: completeApp.name,
        applicationDescription: completeApp.description,
        applicationCreator: completeApp.owner
          ? completeApp.owner.full_name || completeApp.owner.email
          : undefined,
        disks: disksWithResults,
        isPinned: false, // Default to unpinned
        isExpanded: true, // Default to expanded state
      }

      // Add to grid items
      setGridItems((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        next.set(itemId, newItem)
        return next
      })

      // Update layouts for all breakpoints
      setLayouts((prevLayouts) => {
        const newLayouts: Layouts = {}
        Object.keys(prevLayouts).forEach((breakpoint) => {
          const existingLayout = prevLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] || []
          newLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] = [
            ...existingLayout,
            {
              i: itemId,
              x: Math.max(0, gridX),
              y: Math.max(0, gridY),
              w: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w,
              h: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.h,
              minW: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.minW,
              minH: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.minH,
              maxW: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.maxW,
              maxH: DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.maxH,
            },
          ]
        })
        return newLayouts
      })

      // Note: No auto-save here - user must click save button

      toast({
        title: "Application Added",
        description: `${completeApp.name} with ${disks.length} disk(s) added to grid`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to add application to grid:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to add application to grid",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [toast, currentGridSpaceId])

  // Handle application drop from sidebar
  const [{ isOver }, drop] = useDrop(() => ({
    accept: "application",
    drop: async (item: { application: any }, monitor) => {
      console.log("🎯 Drop event triggered:", { item, currentGridSpaceId })
      
      // 如果没有选中的 Grid Space，自动创建一个
      let targetGridSpaceId = currentGridSpaceId
      if (!targetGridSpaceId && onCreateGridSpace) {
        console.log("🚀 No grid space, creating new one...")
        const newId = await onCreateGridSpace()
        if (newId) {
          targetGridSpaceId = newId
          onGridSpaceCreated?.(newId)
          console.log("✅ Grid space created:", newId)
        } else {
          console.log("❌ Failed to create grid space")
          toast({
            title: "Error",
            description: "Failed to create grid space for dropping application",
            status: "error",
            duration: 3000,
          })
          return
        }
      } else if (!targetGridSpaceId) {
        console.log("⚠️ No grid space and no create function")
        toast({
          title: "No Grid Space",
          description: "Please create or select a grid space first",
          status: "warning",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }

      // Use a default position if we can't calculate from drop
      const gridX = 0
      const gridY = 0

      // 使用临时变量确保 handleApplicationDrop 使用正确的 ID
      const tempGridSpaceId = targetGridSpaceId
      console.log("📦 Calling handleApplicationDrop with:", tempGridSpaceId)
      await handleApplicationDrop(item.application, gridX, gridY, tempGridSpaceId)
    },
    collect: (monitor) => ({
      isOver: monitor.isOver(),
    }),
  }), [currentGridSpaceId, handleApplicationDrop, onCreateGridSpace, onGridSpaceCreated, toast])

  // Handle layout change
  const handleLayoutChange = useCallback(
    (newLayouts: Layout[], allLayouts: Layouts) => {
      console.log("🔄 handleLayoutChange called:", {
        newLayoutsKeys: Object.keys(newLayouts),
        allLayoutsKeys: Object.keys(allLayouts),
        lgItems: allLayouts.lg?.map(item => ({ i: item.i, static: item.static, x: item.x, y: item.y }))
      })
      
      // Preserve static property from processedLayouts when layout changes
      const layoutsWithStatic: Layouts = {}
      Object.keys(allLayouts).forEach((breakpoint) => {
        const layout = allLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] || []
        layoutsWithStatic[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] = layout.map((layoutItem) => {
          const itemData = gridItems.get(layoutItem.i)
          const isPinned = itemData?.isPinned || false
          return {
            ...layoutItem,
            static: isPinned, // Preserve static property based on isPinned
          }
        })
      })
      
      console.log("💾 Updating layouts with preserved static:", {
        lgItems: layoutsWithStatic.lg?.map(item => ({ i: item.i, static: item.static }))
      })
      
      setLayouts(layoutsWithStatic)
      onLayoutChange?.(layoutsWithStatic)
      
      // Note: No auto-save here - user must click save button
    },
    [onLayoutChange, gridItems]
  )

  // Handle toggle pin state
  const handleTogglePin = useCallback(
    (itemId: string) => {
      console.log("🔒 handleTogglePin called:", { itemId, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() })
      
      setGridItems((prevItems) => {
        const item = prevItems.get(itemId)
        console.log("📦 Current item state:", { itemId, item, isPinned: item?.isPinned })
        
        if (!item) {
          console.warn("⚠️ Item not found:", itemId)
          return prevItems
        }

        const newIsPinned = !(item.isPinned || false)
        console.log("🔄 Toggling pin state:", { itemId, oldIsPinned: item.isPinned, newIsPinned })
        
        const updatedItem = { ...item, isPinned: newIsPinned }
        const updatedItems = new Map(prevItems)
        updatedItems.set(itemId, updatedItem)
        
        console.log("✅ Updated gridItems:", { 
          itemId, 
          updatedItem: updatedItems.get(itemId),
          totalItems: updatedItems.size 
        })

        // Update layouts to set static property based on pin state
        setLayouts((prevLayouts) => {
          console.log("📐 Updating layouts with static property:", { itemId, newIsPinned })
          
          const updatedLayouts: Layouts = {}
          Object.keys(prevLayouts).forEach((breakpoint) => {
            const existingLayout = prevLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] || []
            updatedLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] = existingLayout.map((layoutItem) => {
              if (layoutItem.i === itemId) {
                const updatedLayoutItem = {
                  ...layoutItem,
                  static: newIsPinned, // Set static based on pin state
                }
                console.log(`  📍 ${breakpoint}: Updated layout item:`, updatedLayoutItem)
                return updatedLayoutItem
              }
              return layoutItem
            })
          })

          // Note: No auto-save here - user must click save button
          return updatedLayouts
        })

        return updatedItems
      })
    },
    [currentGridSpaceId]
  )

  // Generate processed layouts with static property based on isPinned state
  // This ensures ResponsiveGridLayout receives layouts with correct static values
  const processedLayouts = useMemo(() => {
    console.log("🔄 Recalculating processedLayouts:", { 
      layoutsCount: Object.keys(layouts).length,
      gridItemsCount: gridItems.size,
      gridItemsKeys: Array.from(gridItems.keys())
    })
    
    const processed: Layouts = {}
    const breakpoints: (keyof Layouts)[] = ['lg', 'md', 'sm', 'xs', 'xxs']
    
    breakpoints.forEach((breakpoint) => {
      const baseLayout = layouts[breakpoint] || []
      processed[breakpoint] = baseLayout.map((layoutItem) => {
        const itemData = gridItems.get(layoutItem.i)
        const isPinned = itemData?.isPinned || false
        
        const processedItem = {
          ...layoutItem,
          static: isPinned, // Set static based on pin state
        }
        
        if (isPinned) {
          console.log(`  📌 ${breakpoint} - Item ${layoutItem.i} is pinned, static=true`)
        }
        
        return processedItem
      })
    })
    
    console.log("✅ Processed layouts result:", {
      lg: processed.lg?.map(item => ({ i: item.i, static: item.static })),
      gridItems: Array.from(gridItems.entries()).map(([key, value]) => ({ 
        i: key, 
        isPinned: value.isPinned 
      }))
    })
    
    return processed
  }, [layouts, gridItems])

  // Generate layout items for current breakpoint (default to lg) for rendering
  const currentLayout = useMemo(() => {
    return processedLayouts.lg || []
  }, [processedLayouts])

  return (
    <Box
      ref={drop}
      w="100%"
      h="100%"
      bg="gray.50"
      position="relative"
      border={isOver ? "2px dashed" : "none"}
      borderColor={isOver ? "blue.500" : "transparent"}
    >
      <ResponsiveGridLayout
        className="layout"
        layouts={processedLayouts}
        breakpoints={{ lg: 1200, md: 996, sm: 768, xs: 480, xxs: 0 }}
        cols={GRID_CONFIG.cols}
        rowHeight={GRID_CONFIG.rowHeight}
        margin={GRID_CONFIG.margin}
        containerPadding={GRID_CONFIG.containerPadding}
        onLayoutChange={handleLayoutChange}
        isDraggable={true}
        isResizable={true}
        resizeHandles={["se", "sw", "ne", "nw", "s", "n", "e", "w"]}
        compactType={null}
        draggableHandle=".grid-drag-handle"
      >
        {currentLayout.map((layoutItem) => {
          const itemData = gridItems.get(layoutItem.i)
          if (!itemData) return null

          console.log("📦 Rendering AIGridItem:", {
            itemId: layoutItem.i,
            hasOnTogglePin: !!handleTogglePin,
            isPinned: itemData.isPinned,
            static: layoutItem.static
          })

          return (
            <Box key={layoutItem.i} data-grid={layoutItem}>
              <AIGridItem data={itemData} onTogglePin={handleTogglePin} />
            </Box>
          )
        })}
      </ResponsiveGridLayout>
    </Box>
  )
}


```

```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useCallback, useEffect, useMemo } from "react"
import { Responsive, WidthProvider } from "react-grid-layout"
import type { Layout, Layouts } from "react-grid-layout"
import { Box, useToast } from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { useDrop } from "react-dnd"
import { AIGridItem } from "./AIGridItem"
import { GridItemData, LayoutItem, ResponsiveLayout } from "./types"
import AppNodeService from "@/services/appNodeService"
import { DiskService } from "@/services/diskService"
import { GridSpaceService } from "@/services/gridSpaceService"
import "react-grid-layout/css/styles.css"
import "react-resizable/css/styles.css"

const ResponsiveGridLayout = WidthProvider(Responsive)

interface AIGridLayoutProps {
  currentGridSpaceId: string | null
  onLayoutChange?: (layouts: Layouts) => void
  onCreateGridSpace?: () => Promise<string | null> // 返回新创建的 gridSpaceId
  onGridSpaceCreated?: (gridSpaceId: string) => void // 当 Grid Space 创建后调用
  onUnsavedChange?: (gridSpaceId: string, hasUnsavedChanges: boolean) => void // 通知未保存状态变化
  onSaveRequest?: (saveFunction: () => Promise<void>) => void // 注册保存函数
}

// 默认网格配置
const GRID_CONFIG = {
  cols: { lg: 12, md: 10, sm: 6, xs: 4, xxs: 2 },
  rowHeight: 100,
  containerPadding: [16, 16] as [number, number],
  margin: [16, 16] as [number, number],
}

// 默认网格项大小（建议：宽4列，高4行）
const DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE = {
  w: 4,
  h: 4,
  minW: 3,
  minH: 3,
  maxW: 8,
  maxH: 8,
}

// 碰撞检测函数：检查新位置是否与现有项目重叠
const checkCollision = (
  x: number,
  y: number,
  w: number,
  h: number,
  existingItems: Layout[]
): boolean => {
  for (const item of existingItems) {
    // 检查是否重叠
    if (
      x < item.x + item.w &&
      x + w > item.x &&
      y < item.y + item.h &&
      y + h > item.y
    ) {
      return true // 有碰撞
    }
  }
  return false // 无碰撞
}

// 智能位置查找函数：优先横向排列，如果冲突则向下查找
const findNextAvailablePosition = (
  preferredX: number,
  preferredY: number,
  existingItems: Layout[],
  cols: number,
  itemWidth: number = DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w,
  itemHeight: number = DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.h,
  maxAttempts: number = 50
): { x: number; y: number } => {
  // 首先尝试使用首选位置
  if (!checkCollision(preferredX, preferredY, itemWidth, itemHeight, existingItems)) {
    return { x: preferredX, y: preferredY }
  }

  // 优先尝试横向排列（向右查找）
  for (let offset = 1; offset <= cols - itemWidth; offset++) {
    const tryX = preferredX + offset
    if (tryX + itemWidth <= cols) {
      if (!checkCollision(tryX, preferredY, itemWidth, itemHeight, existingItems)) {
        return { x: tryX, y: preferredY }
      }
    }
  }

  // 如果横向排列失败，向下查找
  let tryY = preferredY
  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maxAttempts; attempt++) {
    // 尝试在当前行找到位置
    for (let tryX = 0; tryX <= cols - itemWidth; tryX++) {
      if (!checkCollision(tryX, tryY, itemWidth, itemHeight, existingItems)) {
        return { x: tryX, y: tryY }
      }
    }
    // 如果当前行没有位置，向下移动一行
    tryY += itemHeight
  }

  // 如果所有尝试都失败，返回首选位置（让 react-grid-layout 处理）
  return { x: preferredX, y: preferredY }
}

export const AIGridLayout: React.FC<AIGridLayoutProps> = ({
  currentGridSpaceId,
  onLayoutChange,
  onCreateGridSpace,
  onGridSpaceCreated,
  onUnsavedChange,
  onSaveRequest,
}) => {
  const toast = useToast()
  const gridContainerRef = React.useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
  const [gridItems, setGridItems] = useState<Map<string, GridItemData>>(new Map())
  const [layouts, setLayouts] = useState<Layouts>({
    lg: [],
    md: [],
    sm: [],
    xs: [],
    xxs: [],
  })
  const [lastSavedData, setLastSavedData] = useState<string | null>(null) // 记录最后保存的数据
  const [hasUnsavedChanges, setHasUnsavedChanges] = useState(false) // 未保存状态

  // Load grid layout data from database
  useEffect(() => {
    if (currentGridSpaceId) {
      loadGridSpaceData(currentGridSpaceId)
      setHasUnsavedChanges(false)
      setLastSavedData(null)
    } else {
      // Clear grid items when no space is selected
      setGridItems(new Map())
      setLayouts({
        lg: [],
        md: [],
        sm: [],
        xs: [],
        xxs: [],
      })
      setHasUnsavedChanges(false)
      setLastSavedData(null)
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId])

  const loadGridSpaceData = useCallback(async (gridSpaceId: string) => {
    try {
      const gridSpace = await GridSpaceService.getGridSpace(gridSpaceId)
      const layoutData = GridSpaceService.parseGridLayoutData(gridSpace.grid_layout_data)
      
      // Restore layouts
      if (layoutData.layouts) {
        setLayouts(layoutData.layouts)
      } else {
        setLayouts({
          lg: [],
          md: [],
          sm: [],
          xs: [],
          xxs: [],
        })
      }

      // Restore grid items data
      if (layoutData.items && Array.isArray(layoutData.items)) {
        const itemsMap = new Map<string, GridItemData>()
        
        // Collect all latestResultIds that need to be loaded
        const resultIdsToLoad: number[] = []
        const diskIdToResultIdMap = new Map<number, number>()
        
        layoutData.items.forEach((item: GridItemData) => {
          itemsMap.set(item.i, item)
          
          // Collect latestResultIds from all disks
          if (item.disks && Array.isArray(item.disks)) {
            item.disks.forEach((disk) => {
              // Only query for non-dashboard disks with latestResultId
              if (disk.latestResultId && disk.category !== "dashboard") {
                resultIdsToLoad.push(disk.latestResultId)
                diskIdToResultIdMap.set(disk.id, disk.latestResultId)
              }
            })
          }
        })
        
        // Batch load execution results for all disks
        if (resultIdsToLoad.length > 0) {
          try {
            // Load execution results for each disk
            // Note: We need to query by disk.id to get all results, then find the one matching latestResultId
            const diskIds = Array.from(new Set(
              Array.from(itemsMap.values())
                .flatMap(item => item.disks?.map(disk => disk.id) || [])
                .filter(id => id !== undefined)
            ))
            
            // Load results for all disks in parallel
            const diskResultsPromises = diskIds.map(async (diskId) => {
              try {
                const results = await DiskService.getDiskExecutionResults(diskId)
                return { diskId, results }
              } catch (error) {
                console.error(`Failed to load results for disk ${diskId}:`, error)
                return { diskId, results: [] }
              }
            })
            
            const diskResultsArray = await Promise.all(diskResultsPromises)
            
            // Create a map: diskId -> results array
            const diskResultsMap = new Map<number, any[]>()
            diskResultsArray.forEach(({ diskId, results }) => {
              diskResultsMap.set(diskId, results)
            })
            
            // Update items with loaded latestResult
            itemsMap.forEach((item, itemId) => {
              if (item.disks && Array.isArray(item.disks)) {
                const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
                  // For non-dashboard disks with latestResultId, load the result
                  if (disk.latestResultId && disk.category !== "dashboard") {
                    const results = diskResultsMap.get(disk.id) || []
                    const latestResult = results.find((r: any) => r.id === disk.latestResultId)
                    return {
                      ...disk,
                      latestResult: latestResult || null,
                    }
                  }
                  // For dashboard disks, keep dashboardCharts as is
                  return disk
                })
                
                // Update the item with loaded results
                itemsMap.set(itemId, {
                  ...item,
                  disks: updatedDisks,
                })
              }
            })
          } catch (error) {
            console.error("Failed to batch load execution results:", error)
            // Continue without execution results rather than failing completely
          }
        }
        
        setGridItems(itemsMap)
      }

      // 记录当前保存的数据作为基准
      const serialized = GridSpaceService.serializeGridLayoutData(layoutData)
      setLastSavedData(serialized)
      setHasUnsavedChanges(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load grid space data:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to load grid space data",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [toast])

  // Save grid layout data to database (manual save)
  // Note: static property is a runtime property and should not be saved
  const saveGridSpaceData = useCallback(
    async () => {
      if (!currentGridSpaceId) {
        toast({
          title: "Error",
          description: "No grid space selected",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }

      try {
        // Get current layouts and items
        const currentLayouts = layouts
        const currentItems = gridItems

        // Remove static property from layouts before saving (it's a runtime property)
        const layoutsWithoutStatic: Layouts = {}
        Object.keys(currentLayouts).forEach((breakpoint) => {
          const layout = currentLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] || []
          layoutsWithoutStatic[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] = layout.map((layoutItem) => {
            // Create a new object without the static property
            const { static: _, ...layoutItemWithoutStatic } = layoutItem
            return layoutItemWithoutStatic
          })
        })

        // Prepare items for saving - remove runtime data (latestResult)
        const itemsToSave = Array.from(currentItems.values()).map(item => ({
          ...item,
          disks: item.disks?.map(disk => {
            // Remove latestResult (runtime data) before saving, keep only latestResultId
            const { latestResult, ...diskWithoutResult } = disk
            return diskWithoutResult
          }),
        }))
        
        const layoutData = {
          layouts: layoutsWithoutStatic,
          items: itemsToSave,
        }
        
        const serialized = GridSpaceService.serializeGridLayoutData(layoutData)
        
        await GridSpaceService.autoSaveGridSpace(currentGridSpaceId, serialized)
        
        // Update saved data baseline
        setLastSavedData(serialized)
        setHasUnsavedChanges(false)
        onUnsavedChange?.(currentGridSpaceId, false)
        
        toast({
          title: "Saved",
          description: "Grid space saved successfully",
          status: "success",
          duration: 2000,
        })
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Failed to save grid space:", error)
        toast({
          title: "Save Failed",
          description: "Failed to save grid space",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        throw error
      }
    },
    [currentGridSpaceId, layouts, gridItems, toast, onUnsavedChange]
  )

  // Register save function with parent component
  useEffect(() => {
    if (onSaveRequest && currentGridSpaceId) {
      onSaveRequest(saveGridSpaceData)
    }
  }, [onSaveRequest, currentGridSpaceId, saveGridSpaceData])

  // Check for unsaved changes
  const checkUnsavedChanges = useCallback(() => {
    if (!currentGridSpaceId) return

    // Prepare current data for comparison - remove runtime data
    const currentData = {
      layouts: Object.keys(layouts).reduce((acc, breakpoint) => {
        const layout = layouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] || []
        acc[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] = layout.map((layoutItem) => {
          const { static: _, ...layoutItemWithoutStatic } = layoutItem
          return layoutItemWithoutStatic
        })
        return acc
      }, {} as Layouts),
      items: Array.from(gridItems.values()).map(item => ({
        ...item,
        disks: item.disks?.map(disk => {
          // Remove latestResult (runtime data) before comparison
          const { latestResult, ...diskWithoutResult } = disk
          return diskWithoutResult
        }),
      })),
    }
    const serialized = GridSpaceService.serializeGridLayoutData(currentData)
    
    const hasChanges = lastSavedData !== serialized
    if (hasChanges !== hasUnsavedChanges) {
      setHasUnsavedChanges(hasChanges)
      onUnsavedChange?.(currentGridSpaceId, hasChanges)
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, layouts, gridItems, lastSavedData, hasUnsavedChanges, onUnsavedChange])

  // Check for unsaved changes whenever data changes
  useEffect(() => {
    if (currentGridSpaceId && lastSavedData !== null) {
      checkUnsavedChanges()
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, layouts, gridItems, lastSavedData, checkUnsavedChanges])

  const handleApplicationDrop = useCallback(async (
    application: any,
    gridX: number,
    gridY: number,
    targetGridSpaceId?: string | null
  ) => {
    // 使用传入的 targetGridSpaceId，如果没有则使用 currentGridSpaceId
    const spaceId = targetGridSpaceId || currentGridSpaceId
    if (!spaceId) {
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "No grid space selected",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
      return
    }
    try {
      // Get complete application information
      const completeApp = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(application.id)

      // Filter disk children
      const disks = completeApp.children?.filter(
        (child) => child.node_type === "disk"
      ) || []

      // Process disks - save full disk object, only save latestResultId
      const disksWithResults = await Promise.all(
        disks.map(async (disk) => {
          // Handle dashboard type disks - parse requirement to dashboardCharts
          if (disk.category === "dashboard") {
            try {
              // Parse requirement field for dashboard charts
              if (disk.requirement) {
                try {
                  const charts = JSON.parse(disk.requirement)
                  if (Array.isArray(charts) && charts.length > 0) {
                    // Validate and extract echarts_option from each chart
```
