  onResize?: () => void // Reserved for future use
  onTogglePin?: (itemId: string) => void
}

// 判断是否为有效的ECharts配置
function isEChartsConfig(content: string): boolean {
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(content)
    // 检查是否是有效的ECharts配置（包含常见的ECharts字段）
    return (
      typeof parsed === "object" &&
      parsed !== null &&
      (parsed.hasOwnProperty("series") ||
        parsed.hasOwnProperty("xAxis") ||
        parsed.hasOwnProperty("yAxis") ||
        parsed.hasOwnProperty("option") ||
        (parsed.hasOwnProperty("type") && parsed.type === "echarts"))
    )
  } catch {
    return false
  }
}

// 提取ECharts配置
function extractEChartsOption(content: string): EChartsOption | null {
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(content)
    // 如果包含option字段，提取它；否则直接使用解析的对象
    return parsed.option || parsed
  } catch {
    return null
  }
}

const AIGridItemComponent: React.FC<AIGridItemProps> = ({ data, onTogglePin }) => {
  // Soft card style - Scheme A
  const bgColor = useColorModeValue("blue.50", "gray.700")
  const borderColor = useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.600")
  const textColor = useColorModeValue("gray.800", "gray.200")
  const dividerColor = useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.600")
  const codeBgColor = useColorModeValue("#f7fafc", "#2d3748")
  const resultBgColor = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")
  const tableBorderColor = useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.600")
  // Blue theme for table header
  const tableHeaderBg = useColorModeValue("blue.500", "blue.600")
  const tableHeaderTextColor = "white"
  const tableHeaderBorderBottom = useColorModeValue("blue.600", "blue.700")
  const tableRowEvenBg = useColorModeValue("#f9fafb", "#1a202c")
  
  // Font style constants - Arial 12px for non-title/non-header text
  const bodyTextStyle = {
    fontSize: "12px",
    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
  }
  
  // Scrollbar colors for better visibility
  const scrollbarTrackBg = useColorModeValue("#f1f1f1", "#2d3748")
  const scrollbarThumbBg = useColorModeValue("#cbd5e0", "#4a5568")
  const scrollbarThumbHoverBg = useColorModeValue("#a0aec0", "#718096")
  
  // Refs for grid-level horizontal scrollbar
  const gridItemRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
  const gridBottomScrollbarRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
  const scrollContainersRef = useRef<Set<HTMLDivElement>>(new Set())

  const isPinned = data.isPinned || false
  
  console.log("🎨 AIGridItem render:", { 
    itemId: data.i, 
    isPinned, 
    dataIsPinned: data.isPinned,
    timestamp: new Date().toISOString() 
  })
  
  // Border style based on pin state
  const borderWidth = isPinned ? "3px" : "1px"
  const borderColorPinned = "orange.500"
  const finalBorderColor = isPinned ? borderColorPinned : borderColor
  
  console.log("🎨 Border style:", { 
    itemId: data.i,
    isPinned, 
    borderWidth, 
    finalBorderColor,
    borderColorValue: finalBorderColor
  })

  // Grid-level horizontal scrollbar: Find all scroll containers and sync them
  useEffect(() => {
    const gridItem = gridItemRef.current
    const bottomScrollbar = gridBottomScrollbarRef.current
    
    if (!gridItem || !bottomScrollbar) return
    
    // Find all scroll containers and calculate max scroll width
    const updateBottomScrollbar = () => {
      const containers = Array.from(scrollContainersRef.current)
      if (containers.length === 0) return
      
      // Find maximum scrollWidth among all containers
      let maxScrollWidth = 0
      let maxClientWidth = 0
      
      containers.forEach(container => {
        const scrollWidth = container.scrollWidth
        const clientWidth = container.clientWidth
        if (scrollWidth > maxScrollWidth) {
          maxScrollWidth = scrollWidth
        }
        if (clientWidth > maxClientWidth) {
          maxClientWidth = clientWidth
        }
      })
      
      // Only show scrollbar if content overflows
      if (maxScrollWidth > maxClientWidth) {
        bottomScrollbar.style.display = "block"
        
        // Update spacer div width
        let spacer = bottomScrollbar.querySelector('.grid-scrollbar-spacer') as HTMLElement
        if (!spacer) {
          spacer = document.createElement('div')
          spacer.className = 'grid-scrollbar-spacer'
          spacer.style.height = '1px'
          spacer.style.width = '1px'
          spacer.style.minWidth = '1px'
          bottomScrollbar.appendChild(spacer)
        }
        spacer.style.width = `${maxScrollWidth}px`
        spacer.style.minWidth = `${maxScrollWidth}px`
      } else {
        bottomScrollbar.style.display = "none"
      }
    }
    
    // Sync bottom scrollbar when any container scrolls
    const handleContainerScroll = (event: Event) => {
      const target = event.target as HTMLDivElement
      if (!scrollContainersRef.current.has(target)) return
      
      const scrollLeft = target.scrollLeft
      bottomScrollbar.scrollLeft = scrollLeft
      
      // Sync all other containers to the same scroll position
      scrollContainersRef.current.forEach(container => {
        if (container !== target) {
          container.scrollLeft = scrollLeft
        }
      })
    }
    
    // Sync all containers when bottom scrollbar scrolls
    const handleBottomScroll = () => {
      const scrollLeft = bottomScrollbar.scrollLeft
      scrollContainersRef.current.forEach(container => {
        container.scrollLeft = scrollLeft
      })
    }
    
    // Add scroll listeners to all containers
    const containers = Array.from(scrollContainersRef.current)
    containers.forEach(container => {
      container.addEventListener('scroll', handleContainerScroll)
    })
    
    bottomScrollbar.addEventListener('scroll', handleBottomScroll)
    
    // Update on resize
    const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => {
      updateBottomScrollbar()
    })
    containers.forEach(container => {
      resizeObserver.observe(container)
    })
    
    // Initial update
    updateBottomScrollbar()
    
    // Also update after delays
    const timeouts = [
      setTimeout(updateBottomScrollbar, 100),
      setTimeout(updateBottomScrollbar, 300),
      setTimeout(updateBottomScrollbar, 500),
    ]
    
    return () => {
      containers.forEach(container => {
        container.removeEventListener('scroll', handleContainerScroll)
      })
      bottomScrollbar.removeEventListener('scroll', handleBottomScroll)
      resizeObserver.disconnect()
      timeouts.forEach(clearTimeout)
    }
  }, [data.disks.length, data.i])

  return (
    <Box
      ref={gridItemRef}
      w="100%"
      h="100%"
      bg={bgColor}
      borderWidth={borderWidth}
      borderStyle="solid"
      borderColor={finalBorderColor}
      borderRadius="xl"
      p={4}
      pb="20px"
      overflowY="auto"
      overflowX="visible"
      shadow="md"
      position="relative"
      transition="border-width 0.2s, border-color 0.2s"
    >
      {/* Draggable handle - only this area can be used to drag */}
      <Box
        className="grid-drag-handle"
        position="absolute"
        top={0}
        left={0}
        right={0}
        bottom={0}
        cursor="grab"
        _active={{ cursor: "grabbing" }}
        zIndex={1}
      />
      {/* Pin/Unpin Button - Top Right */}
      {(() => {
        if (!onTogglePin) {
          console.warn("⚠️ Pin button not rendered - onTogglePin is missing:", { itemId: data.i })
          return null
        }
        
        console.log("🔘 Pin button rendered:", { itemId: data.i, isPinned, hasOnTogglePin: !!onTogglePin })
        
        return (
          <Box 
            position="absolute" 
            top={2} 
            right={2} 
            zIndex={1001}
            pointerEvents="auto"
            className="grid-pin-button"
            onMouseDown={(e) => {
              // Prevent drag from starting when clicking button
              e.stopPropagation()
              if (e.nativeEvent) {
                e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
              }
            }}
          >
            <Tooltip label={isPinned ? "Unpin" : "Pin"} placement="top">
              <IconButton
                aria-label={isPinned ? "Unpin" : "Pin"}
                icon={isPinned ? <FiLock /> : <FiUnlock />}
                size="sm"
                variant="ghost"
                colorScheme={isPinned ? "orange" : "gray"}
                onMouseDown={(e) => {
                  // Use onMouseDown instead of onClick to avoid drag interception
                  e.preventDefault()
                  e.stopPropagation()
                  if (e.nativeEvent) {
                    e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                  }
                  console.log("🖱️ Pin button mousedown:", { 
                    itemId: data.i, 
                    currentIsPinned: isPinned,
                    hasOnTogglePin: !!onTogglePin,
                    timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
                  })
                  if (onTogglePin) {
                    onTogglePin(data.i)
                  } else {
                    console.error("❌ onTogglePin is undefined!")
                  }
                }}
                onClick={(e) => {
                  // Also handle onClick as fallback
                  e.preventDefault()
                  e.stopPropagation()
                  if (e.nativeEvent) {
                    e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                  }
                  console.log("🖱️ Pin button clicked (fallback):", { 
                    itemId: data.i, 
                    currentIsPinned: isPinned
                  })
                  if (onTogglePin) {
                    onTogglePin(data.i)
                  }
                }}
                _hover={{
                  transform: "scale(1.05)",
                  bg: isPinned ? "orange.100" : "gray.100",
                }}
                transition="all 0.2s"
                borderRadius="md"
              />
            </Tooltip>
          </Box>
        )
      })()}
      <VStack align="stretch" spacing={4} h="100%" position="relative" zIndex={2} minW="0" w="100%">
        {/* Disks Section */}
        <VStack align="stretch" spacing={4} flex="1" overflow="auto">
          {data.disks.length > 0 ? (
            data.disks.map((disk) => (
              <Box key={disk.id} w="100%" minW="0" flexShrink={1}>
                <VStack align="stretch" spacing={2} w="100%" minW="0">
                  {/* Disk Header */}
                  <HStack spacing={2}>
                    <Badge colorScheme="blue" size="sm">
                      DISK
                    </Badge>
                    <Text fontSize="md" fontWeight="semibold" color={textColor}>
                      {disk.name}
                    </Text>
                    {disk.create_time && (
                      <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500">
                        {new Date(disk.create_time).toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
                          year: "numeric",
                          month: "2-digit",
                          day: "2-digit",
                        })}
                      </Text>
                    )}
                  </HStack>

                  {/* Execution Result or Dashboard Charts */}
                  {disk.category === "dashboard" ? (
                    // Dashboard type disk: render charts from requirement
                    <Box
                      w="100%"
                      minW="0"
                      flexShrink={1}
                      p={3}
                      bg={resultBgColor}
                      borderRadius="lg"
                      border="1px solid"
                      borderColor={borderColor}
                    >
                      {disk.dashboardError ? (
                        <Box
                          p={4}
                          bg="red.50"
                          borderRadius="md"
                          border="1px solid"
                          borderColor="red.200"
                        >
                          <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="red.600" fontWeight="medium" mb={1}>
                            Dashboard Error
                          </Text>
                          <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="red.500">
                            {disk.dashboardError}
                          </Text>
                        </Box>
                      ) : disk.dashboardCharts && disk.dashboardCharts.length > 0 ? (
                        <Box
                          w="100%"
                          overflowX="auto"
                          overflowY="hidden"
                          sx={{
                            "&::-webkit-scrollbar": {
                              height: "8px",
                            },
                            "&::-webkit-scrollbar-track": {
                              background: scrollbarTrackBg,
                              borderRadius: "4px",
                            },
                            "&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb": {
                              background: scrollbarThumbBg,
                              borderRadius: "4px",
                              "&:hover": {
                                background: scrollbarThumbHoverBg,
                              },
                            },
                            scrollbarWidth: "thin",
                            scrollbarColor: `${scrollbarThumbBg} ${scrollbarTrackBg}`,
                          }}
                        >
                          <HStack spacing={4} align="flex-start" minW="max-content">
                            {disk.dashboardCharts.map((chart, index) => (
                              <Box
                                key={index}
                                minW="400px"
                                w="400px"
                                flexShrink={0}
                                p={3}
                                bg={useColorModeValue("white", "gray.900")}
                                borderRadius="md"
                                border="1px solid"
                                borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                              >
                                <VStack align="stretch" spacing={2}>
                                  <Tooltip
                                    label={chart.question_title}
                                    placement="top"
                                    hasArrow
                                    bg="gray.700"
                                    color="white"
                                    fontSize="sm"
                                    maxW="400px"
                                    openDelay={300}
                                  >
                                    <Text
                                      fontSize="sm"
                                      fontFamily="Arial, sans-serif"
                                      fontWeight="semibold"
                                      color={textColor}
                                      mb={1}
                                      noOfLines={3}
                                      w="100%"
                                      whiteSpace="normal"
                                      wordBreak="break-word"
                                      lineHeight="1.5"
                                      cursor="help"
                                    >
                                      {chart.question_title}
                                    </Text>
                                  </Tooltip>
                                  <Box h="350px" w="100%">
                                    <ReactECharts
                                      option={chart.echarts_option}
                                      style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
                                      opts={{ renderer: "svg" }}
                                    />
                                  </Box>
                                </VStack>
                              </Box>
                            ))}
                          </HStack>
                        </Box>
                      ) : (
                        <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                          No dashboard charts available
                        </Text>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  ) : disk.latestResult ? (
                    <Box
                      w="100%"
                      minW="0"
                      flexShrink={1}
                      p={3}
                      bg={resultBgColor}
                      borderRadius="lg"
                      border="1px solid"
                      borderColor={borderColor}
                    >
                      <HStack spacing={2} mb={2}>
                        <Badge
                          colorScheme={disk.latestResult.is_processed ? "green" : "yellow"}
                          size="sm"
                        >
                          {disk.latestResult.is_processed ? "Processed" : "Pending"}
                        </Badge>
                        <Text fontSize="xs" color="gray.500">
                          {new Date(disk.latestResult.created_at).toLocaleString("en-US")}
                        </Text>
                      </HStack>

                      {/* Content Rendering */}
                      {disk.latestResult.conclusion_detail ? (
                        (() => {
                          const content = disk.latestResult.conclusion_detail
                          if (isEChartsConfig(content)) {
                            const echartsOption = extractEChartsOption(content)
                            if (echartsOption) {
                              return (
                                <Box w="100%" h="300px" minH="200px">
                                  <ReactECharts
                                    option={echartsOption}
                                    style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
                                    opts={{ renderer: "svg" }}
                                  />
                                </Box>
                              )
                            }
                          }
                          // Render as Markdown with remarkGfm for table support
                          const scrollContainerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
                          const parentContainerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
                          const tableRef = useRef<HTMLTableElement | null>(null)
                          
                          // Register scroll container to global set for grid-level scrollbar
                          useEffect(() => {
                            const scrollContainer = scrollContainerRef.current
                            if (scrollContainer) {
                              scrollContainersRef.current.add(scrollContainer)
                              
                              return () => {
                                scrollContainersRef.current.delete(scrollContainer)
                              }
                            }
                          }, [])
                          
                          // Debug: Check if table overflows container
                          useEffect(() => {
                            const checkOverflow = () => {
                              if (!scrollContainerRef.current) return
                              
                              const container = scrollContainerRef.current
                              // Find all tables within the container (ReactMarkdown may render multiple tables)
                              const tables = container.querySelectorAll('table')
                              
                              if (tables.length === 0) {
                                console.log("📊 Table overflow check: No tables found yet", {
                                  itemId: data.i,
                                  diskId: disk.id,
                                })
                                return
                              }
                              
                              tables.forEach((table, index) => {
                                const containerWidth = container.clientWidth
                                const tableWidth = table.scrollWidth
                                const hasOverflow = tableWidth > containerWidth
                                
                                // Get computed styles
                                const computedStyle = window.getComputedStyle(container)
                                const overflowX = computedStyle.overflowX
                                const overflowY = computedStyle.overflowY
                                
                                // Get parent container styles for debugging
                                const parentElement = container.parentElement
                                const parentComputedStyle = parentElement ? window.getComputedStyle(parentElement) : null
                                
                                // Check if container is being constrained properly
                                // CRITICAL: Use scrollWidth vs clientWidth to check if container is properly constrained
                                // If scrollWidth equals clientWidth, container is constrained. If scrollWidth > clientWidth, content overflows.
                                const containerOffsetWidth = container.offsetWidth
                                const isContainerConstrained = container.scrollWidth <= container.clientWidth + 5 // Allow small margin for rounding
                                const isScrollbarVisible = container.scrollWidth > container.clientWidth
                                
                                console.log(`📊 Table overflow check [Table ${index + 1}]:`, {
                                  itemId: data.i,
                                  diskId: disk.id,
                                  containerWidth,
                                  tableWidth,
                                  hasOverflow,
                                  scrollWidth: container.scrollWidth,
                                  clientWidth: container.clientWidth,
                                  offsetWidth: containerOffsetWidth,
                                  scrollHeight: container.scrollHeight,
                                  containerOverflowX: overflowX,
                                  containerOverflowY: overflowY,
                                  isContainerConstrained,
                                  isScrollbarVisible,
                                  tableOffsetWidth: table.offsetWidth,
                                  tableScrollWidth: table.scrollWidth,
                                  containerStyles: {
                                    display: computedStyle.display,
                                    position: computedStyle.position,
                                    width: computedStyle.width,
                                    maxWidth: computedStyle.maxWidth,
                                    minWidth: computedStyle.minWidth,
                                    boxSizing: computedStyle.boxSizing,
                                    isolation: computedStyle.isolation,
                                    contain: computedStyle.contain,
                                  },
                                  parentStyles: parentComputedStyle ? {
                                    width: parentComputedStyle.width,
                                    maxWidth: parentComputedStyle.maxWidth,
                                    overflow: parentComputedStyle.overflow,
                                    display: parentComputedStyle.display,
                                  } : null,
                                })
                                
                                // Enhanced warnings
                                if (hasOverflow && overflowX === 'visible') {
                                  console.warn("⚠️ Table overflows but container overflowX is 'visible'!", {
                                    itemId: data.i,
                                    diskId: disk.id,
                                    tableIndex: index,
                                  })
                                }
                                
                                if (hasOverflow && !isContainerConstrained) {
                                  console.warn("⚠️ Container is NOT properly constrained! Container is expanding to fit table.", {
                                    itemId: data.i,
                                    diskId: disk.id,
                                    tableIndex: index,
                                    containerOffsetWidth,
                                    containerClientWidth: container.clientWidth,
                                    containerScrollWidth: container.scrollWidth,
                                  })
                                }
                                
                                if (hasOverflow && !isScrollbarVisible) {
                                  console.warn("⚠️ Table overflows but scrollbar is NOT visible!", {
                                    itemId: data.i,
                                    diskId: disk.id,
                                    tableIndex: index,
                                    containerScrollWidth: container.scrollWidth,
                                    containerClientWidth: container.clientWidth,
                                    overflowX,
                                  })
                                }
                              })
                            }
                            
                            // Check immediately
                            checkOverflow()
                            
                            // Check after multiple delays to ensure DOM is fully ready
                            const timeouts = [
                              setTimeout(checkOverflow, 100),
                              setTimeout(checkOverflow, 300),
                              setTimeout(checkOverflow, 500),
                            ]
                            
                            // Also check on resize
                            const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => {
                              checkOverflow()
                            })
                            
                            if (scrollContainerRef.current) {
                              resizeObserver.observe(scrollContainerRef.current)
                              
                              // Also observe all tables when they appear
                              const tableObserver = new MutationObserver(() => {
                                checkOverflow()
                              })
                              
                              tableObserver.observe(scrollContainerRef.current, {
                                childList: true,
                                subtree: true,
                              })
                              
                              return () => {
                                timeouts.forEach(clearTimeout)
                                resizeObserver.disconnect()
                                tableObserver.disconnect()
                              }
                            }
                            
                            return () => {
                              timeouts.forEach(clearTimeout)
                            }
                          }, [content, data.i, disk.id])
                          
                          return (
                            <Box
                              ref={parentContainerRef}
                              w="100%"
                              minW="0"
                              maxW="100%"
                              flexShrink={1}
                              position="relative"
                              overflowX="hidden"
                              overflowY="visible"
                              // Hide horizontal scrollbar area by clipping bottom 17px
                              pb="0px"
                              css={{
                                // Clip bottom 17px to hide horizontal scrollbar area
                                clipPath: "inset(0 0 -17px 0)",
                                marginBottom: "-17px",
                              }}
                            >
                              {/* Wrapper to hide horizontal scrollbar while keeping scroll functionality */}
                              <Box
                                w="100%"
                                minW="0"
                                maxW="100%"
                                overflowX="hidden"
                                overflowY="visible"
                                position="relative"
                              >
                                {/* Table container with horizontal scroll - scrollbars completely hidden */}
                                <Box
                                  ref={scrollContainerRef}
                                  overflowX="scroll"
                                  overflowY="visible"
                                  w="100%"
                                  minW="0"
                                  maxW="100%"
                                  position="relative"
                                  display="block"
                                  css={{
                                    // Completely hide ALL scrollbars on content container (we'll show horizontal scrollbar at grid bottom)
                                    // WebKit browsers (Chrome, Safari, Edge)
                                    "&::-webkit-scrollbar": {
                                      display: "none !important",
                                      width: "0px !important",
                                      height: "0px !important",
                                    },
                                    "&::-webkit-scrollbar:horizontal": {
                                      display: "none !important",
                                      width: "0px !important",
                                      height: "0px !important",
                                    },
                                    "&::-webkit-scrollbar-track": {
                                      display: "none !important",
                                      width: "0px !important",
                                      height: "0px !important",
                                    },
                                    "&::-webkit-scrollbar-track:horizontal": {
                                      display: "none !important",
                                      width: "0px !important",
                                      height: "0px !important",
                                    },
                                    "&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb": {
                                      display: "none !important",
                                      width: "0px !important",
                                      height: "0px !important",
                                    },
                                    "&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:horizontal": {
                                      display: "none !important",
                                      width: "0px !important",
                                      height: "0px !important",
                                    },
                                    // Remove scrollbar gutter to prevent spacing
                                    scrollbarGutter: "unset",
                                  }}
                                sx={{
                                    // Firefox: Hide all scrollbars completely
                                    scrollbarWidth: "none", // Hide all scrollbars in Firefox
                                    scrollbarColor: "transparent transparent", // Make scrollbars invisible
                                "& h1, & h2, & h3, & h4, & h5, & h6": {
                                  fontWeight: "bold",
                                  marginTop: "1rem",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                },
                                "& h1": { fontSize: "1.5rem" },
                                "& h2": { fontSize: "1.3rem" },
                                "& h3": { fontSize: "1.1rem" },
                                "& p": {
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  lineHeight: "1.6",
                                },
                                "& ul, & ol": {
                                  marginLeft: "1.5rem",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                },
                                "& li": {
                                  marginBottom: "0.25rem",
                                },
                                "& code": {
                                  backgroundColor: codeBgColor,
                                  padding: "0.125rem 0.25rem",
                                  borderRadius: "0.25rem",
                                  fontSize: "0.875rem",
                                  fontFamily: "monospace",
                                },
                                "& pre": {
                                  backgroundColor: codeBgColor,
                                  padding: "1rem",
                                  borderRadius: "0.5rem",
                                  overflow: "auto",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                },
                                "& blockquote": {
                                  borderLeft: "4px solid #e2e8f0",
                                  paddingLeft: "1rem",
                                  fontStyle: "italic",
                                  color: "#4a5568",
                                },
                                "& table": {
                                  minWidth: "max-content", // Ensure table doesn't shrink below content width
                                  width: "max-content", // Allow table to exceed container width - CRITICAL for scrolling
                                  borderCollapse: "collapse",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  fontSize: "sm",
                                  display: "table",
                                  tableLayout: "auto",
                                  // Ensure table is not constrained by parent - this is correct for scrolling
                                  boxSizing: "content-box",
                                  // Force table to maintain its natural width
                                  flexShrink: 0,
                                  // CRITICAL: Ensure table can exceed container but container constrains it
                                  maxWidth: "none",
                                },
                                "& th, & td": {
                                  border: "1px solid",
                                  borderColor: tableBorderColor,
                                  padding: "0.5rem",
                                  textAlign: "left",
                                  whiteSpace: "nowrap", // Prevent text wrapping in cells to maintain column width
                                  minWidth: "100px", // Minimum column width
                                  maxWidth: "none", // Remove max-width restrictions
                                },
                                "& th": {
                                  backgroundColor: tableHeaderBg,
                                  color: tableHeaderTextColor,
                                  fontWeight: "bold",
                                  borderBottom: "2px solid",
                                  borderBottomColor: tableHeaderBorderBottom,
                                  fontSize: "sm",
                                  padding: "0.75rem 0.5rem",
                                  minHeight: "2.5rem",
                                  whiteSpace: "nowrap", // Prevent header text wrapping
                                },
                                "& thead": {
                                  display: "table-header-group",
                                },
                                "& tbody": {
                                  display: "table-row-group",
                                },
                                "& tr:nth-of-type(even)": {
                                  backgroundColor: tableRowEvenBg,
                                },
                              }}
                            >
                                <ReactMarkdown 
                                  remarkPlugins={[remarkGfm]}
                                  components={{
                                    table: ({ children, ...props }) => {
                                      return (
                                        <table
                                          ref={(node) => {
                                            if (node) {
                                              tableRef.current = node
                                              // Force re-check overflow after table is rendered
                                              setTimeout(() => {
                                                if (scrollContainerRef.current) {
                                                  const container = scrollContainerRef.current
                                                  const containerWidth = container.clientWidth
                                                  const tableWidth = node.scrollWidth
                                                  console.log("🔍 Table rendered, checking overflow:", {
                                                    itemId: data.i,
                                                    diskId: disk.id,
                                                    containerWidth,
                                                    tableWidth,
                                                    hasOverflow: tableWidth > containerWidth,
                                                  })
                                                }
                                              }, 0)
                                            }
                                          }}
                                          {...props}
                                          style={{
                                            minWidth: "max-content",
                                            width: "max-content",
                                            display: "table",
                                            boxSizing: "content-box",
                                          }}
                                        >
                                          {children}
                                        </table>
                                      )
                                    },
                                  }}
                                >
                                {content}
                                </ReactMarkdown>
                              </Box>
                              </Box>
                            </Box>
                          )
                        })()
                      ) : (
                        <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                          No execution result content
                        </Text>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  ) : (
                    <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                      No execution results available
                    </Text>
                  )}
                </VStack>
              </Box>
            ))
          ) : (
            <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic" textAlign="center" py={4}>
              No disks attached to this application
            </Text>
          )}
        </VStack>
      </VStack>
      {/* Grid-level bottom horizontal scrollbar - always visible at grid bottom */}
      <Box
        ref={gridBottomScrollbarRef}
        position="absolute"
        bottom={0}
        left={0}
        right={0}
        h="16px"
        overflowX="auto"
        overflowY="hidden"
        bg={useColorModeValue("gray.100", "gray.800")}
        zIndex={100}
        w="100%"
        css={{
          scrollbarGutter: "stable",
          "&::-webkit-scrollbar": {
            height: "12px",
          },
          "&::-webkit-scrollbar-track": {
            background: scrollbarTrackBg,
            borderRadius: "6px",
          },
          "&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb": {
            background: scrollbarThumbBg,
            borderRadius: "6px",
            border: `2px solid ${scrollbarTrackBg}`,
            "&:hover": {
              background: scrollbarThumbHoverBg,
            },
          },
          scrollbarWidth: "auto",
          scrollbarColor: `${scrollbarThumbBg} ${scrollbarTrackBg}`,
        }}
      />
    </Box>
  )
}

// Export with React.memo and custom comparison function
export const AIGridItem = React.memo(AIGridItemComponent, (prevProps, nextProps) => {
  const prevIsPinned = prevProps.data?.isPinned || false
  const nextIsPinned = nextProps.data?.isPinned || false
  
  // Always re-render if isPinned changes
  if (prevIsPinned !== nextIsPinned) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: isPinned changed, will re-render", {
      prevIsPinned,
      nextIsPinned,
      itemId: prevProps.data.i,
      prevData: prevProps.data,
      nextData: nextProps.data
    })
    return false // false = should re-render
  }
  
  // Re-render if data reference changes
  if (prevProps.data !== nextProps.data) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: data reference changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i,
      prevIsPinned: prevProps.data?.isPinned,
      nextIsPinned: nextProps.data?.isPinned
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Re-render if onTogglePin reference changes
  if (prevProps.onTogglePin !== nextProps.onTogglePin) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: onTogglePin reference changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Skip re-render if nothing changed
  console.log("⏭️ React.memo: skipping re-render (no changes)", {
    itemId: prevProps.data.i,
    isPinned: prevIsPinned
  })
  return true // true = skip re-render
})

AIGridItem.displayName = "AIGridItem"

```

```typescriptreact
import React, { useRef, useEffect } from "react"
import { Box, VStack, HStack, Text, Badge, Divider, useColorModeValue, IconButton, Tooltip } from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { FiLock, FiUnlock } from "react-icons/fi"
import ReactMarkdown from "react-markdown"
import remarkGfm from "remark-gfm"
import ReactECharts from "echarts-for-react"
import type { EChartsOption } from "echarts"
import { GridItemData, DashboardChart } from "./types"

interface AIGridItemProps {
  data: GridItemData
  onResize?: () => void // Reserved for future use
  onTogglePin?: (itemId: string) => void
}

// 判断是否为有效的ECharts配置
function isEChartsConfig(content: string): boolean {
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(content)
    // 检查是否是有效的ECharts配置（包含常见的ECharts字段）
    return (
      typeof parsed === "object" &&
      parsed !== null &&
      (parsed.hasOwnProperty("series") ||
        parsed.hasOwnProperty("xAxis") ||
        parsed.hasOwnProperty("yAxis") ||
        parsed.hasOwnProperty("option") ||
        (parsed.hasOwnProperty("type") && parsed.type === "echarts"))
    )
  } catch {
    return false
  }
}

// 提取ECharts配置
function extractEChartsOption(content: string): EChartsOption | null {
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(content)
    // 如果包含option字段，提取它；否则直接使用解析的对象
    return parsed.option || parsed
  } catch {
    return null
  }
}

const AIGridItemComponent: React.FC<AIGridItemProps> = ({ data, onTogglePin }) => {
  // Soft card style - Scheme A
  const bgColor = useColorModeValue("blue.50", "gray.700")
  const borderColor = useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.600")
  const textColor = useColorModeValue("gray.800", "gray.200")
  const dividerColor = useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.600")
  const codeBgColor = useColorModeValue("#f7fafc", "#2d3748")
  const resultBgColor = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")
  const tableBorderColor = useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.600")
  // Blue theme for table header
  const tableHeaderBg = useColorModeValue("blue.500", "blue.600")
  const tableHeaderTextColor = "white"
  const tableHeaderBorderBottom = useColorModeValue("blue.600", "blue.700")
  const tableRowEvenBg = useColorModeValue("#f9fafb", "#1a202c")
  
  // Font style constants - Arial 12px for non-title/non-header text
  const bodyTextStyle = {
    fontSize: "12px",
    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
  }
  
  // Scrollbar colors for better visibility
  const scrollbarTrackBg = useColorModeValue("#f1f1f1", "#2d3748")
  const scrollbarThumbBg = useColorModeValue("#cbd5e0", "#4a5568")
  const scrollbarThumbHoverBg = useColorModeValue("#a0aec0", "#718096")
  
  // Refs for grid-level horizontal scrollbar
  const gridItemRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
  const gridBottomScrollbarRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
  const scrollContainersRef = useRef<Set<HTMLDivElement>>(new Set())

  const isPinned = data.isPinned || false
  
  console.log("🎨 AIGridItem render:", { 
    itemId: data.i, 
    isPinned, 
    dataIsPinned: data.isPinned,
    timestamp: new Date().toISOString() 
  })
  
  // Border style based on pin state
  const borderWidth = isPinned ? "3px" : "1px"
  const borderColorPinned = "orange.500"
  const finalBorderColor = isPinned ? borderColorPinned : borderColor
  
  console.log("🎨 Border style:", { 
    itemId: data.i,
    isPinned, 
    borderWidth, 
    finalBorderColor,
    borderColorValue: finalBorderColor
  })

  // Grid-level horizontal scrollbar: Find all scroll containers and sync them
  useEffect(() => {
    const gridItem = gridItemRef.current
    const bottomScrollbar = gridBottomScrollbarRef.current
    
    if (!gridItem || !bottomScrollbar) return
    
    // Find all scroll containers and calculate max scroll width
    const updateBottomScrollbar = () => {
      const containers = Array.from(scrollContainersRef.current)
      if (containers.length === 0) return
      
      // Find maximum scrollWidth among all containers
      let maxScrollWidth = 0
      let maxClientWidth = 0
      
      containers.forEach(container => {
        const scrollWidth = container.scrollWidth
        const clientWidth = container.clientWidth
        if (scrollWidth > maxScrollWidth) {
          maxScrollWidth = scrollWidth
        }
        if (clientWidth > maxClientWidth) {
          maxClientWidth = clientWidth
        }
      })
      
      // Only show scrollbar if content overflows
      if (maxScrollWidth > maxClientWidth) {
        bottomScrollbar.style.display = "block"
        
        // Update spacer div width
        let spacer = bottomScrollbar.querySelector('.grid-scrollbar-spacer') as HTMLElement
        if (!spacer) {
          spacer = document.createElement('div')
          spacer.className = 'grid-scrollbar-spacer'
          spacer.style.height = '1px'
          spacer.style.width = '1px'
          spacer.style.minWidth = '1px'
          bottomScrollbar.appendChild(spacer)
        }
        spacer.style.width = `${maxScrollWidth}px`
        spacer.style.minWidth = `${maxScrollWidth}px`
      } else {
        bottomScrollbar.style.display = "none"
      }
    }
    
    // Sync bottom scrollbar when any container scrolls
    const handleContainerScroll = (event: Event) => {
      const target = event.target as HTMLDivElement
      if (!scrollContainersRef.current.has(target)) return
      
      const scrollLeft = target.scrollLeft
      bottomScrollbar.scrollLeft = scrollLeft
      
      // Sync all other containers to the same scroll position
      scrollContainersRef.current.forEach(container => {
        if (container !== target) {
          container.scrollLeft = scrollLeft
        }
      })
    }
    
    // Sync all containers when bottom scrollbar scrolls
    const handleBottomScroll = () => {
      const scrollLeft = bottomScrollbar.scrollLeft
      scrollContainersRef.current.forEach(container => {
        container.scrollLeft = scrollLeft
      })
    }
    
    // Add scroll listeners to all containers
    const containers = Array.from(scrollContainersRef.current)
    containers.forEach(container => {
      container.addEventListener('scroll', handleContainerScroll)
    })
    
    bottomScrollbar.addEventListener('scroll', handleBottomScroll)
    
    // Update on resize
    const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => {
      updateBottomScrollbar()
    })
    containers.forEach(container => {
      resizeObserver.observe(container)
    })
    
    // Initial update
    updateBottomScrollbar()
    
    // Also update after delays
    const timeouts = [
      setTimeout(updateBottomScrollbar, 100),
      setTimeout(updateBottomScrollbar, 300),
      setTimeout(updateBottomScrollbar, 500),
    ]
    
    return () => {
      containers.forEach(container => {
        container.removeEventListener('scroll', handleContainerScroll)
      })
      bottomScrollbar.removeEventListener('scroll', handleBottomScroll)
      resizeObserver.disconnect()
      timeouts.forEach(clearTimeout)
    }
  }, [data.disks.length, data.i])

  return (
    <Box
      ref={gridItemRef}
      w="100%"
      h="100%"
      bg={bgColor}
      borderWidth={borderWidth}
      borderStyle="solid"
      borderColor={finalBorderColor}
      borderRadius="xl"
      p={4}
      pb="20px"
      overflowY="auto"
      overflowX="visible"
      shadow="md"
      position="relative"
      transition="border-width 0.2s, border-color 0.2s"
    >
      {/* Draggable handle - only this area can be used to drag */}
      <Box
        className="grid-drag-handle"
        position="absolute"
        top={0}
        left={0}
        right={0}
        bottom={0}
        cursor="grab"
        _active={{ cursor: "grabbing" }}
        zIndex={1}
      />
      {/* Pin/Unpin Button - Top Right */}
      {(() => {
        if (!onTogglePin) {
          console.warn("⚠️ Pin button not rendered - onTogglePin is missing:", { itemId: data.i })
          return null
        }
        
        console.log("🔘 Pin button rendered:", { itemId: data.i, isPinned, hasOnTogglePin: !!onTogglePin })
        
        return (
          <Box 
            position="absolute" 
            top={2} 
            right={2} 
            zIndex={1001}
            pointerEvents="auto"
            className="grid-pin-button"
            onMouseDown={(e) => {
              // Prevent drag from starting when clicking button
              e.stopPropagation()
              if (e.nativeEvent) {
                e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
              }
            }}
          >
            <Tooltip label={isPinned ? "Unpin" : "Pin"} placement="top">
              <IconButton
                aria-label={isPinned ? "Unpin" : "Pin"}
                icon={isPinned ? <FiLock /> : <FiUnlock />}
                size="sm"
                variant="ghost"
                colorScheme={isPinned ? "orange" : "gray"}
                onMouseDown={(e) => {
                  // Use onMouseDown instead of onClick to avoid drag interception
                  e.preventDefault()
                  e.stopPropagation()
                  if (e.nativeEvent) {
                    e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                  }
                  console.log("🖱️ Pin button mousedown:", { 
                    itemId: data.i, 
                    currentIsPinned: isPinned,
                    hasOnTogglePin: !!onTogglePin,
                    timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
                  })
                  if (onTogglePin) {
                    onTogglePin(data.i)
                  } else {
                    console.error("❌ onTogglePin is undefined!")
                  }
                }}
                onClick={(e) => {
                  // Also handle onClick as fallback
                  e.preventDefault()
                  e.stopPropagation()
                  if (e.nativeEvent) {
                    e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                  }
                  console.log("🖱️ Pin button clicked (fallback):", { 
                    itemId: data.i, 
                    currentIsPinned: isPinned
                  })
                  if (onTogglePin) {
                    onTogglePin(data.i)
                  }
                }}
                _hover={{
                  transform: "scale(1.05)",
                  bg: isPinned ? "orange.100" : "gray.100",
                }}
                transition="all 0.2s"
                borderRadius="md"
              />
            </Tooltip>
          </Box>
        )
      })()}
      <VStack align="stretch" spacing={4} h="100%" position="relative" zIndex={2} minW="0" w="100%">
        {/* Disks Section */}
        <VStack align="stretch" spacing={4} flex="1" overflow="auto">
          {data.disks.length > 0 ? (
            data.disks.map((disk) => (
              <Box key={disk.id} w="100%" minW="0" flexShrink={1}>
                <VStack align="stretch" spacing={2} w="100%" minW="0">
                  {/* Disk Header */}
                  <HStack spacing={2}>
                    <Badge colorScheme="blue" size="sm">
                      DISK
                    </Badge>
                    <Text fontSize="md" fontWeight="semibold" color={textColor}>
                      {disk.name}
                    </Text>
                    {disk.create_time && (
                      <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500">
                        {new Date(disk.create_time).toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
                          year: "numeric",
                          month: "2-digit",
                          day: "2-digit",
                        })}
                      </Text>
                    )}
                  </HStack>

                  {/* Execution Result or Dashboard Charts */}
                  {disk.category === "dashboard" ? (
                    // Dashboard type disk: render charts from requirement
                    <Box
                      w="100%"
                      minW="0"
                      flexShrink={1}
                      p={3}
                      bg={resultBgColor}
                      borderRadius="lg"
                      border="1px solid"
                      borderColor={borderColor}
                    >
                      {disk.dashboardError ? (
                        <Box
                          p={4}
                          bg="red.50"
                          borderRadius="md"
                          border="1px solid"
                          borderColor="red.200"
                        >
                          <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="red.600" fontWeight="medium" mb={1}>
                            Dashboard Error
                          </Text>
                          <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="red.500">
                            {disk.dashboardError}
                          </Text>
                        </Box>
                      ) : disk.dashboardCharts && disk.dashboardCharts.length > 0 ? (
                        <Box
                          w="100%"
                          overflowX="auto"
                          overflowY="hidden"
                          sx={{
                            "&::-webkit-scrollbar": {
                              height: "8px",
                            },
                            "&::-webkit-scrollbar-track": {
                              background: scrollbarTrackBg,
                              borderRadius: "4px",
                            },
                            "&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb": {
                              background: scrollbarThumbBg,
                              borderRadius: "4px",
                              "&:hover": {
                                background: scrollbarThumbHoverBg,
                              },
                            },
                            scrollbarWidth: "thin",
                            scrollbarColor: `${scrollbarThumbBg} ${scrollbarTrackBg}`,
                          }}
                        >
                          <HStack spacing={4} align="flex-start" minW="max-content">
                            {disk.dashboardCharts.map((chart, index) => (
                              <Box
                                key={index}
                                minW="400px"
                                w="400px"
                                flexShrink={0}
                                p={3}
                                bg={useColorModeValue("white", "gray.900")}
                                borderRadius="md"
                                border="1px solid"
                                borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                              >
                                <VStack align="stretch" spacing={2}>
                                  <Tooltip
                                    label={chart.question_title}
                                    placement="top"
                                    hasArrow
                                    bg="gray.700"
                                    color="white"
                                    fontSize="sm"
                                    maxW="400px"
                                    openDelay={300}
                                  >
                                    <Text
                                      fontSize="sm"
                                      fontFamily="Arial, sans-serif"
                                      fontWeight="semibold"
                                      color={textColor}
                                      mb={1}
                                      noOfLines={3}
                                      w="100%"
                                      whiteSpace="normal"
                                      wordBreak="break-word"
                                      lineHeight="1.5"
                                      cursor="help"
                                    >
                                      {chart.question_title}
                                    </Text>
                                  </Tooltip>
                                  <Box h="350px" w="100%">
                                    <ReactECharts
                                      option={chart.echarts_option}
                                      style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
                                      opts={{ renderer: "svg" }}
                                    />
                                  </Box>
                                </VStack>
                              </Box>
                            ))}
                          </HStack>
                        </Box>
                      ) : (
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                          No dashboard charts available
                        </Text>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  ) : disk.latestResult ? (
                    <Box
                      w="100%"
                      minW="0"
                      flexShrink={1}
                      p={3}
                      bg={resultBgColor}
                      borderRadius="lg"
                      border="1px solid"
                      borderColor={borderColor}
                    >
                      <HStack spacing={2} mb={2}>
                        <Badge
                          colorScheme={disk.latestResult.is_processed ? "green" : "yellow"}
                          size="sm"
                        >
                          {disk.latestResult.is_processed ? "Processed" : "Pending"}
                        </Badge>
                        <Text fontSize="xs" color="gray.500">
                          {new Date(disk.latestResult.created_at).toLocaleString("en-US")}
                        </Text>
                      </HStack>

                      {/* Content Rendering */}
                      {disk.latestResult.conclusion_detail ? (
                        (() => {
                          const content = disk.latestResult.conclusion_detail
                          if (isEChartsConfig(content)) {
                            const echartsOption = extractEChartsOption(content)
                            if (echartsOption) {
                              return (
                                <Box w="100%" h="300px" minH="200px">
                                  <ReactECharts
                                    option={echartsOption}
                                    style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
                                    opts={{ renderer: "svg" }}
                                  />
                                </Box>
                              )
                            }
                          }
                          // Render as Markdown with remarkGfm for table support
                          const scrollContainerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
                          const parentContainerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
                          const tableRef = useRef<HTMLTableElement | null>(null)
                          
                          // Register scroll container to global set for grid-level scrollbar
                          useEffect(() => {
                            const scrollContainer = scrollContainerRef.current
                            if (scrollContainer) {
                              scrollContainersRef.current.add(scrollContainer)
                              
                              return () => {
                                scrollContainersRef.current.delete(scrollContainer)
                              }
                            }
                          }, [])
                          
                          // Debug: Check if table overflows container
                          useEffect(() => {
                            const checkOverflow = () => {
                              if (!scrollContainerRef.current) return
                              
                              const container = scrollContainerRef.current
                              // Find all tables within the container (ReactMarkdown may render multiple tables)
                              const tables = container.querySelectorAll('table')
                              
                              if (tables.length === 0) {
                                console.log("📊 Table overflow check: No tables found yet", {
                                  itemId: data.i,
                                  diskId: disk.id,
                                })
                                return
                              }
                              
                              tables.forEach((table, index) => {
                                const containerWidth = container.clientWidth
                                const tableWidth = table.scrollWidth
                                const hasOverflow = tableWidth > containerWidth
                                
                                // Get computed styles
                                const computedStyle = window.getComputedStyle(container)
                                const overflowX = computedStyle.overflowX
                                const overflowY = computedStyle.overflowY
                                
                                // Get parent container styles for debugging
                                const parentElement = container.parentElement
                                const parentComputedStyle = parentElement ? window.getComputedStyle(parentElement) : null
                                
                                // Check if container is being constrained properly
                                // CRITICAL: Use scrollWidth vs clientWidth to check if container is properly constrained
                                // If scrollWidth equals clientWidth, container is constrained. If scrollWidth > clientWidth, content overflows.
                                const containerOffsetWidth = container.offsetWidth
                                const isContainerConstrained = container.scrollWidth <= container.clientWidth + 5 // Allow small margin for rounding
                                const isScrollbarVisible = container.scrollWidth > container.clientWidth
                                
                                console.log(`📊 Table overflow check [Table ${index + 1}]:`, {
                                  itemId: data.i,
                                  diskId: disk.id,
                                  containerWidth,
                                  tableWidth,
                                  hasOverflow,
                                  scrollWidth: container.scrollWidth,
                                  clientWidth: container.clientWidth,
                                  offsetWidth: containerOffsetWidth,
                                  scrollHeight: container.scrollHeight,
                                  containerOverflowX: overflowX,
                                  containerOverflowY: overflowY,
                                  isContainerConstrained,
                                  isScrollbarVisible,
                                  tableOffsetWidth: table.offsetWidth,
                                  tableScrollWidth: table.scrollWidth,
                                  containerStyles: {
                                    display: computedStyle.display,
                                    position: computedStyle.position,
                                    width: computedStyle.width,
                                    maxWidth: computedStyle.maxWidth,
                                    minWidth: computedStyle.minWidth,
                                    boxSizing: computedStyle.boxSizing,
                                    isolation: computedStyle.isolation,
                                    contain: computedStyle.contain,
                                  },
                                  parentStyles: parentComputedStyle ? {
                                    width: parentComputedStyle.width,
                                    maxWidth: parentComputedStyle.maxWidth,
                                    overflow: parentComputedStyle.overflow,
                                    display: parentComputedStyle.display,
                                  } : null,
                                })
                                
                                // Enhanced warnings
                                if (hasOverflow && overflowX === 'visible') {
                                  console.warn("⚠️ Table overflows but container overflowX is 'visible'!", {
                                    itemId: data.i,
                                    diskId: disk.id,
                                    tableIndex: index,
                                  })
                                }
                                
                                if (hasOverflow && !isContainerConstrained) {
                                  console.warn("⚠️ Container is NOT properly constrained! Container is expanding to fit table.", {
                                    itemId: data.i,
                                    diskId: disk.id,
                                    tableIndex: index,
                                    containerOffsetWidth,
                                    containerClientWidth: container.clientWidth,
                                    containerScrollWidth: container.scrollWidth,
                                  })
                                }
                                
                                if (hasOverflow && !isScrollbarVisible) {
                                  console.warn("⚠️ Table overflows but scrollbar is NOT visible!", {
                                    itemId: data.i,
                                    diskId: disk.id,
                                    tableIndex: index,
                                    containerScrollWidth: container.scrollWidth,
                                    containerClientWidth: container.clientWidth,
                                    overflowX,
                                  })
                                }
                              })
                            }
                            
                            // Check immediately
                            checkOverflow()
                            
                            // Check after multiple delays to ensure DOM is fully ready
                            const timeouts = [
                              setTimeout(checkOverflow, 100),
                              setTimeout(checkOverflow, 300),
                              setTimeout(checkOverflow, 500),
                            ]
                            
                            // Also check on resize
                            const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => {
                              checkOverflow()
                            })
                            
                            if (scrollContainerRef.current) {
                              resizeObserver.observe(scrollContainerRef.current)
                              
                              // Also observe all tables when they appear
                              const tableObserver = new MutationObserver(() => {
                                checkOverflow()
                              })
                              
                              tableObserver.observe(scrollContainerRef.current, {
                                childList: true,
                                subtree: true,
                              })
                              
                              return () => {
                                timeouts.forEach(clearTimeout)
                                resizeObserver.disconnect()
                                tableObserver.disconnect()
                              }
                            }
                            
                            return () => {
                              timeouts.forEach(clearTimeout)
                            }
                          }, [content, data.i, disk.id])
                          
                          return (
                            <Box
                              ref={parentContainerRef}
                              w="100%"
                              minW="0"
                              maxW="100%"
                              flexShrink={1}
                              position="relative"
                              overflowX="hidden"
                              overflowY="visible"
                              // Hide horizontal scrollbar area by clipping bottom 17px
                              pb="0px"
                              css={{
                                // Clip bottom 17px to hide horizontal scrollbar area
                                clipPath: "inset(0 0 -17px 0)",
                                marginBottom: "-17px",
                              }}
                            >
                              {/* Wrapper to hide horizontal scrollbar while keeping scroll functionality */}
                              <Box
                                w="100%"
                                minW="0"
                                maxW="100%"
                                overflowX="hidden"
                                overflowY="visible"
                                position="relative"
                              >
                                {/* Table container with horizontal scroll - scrollbars completely hidden */}
                                <Box
                                  ref={scrollContainerRef}
                                  overflowX="scroll"
                                  overflowY="visible"
                                  w="100%"
                                  minW="0"
                                  maxW="100%"
                                  position="relative"
                                  display="block"
                                  css={{
                                    // Completely hide ALL scrollbars on content container (we'll show horizontal scrollbar at grid bottom)
                                    // WebKit browsers (Chrome, Safari, Edge)
                                    "&::-webkit-scrollbar": {
                                      display: "none !important",
                                      width: "0px !important",
                                      height: "0px !important",
                                    },
                                    "&::-webkit-scrollbar:horizontal": {
                                      display: "none !important",
                                      width: "0px !important",
                                      height: "0px !important",
                                    },
                                    "&::-webkit-scrollbar-track": {
                                      display: "none !important",
                                      width: "0px !important",
                                      height: "0px !important",
                                    },
                                    "&::-webkit-scrollbar-track:horizontal": {
                                      display: "none !important",
                                      width: "0px !important",
                                      height: "0px !important",
                                    },
                                    "&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb": {
                                      display: "none !important",
                                      width: "0px !important",
                                      height: "0px !important",
                                    },
                                    "&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:horizontal": {
                                      display: "none !important",
                                      width: "0px !important",
                                      height: "0px !important",
                                    },
                                    // Remove scrollbar gutter to prevent spacing
                                    scrollbarGutter: "unset",
                                  }}
                                sx={{
                                    // Firefox: Hide all scrollbars completely
                                    scrollbarWidth: "none", // Hide all scrollbars in Firefox
                                    scrollbarColor: "transparent transparent", // Make scrollbars invisible
                                "& h1, & h2, & h3, & h4, & h5, & h6": {
                                  fontWeight: "bold",
                                  marginTop: "1rem",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                },
                                "& h1": { fontSize: "1.5rem" },
                                "& h2": { fontSize: "1.3rem" },
                                "& h3": { fontSize: "1.1rem" },
                                "& p": {
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  lineHeight: "1.6",
                                },
                                "& ul, & ol": {
                                  marginLeft: "1.5rem",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                },
                                "& li": {
                                  marginBottom: "0.25rem",
                                },
                                "& code": {
                                  backgroundColor: codeBgColor,
                                  padding: "0.125rem 0.25rem",
                                  borderRadius: "0.25rem",
                                  fontSize: "0.875rem",
                                  fontFamily: "monospace",
                                },
                                "& pre": {
                                  backgroundColor: codeBgColor,
                                  padding: "1rem",
                                  borderRadius: "0.5rem",
                                  overflow: "auto",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                },
                                "& blockquote": {
                                  borderLeft: "4px solid #e2e8f0",
                                  paddingLeft: "1rem",
                                  fontStyle: "italic",
                                  color: "#4a5568",
                                },
                                "& table": {
                                  minWidth: "max-content", // Ensure table doesn't shrink below content width
                                  width: "max-content", // Allow table to exceed container width - CRITICAL for scrolling
                                  borderCollapse: "collapse",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  fontSize: "sm",
                                  display: "table",
                                  tableLayout: "auto",
                                  // Ensure table is not constrained by parent - this is correct for scrolling
                                  boxSizing: "content-box",
                                  // Force table to maintain its natural width
                                  flexShrink: 0,
                                  // CRITICAL: Ensure table can exceed container but container constrains it
                                  maxWidth: "none",
                                },
                                "& th, & td": {
                                  border: "1px solid",
                                  borderColor: tableBorderColor,
                                  padding: "0.5rem",
                                  textAlign: "left",
                                  whiteSpace: "nowrap", // Prevent text wrapping in cells to maintain column width
                                  minWidth: "100px", // Minimum column width
                                  maxWidth: "none", // Remove max-width restrictions
                                },
                                "& th": {
                                  backgroundColor: tableHeaderBg,
                                  color: tableHeaderTextColor,
