```typescriptreact
          if (cell && cell.props && cell.props.children !== undefined) {
            const cellContent = extractTextContent(cell.props.children)
            row.push(cellContent.trim())
          }
        }
        
        // 处理 children（td 或 th）
        if (element.props && element.props.children !== undefined) {
          const cellChildren = Array.isArray(element.props.children) 
            ? element.props.children 
            : element.props.children !== null ? [element.props.children] : []
          cellChildren.forEach(processCell)
        }
        
        if (row.length > 0) {
          rows.push(row)
        }
        return // 找到 tr 后不再递归，避免重复处理
      }
      
      // 如果是 thead 或 tbody，递归处理其子元素
      if (typeName === 'thead' || typeName === 'tbody') {
        if (element.props && element.props.children !== undefined) {
          const childElements = Array.isArray(element.props.children)
            ? element.props.children
            : element.props.children !== null ? [element.props.children] : []
          childElements.forEach(processElement)
        }
        return
      }
      
      // 其他元素递归处理子元素
      if (element.props && element.props.children !== undefined) {
        const childElements = Array.isArray(element.props.children)
          ? element.props.children
          : element.props.children !== null ? [element.props.children] : []
        childElements.forEach(processElement)
      }
    }
    
    // 处理数组
    if (Array.isArray(element)) {
      element.forEach(processElement)
    }
  }
  
  if (!tableChildren) return rows
  
  const childArray = Array.isArray(tableChildren) ? tableChildren : [tableChildren]
  childArray.forEach(processElement)
  
  return rows
}

// 提取文本内容：从 React 节点中提取纯文本
function extractTextContent(node: React.ReactNode): string {
  if (typeof node === 'string' || typeof node === 'number') {
    return String(node)
  }
  
  if (Array.isArray(node)) {
    return node.map(extractTextContent).join('')
  }
  
  if (node && typeof node === 'object' && 'props' in node) {
    if (node.props && node.props.children) {
      return extractTextContent(node.props.children)
    }
  }
  
  return ''
}

// 转置表格数据：行变列，列变行
function transposeTable(data: string[][]): string[][] {
  if (data.length === 0) return []
  
  const maxCols = Math.max(...data.map(row => row.length))
  const transposed: string[][] = []
  
  for (let col = 0; col < maxCols; col++) {
    const newRow: string[] = []
    for (let row = 0; row < data.length; row++) {
      newRow.push(data[row][col] || '')
    }
    transposed.push(newRow)
  }
  
  return transposed
}

const AIGridItemComponent: React.FC<AIGridItemProps> = ({ data, onTogglePin }) => {
  // Soft card style - Scheme A
  const bgColor = useColorModeValue("blue.50", "gray.700")
  const borderColor = useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.600")
  const textColor = useColorModeValue("gray.800", "gray.200")
  const codeBgColor = useColorModeValue("#f7fafc", "#2d3748")
  const resultBgColor = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")
  const tableBorderColor = useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.600")
  // Blue theme for table header
  const tableHeaderBg = useColorModeValue("blue.500", "blue.600")
  const tableHeaderTextColor = "white"
  const tableHeaderBorderBottom = useColorModeValue("blue.600", "blue.700")
  const tableRowEvenBg = useColorModeValue("#f9fafb", "#1a202c")
  
  // Font style constants - Arial 12px for non-title/non-header text
  const bodyTextStyle = {
    fontSize: "12px",
    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
  }
  
  // Font style constants - Arial 14px for all titles/headers
  const titleTextStyle = {
    fontSize: "14px",
    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
  }
  
  // Scrollbar colors for better visibility
  const scrollbarTrackBg = useColorModeValue("#f1f1f1", "#2d3748")
  const scrollbarThumbBg = useColorModeValue("#cbd5e0", "#4a5568")
  const scrollbarThumbHoverBg = useColorModeValue("#a0aec0", "#718096")
  
  // Refs for grid item
  const gridItemRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)

  const isPinned = data.isPinned || false
  
  console.log("🎨 AIGridItem render:", { 
    itemId: data.i, 
    isPinned, 
    dataIsPinned: data.isPinned,
    timestamp: new Date().toISOString() 
  })
  
  // Border style based on pin state
  const borderWidth = isPinned ? "3px" : "1px"
  const borderColorPinned = "orange.500"
  const finalBorderColor = isPinned ? borderColorPinned : borderColor
  
  console.log("🎨 Border style:", { 
    itemId: data.i,
    isPinned, 
    borderWidth, 
    finalBorderColor,
    borderColorValue: finalBorderColor
  })


  return (
    <Box
      ref={gridItemRef}
      w="100%"
      h="100%"
      bg={bgColor}
      borderWidth={borderWidth}
      borderStyle="solid"
      borderColor={finalBorderColor}
      borderRadius="xl"
      p={4}
      pb="20px"
      overflowY="auto"
      overflowX="visible"
      shadow="md"
      position="relative"
      transition="border-width 0.2s, border-color 0.2s"
    >
      {/* Draggable handle - only this area can be used to drag */}
      <Box
        className="grid-drag-handle"
        position="absolute"
        top={0}
        left={0}
        right={0}
        bottom={0}
        cursor="grab"
        _active={{ cursor: "grabbing" }}
        zIndex={1}
      />
      {/* Pin/Unpin Button - Top Right */}
      {(() => {
        if (!onTogglePin) {
          console.warn("⚠️ Pin button not rendered - onTogglePin is missing:", { itemId: data.i })
          return null
        }
        
        console.log("🔘 Pin button rendered:", { itemId: data.i, isPinned, hasOnTogglePin: !!onTogglePin })
        
        return (
          <Box 
            position="absolute" 
            top={2} 
            right={2} 
            zIndex={1001}
            pointerEvents="auto"
            className="grid-pin-button"
            onMouseDown={(e) => {
              // Prevent drag from starting when clicking button
              e.stopPropagation()
              if (e.nativeEvent) {
                e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
              }
            }}
          >
            <Tooltip label={isPinned ? "Unpin" : "Pin"} placement="top">
              <IconButton
                aria-label={isPinned ? "Unpin" : "Pin"}
                icon={isPinned ? <FiLock /> : <FiUnlock />}
                size="sm"
                variant="ghost"
                colorScheme={isPinned ? "orange" : "gray"}
                onMouseDown={(e) => {
                  // Use onMouseDown instead of onClick to avoid drag interception
                  e.preventDefault()
                  e.stopPropagation()
                  if (e.nativeEvent) {
                    e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                  }
                  console.log("🖱️ Pin button mousedown:", { 
                    itemId: data.i, 
                    currentIsPinned: isPinned,
                    hasOnTogglePin: !!onTogglePin,
                    timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
                  })
                  if (onTogglePin) {
                    onTogglePin(data.i)
                  } else {
                    console.error("❌ onTogglePin is undefined!")
                  }
                }}
                onClick={(e) => {
                  // Also handle onClick as fallback
                  e.preventDefault()
                  e.stopPropagation()
                  if (e.nativeEvent) {
                    e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                  }
                  console.log("🖱️ Pin button clicked (fallback):", { 
                    itemId: data.i, 
                    currentIsPinned: isPinned
                  })
                  if (onTogglePin) {
                    onTogglePin(data.i)
                  }
                }}
                _hover={{
                  transform: "scale(1.05)",
                  bg: isPinned ? "orange.100" : "gray.100",
                }}
                transition="all 0.2s"
                borderRadius="md"
              />
            </Tooltip>
          </Box>
        )
      })()}
      <VStack align="stretch" spacing={4} h="100%" position="relative" zIndex={2} minW="0" w="100%">
        {/* Disks Section */}
        <VStack align="stretch" spacing={4} flex="1" overflow="auto">
          {data.disks.length > 0 ? (
            data.disks.map((disk) => (
              <Box key={disk.id} w="100%" minW="0" flexShrink={1}>
                <VStack align="stretch" spacing={2} w="100%" minW="0">
                  {/* Disk Header */}
                  <HStack spacing={2}>
                    <Badge colorScheme="blue" size="sm">
                      DISK
                    </Badge>
                    <Text {...titleTextStyle} fontWeight="semibold" color={textColor}>
                      {disk.name}
                    </Text>
                    {disk.create_time && (
                      <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500">
                        {new Date(disk.create_time).toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
                          year: "numeric",
                          month: "2-digit",
                          day: "2-digit",
                        })}
                      </Text>
                    )}
                  </HStack>

                  {/* Execution Result or Dashboard Charts */}
                  {disk.category === "dashboard" ? (
                    // Dashboard type disk: render charts from requirement
                    <Box
                      w="100%"
                      minW="0"
                      flexShrink={1}
                      p={3}
                      bg={resultBgColor}
                      borderRadius="lg"
                      border="1px solid"
                      borderColor={borderColor}
                    >
                      {disk.dashboardError ? (
                        <Box
                          p={4}
                          bg="red.50"
                          borderRadius="md"
                          border="1px solid"
                          borderColor="red.200"
                        >
                          <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="red.600" fontWeight="medium" mb={1}>
                            Dashboard Error
                          </Text>
                          <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="red.500">
                            {disk.dashboardError}
                          </Text>
                        </Box>
                      ) : disk.dashboardCharts && disk.dashboardCharts.length > 0 ? (
                        <Box
                          w="100%"
                          overflowX="auto"
                          overflowY="hidden"
                          sx={{
                            "&::-webkit-scrollbar": {
                              height: "8px",
                            },
                            "&::-webkit-scrollbar-track": {
                              background: scrollbarTrackBg,
                              borderRadius: "4px",
                            },
                            "&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb": {
                              background: scrollbarThumbBg,
                              borderRadius: "4px",
                              "&:hover": {
                                background: scrollbarThumbHoverBg,
                              },
                            },
                            scrollbarWidth: "thin",
                            scrollbarColor: `${scrollbarThumbBg} ${scrollbarTrackBg}`,
                          }}
                        >
                          <HStack spacing={4} align="flex-start" minW="max-content">
                            {disk.dashboardCharts.map((chart, index) => (
                              <Box
                                key={index}
                                minW="400px"
                                w="400px"
                                flexShrink={0}
                                p={3}
                                bg={useColorModeValue("white", "gray.900")}
                                borderRadius="md"
                                border="1px solid"
                                borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                              >
                                <VStack align="stretch" spacing={2}>
                                  <Tooltip
                                    label={chart.question_title}
                                    placement="top"
                                    hasArrow
                                    bg="gray.700"
                                    color="white"
                                    fontSize="sm"
                                    maxW="400px"
                                    openDelay={300}
                                  >
                                    <Text
                                      {...titleTextStyle}
                                      fontWeight="semibold"
                                      color={textColor}
                                      mb={1}
                                      noOfLines={3}
                                      w="100%"
                                      whiteSpace="normal"
                                      wordBreak="break-word"
                                      lineHeight="1.5"
                                      cursor="help"
                                    >
                                      {chart.question_title}
                                    </Text>
                                  </Tooltip>
                                  <Box h="350px" w="100%">
                                    <ReactECharts
                                      option={chart.echarts_option}
                                      style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
                                      opts={{ renderer: "svg" }}
                                    />
                                  </Box>
                                </VStack>
                              </Box>
                            ))}
                          </HStack>
                        </Box>
                      ) : (
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                          No dashboard charts available
                        </Text>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  ) : disk.latestResult ? (
                    <Box
                      w="100%"
                      minW="0"
                      flexShrink={1}
                      p={3}
                      bg={resultBgColor}
                      borderRadius="lg"
                      border="1px solid"
                      borderColor={borderColor}
                    >
                      <HStack spacing={2} mb={2}>
                        <Badge
                          colorScheme={disk.latestResult.is_processed ? "green" : "yellow"}
                          size="sm"
                          fontSize="12px"
                          fontFamily="Arial, sans-serif"
                        >
                          {disk.latestResult.is_processed ? "Processed" : "Pending"}
                        </Badge>
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500">
                          {new Date(disk.latestResult.created_at).toLocaleString("en-US")}
                        </Text>
                      </HStack>

                      {/* Content Rendering */}
                      {disk.latestResult.conclusion_detail ? (
                        (() => {
                          const content = disk.latestResult.conclusion_detail
                          if (isEChartsConfig(content)) {
                            const echartsOption = extractEChartsOption(content)
                            if (echartsOption) {
                              return (
                                <Box w="100%" h="300px" minH="200px">
                                  <ReactECharts
                                    option={echartsOption}
                                    style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
                                    opts={{ renderer: "svg" }}
                                  />
                                </Box>
                              )
                            }
                          }
                          // Render as Markdown with remarkGfm for table support
                          const tableRef = useRef<HTMLTableElement | null>(null)
                          
                          return (
                            <Box
                              w="100%"
                              minW="0"
                              maxW="100%"
                              flexShrink={1}
                              position="relative"
                              overflowX="hidden"
                              overflowY="visible"
                            >
                              {/* Table container - adaptive width */}
                              <Box
                                w="100%"
                                minW="0"
                                maxW="100%"
                                overflowX="hidden"
                                overflowY="visible"
                                position="relative"
                                display="block"
                                sx={{
                                "& h1, & h2, & h3, & h4, & h5, & h6": {
                                  fontWeight: "bold",
                                  marginTop: "1rem",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  fontSize: "14px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& p": {
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  lineHeight: "1.6",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& ul, & ol": {
                                  marginLeft: "1.5rem",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& li": {
                                  marginBottom: "0.25rem",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& code": {
                                  backgroundColor: codeBgColor,
                                  padding: "0.125rem 0.25rem",
                                  borderRadius: "0.25rem",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, monospace",
                                },
                                "& pre": {
                                  backgroundColor: codeBgColor,
                                  padding: "1rem",
                                  borderRadius: "0.5rem",
                                  overflow: "auto",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, monospace",
                                },
                                "& blockquote": {
                                  borderLeft: "4px solid #e2e8f0",
                                  paddingLeft: "1rem",
                                  fontStyle: "italic",
                                  color: "#4a5568",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& table": {
                                  width: "100%", // Adaptive to container width
                                  borderCollapse: "collapse",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  fontSize: "sm",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  display: "table",
                                  tableLayout: "auto", // Auto layout for better text wrapping
                                  boxSizing: "border-box",
                                },
                                "& th, & td": {
                                  border: "1px solid",
                                  borderColor: tableBorderColor,
                                  padding: "0.5rem",
                                  textAlign: "left",
                                  whiteSpace: "normal", // Allow text wrapping in cells
                                  wordWrap: "break-word", // Break long words
                                  overflowWrap: "break-word", // Break words when necessary
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& th": {
                                  backgroundColor: tableHeaderBg,
                                  color: tableHeaderTextColor,
                                  fontWeight: "bold",
                                  borderBottom: "2px solid",
                                  borderBottomColor: tableHeaderBorderBottom,
                                  fontSize: "14px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  padding: "0.75rem 0.5rem",
                                  minHeight: "2.5rem",
                                  whiteSpace: "normal", // Allow header text wrapping
                                  wordWrap: "break-word",
                                  overflowWrap: "break-word",
                                },
                                "& td": {
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& thead": {
                                  display: "table-header-group",
                                },
                                "& tbody": {
                                  display: "table-row-group",
                                },
                                "& tr:nth-of-type(even)": {
                                  backgroundColor: tableRowEvenBg,
                                },
                              }}
                            >
                                <ReactMarkdown 
                                  remarkPlugins={[remarkGfm]}
                                  components={{
                                    table: ({ children, ...props }) => {
                                      // Extract table data from children
                                      const tableData = extractTableData(children)
                                      
                                      // Transpose the table data
                                      const transposedData = transposeTable(tableData)
                                      
                                      // Build transposed table structure
                                      if (transposedData.length === 0) {
                                        return (
                                          <table
                                            {...props}
                                          style={{
                                            width: "100%",
                                            display: "table",
                                            boxSizing: "border-box",
                                          }}
                                          >
                                            {children}
                                          </table>
                                        )
                                      }
                                      
                                      // First row becomes header row
                                      const headerRow = transposedData[0] || []
                                      const dataRows = transposedData.slice(1)
                                      
                                      return (
                                        <table
                                          ref={(node) => {
                                            if (node) {
                                              tableRef.current = node
                                            }
                                          }}
                                          {...props}
                                          style={{
                                            width: "100%",
                                            display: "table",
                                            boxSizing: "border-box",
                                          }}
                                        >
                                          <thead>
                                            <tr>
                                              {headerRow.map((cell, index) => (
                                                <th key={index}>{cell}</th>
                                              ))}
                                            </tr>
                                          </thead>
                                          <tbody>
                                            {dataRows.map((row, rowIndex) => (
                                              <tr key={rowIndex}>
                                                {row.map((cell, cellIndex) => (
                                                  <td key={cellIndex}>{cell}</td>
                                                ))}
                                              </tr>
                                            ))}
                                          </tbody>
                                        </table>
                                      )
                                    },
                                  }}
                                >
                                {content}
                                </ReactMarkdown>
                              </Box>
                            </Box>
                          )
                        })()
                          ) : (
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                          No execution result content
                        </Text>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  ) : (
                    <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                      No execution results available
                    </Text>
                  )}
                </VStack>
              </Box>
            ))
          ) : (
            <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic" textAlign="center" py={4}>
              No disks attached to this application
            </Text>
          )}
        </VStack>
      </VStack>
    </Box>
  )
}

// Export with React.memo and custom comparison function
export const AIGridItem = React.memo(AIGridItemComponent, (prevProps, nextProps) => {
  const prevIsPinned = prevProps.data?.isPinned || false
  const nextIsPinned = nextProps.data?.isPinned || false
  
  // Always re-render if isPinned changes
  if (prevIsPinned !== nextIsPinned) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: isPinned changed, will re-render", {
      prevIsPinned,
      nextIsPinned,
      itemId: prevProps.data.i,
      prevData: prevProps.data,
      nextData: nextProps.data
    })
    return false // false = should re-render
  }
  
  // Re-render if data reference changes
  if (prevProps.data !== nextProps.data) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: data reference changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i,
      prevIsPinned: prevProps.data?.isPinned,
      nextIsPinned: nextProps.data?.isPinned
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Re-render if onTogglePin reference changes
  if (prevProps.onTogglePin !== nextProps.onTogglePin) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: onTogglePin reference changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Skip re-render if nothing changed
  console.log("⏭️ React.memo: skipping re-render (no changes)", {
    itemId: prevProps.data.i,
    isPinned: prevIsPinned
  })
  return true // true = skip re-render
})

AIGridItem.displayName = "AIGridItem"

```

检查 `useEffect` 是否仍在使用：


移除未使用的 `useEffect` 导入：


```typescriptreact
import React, { useRef } from "react"
import { Box, VStack, HStack, Text, Badge, useColorModeValue, IconButton, Tooltip } from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { FiLock, FiUnlock } from "react-icons/fi"
import ReactMarkdown from "react-markdown"
import remarkGfm from "remark-gfm"
import ReactECharts from "echarts-for-react"
import type { EChartsOption } from "echarts"
import { GridItemData } from "./types"

interface AIGridItemProps {
  data: GridItemData
  onResize?: () => void // Reserved for future use
  onTogglePin?: (itemId: string) => void
}

// 判断是否为有效的ECharts配置
function isEChartsConfig(content: string): boolean {
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(content)
    // 检查是否是有效的ECharts配置（包含常见的ECharts字段）
    return (
      typeof parsed === "object" &&
      parsed !== null &&
      (parsed.hasOwnProperty("series") ||
        parsed.hasOwnProperty("xAxis") ||
        parsed.hasOwnProperty("yAxis") ||
        parsed.hasOwnProperty("option") ||
        (parsed.hasOwnProperty("type") && parsed.type === "echarts"))
    )
  } catch {
    return false
  }
}

// 提取ECharts配置
function extractEChartsOption(content: string): EChartsOption | null {
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(content)
    // 如果包含option字段，提取它；否则直接使用解析的对象
    return parsed.option || parsed
  } catch {
    return null
  }
}

// 提取表格数据：从 React 元素树中提取所有单元格内容
function extractTableData(tableChildren: React.ReactNode): string[][] {
  const rows: string[][] = []
  
  const processElement = (element: any): void => {
    if (!element || typeof element !== 'object') return
    
    // 处理 React 元素
    if (element.type) {
      const type = element.type
      const typeName = typeof type === 'string' ? type.toLowerCase() : ''
      
      // 如果是 tr（表格行），直接提取行数据
      if (typeName === 'tr') {
        const row: string[] = []
        const processCell = (cell: any): void => {
          if (cell && cell.props && cell.props.children !== undefined) {
            const cellContent = extractTextContent(cell.props.children)
            row.push(cellContent.trim())
          }
        }
        
        // 处理 children（td 或 th）
        if (element.props && element.props.children !== undefined) {
          const cellChildren = Array.isArray(element.props.children) 
            ? element.props.children 
            : element.props.children !== null ? [element.props.children] : []
          cellChildren.forEach(processCell)
        }
        
        if (row.length > 0) {
          rows.push(row)
        }
        return // 找到 tr 后不再递归，避免重复处理
      }
      
      // 如果是 thead 或 tbody，递归处理其子元素
      if (typeName === 'thead' || typeName === 'tbody') {
        if (element.props && element.props.children !== undefined) {
          const childElements = Array.isArray(element.props.children)
            ? element.props.children
            : element.props.children !== null ? [element.props.children] : []
          childElements.forEach(processElement)
        }
        return
      }
      
      // 其他元素递归处理子元素
      if (element.props && element.props.children !== undefined) {
        const childElements = Array.isArray(element.props.children)
          ? element.props.children
          : element.props.children !== null ? [element.props.children] : []
        childElements.forEach(processElement)
      }
    }
    
    // 处理数组
    if (Array.isArray(element)) {
      element.forEach(processElement)
    }
  }
  
  if (!tableChildren) return rows
  
  const childArray = Array.isArray(tableChildren) ? tableChildren : [tableChildren]
  childArray.forEach(processElement)
  
  return rows
}

// 提取文本内容：从 React 节点中提取纯文本
function extractTextContent(node: React.ReactNode): string {
  if (typeof node === 'string' || typeof node === 'number') {
    return String(node)
  }
  
  if (Array.isArray(node)) {
    return node.map(extractTextContent).join('')
  }
  
  if (node && typeof node === 'object' && 'props' in node) {
    if (node.props && node.props.children) {
      return extractTextContent(node.props.children)
    }
  }
  
  return ''
}

// 转置表格数据：行变列，列变行
function transposeTable(data: string[][]): string[][] {
  if (data.length === 0) return []
  
  const maxCols = Math.max(...data.map(row => row.length))
  const transposed: string[][] = []
  
  for (let col = 0; col < maxCols; col++) {
    const newRow: string[] = []
    for (let row = 0; row < data.length; row++) {
      newRow.push(data[row][col] || '')
    }
    transposed.push(newRow)
  }
  
  return transposed
}

const AIGridItemComponent: React.FC<AIGridItemProps> = ({ data, onTogglePin }) => {
  // Soft card style - Scheme A
  const bgColor = useColorModeValue("blue.50", "gray.700")
  const borderColor = useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.600")
  const textColor = useColorModeValue("gray.800", "gray.200")
  const codeBgColor = useColorModeValue("#f7fafc", "#2d3748")
  const resultBgColor = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")
  const tableBorderColor = useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.600")
  // Blue theme for table header
  const tableHeaderBg = useColorModeValue("blue.500", "blue.600")
  const tableHeaderTextColor = "white"
  const tableHeaderBorderBottom = useColorModeValue("blue.600", "blue.700")
  const tableRowEvenBg = useColorModeValue("#f9fafb", "#1a202c")
  
  // Font style constants - Arial 12px for non-title/non-header text
  const bodyTextStyle = {
    fontSize: "12px",
    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
  }
  
  // Font style constants - Arial 14px for all titles/headers
  const titleTextStyle = {
    fontSize: "14px",
    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
  }
  
  // Scrollbar colors for better visibility
  const scrollbarTrackBg = useColorModeValue("#f1f1f1", "#2d3748")
  const scrollbarThumbBg = useColorModeValue("#cbd5e0", "#4a5568")
  const scrollbarThumbHoverBg = useColorModeValue("#a0aec0", "#718096")
  
  // Refs for grid item
  const gridItemRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)

  const isPinned = data.isPinned || false
  
  console.log("🎨 AIGridItem render:", { 
    itemId: data.i, 
    isPinned, 
    dataIsPinned: data.isPinned,
    timestamp: new Date().toISOString() 
  })
  
  // Border style based on pin state
  const borderWidth = isPinned ? "3px" : "1px"
  const borderColorPinned = "orange.500"
  const finalBorderColor = isPinned ? borderColorPinned : borderColor
  
  console.log("🎨 Border style:", { 
    itemId: data.i,
    isPinned, 
    borderWidth, 
    finalBorderColor,
    borderColorValue: finalBorderColor
  })


  return (
    <Box
      ref={gridItemRef}
      w="100%"
      h="100%"
      bg={bgColor}
      borderWidth={borderWidth}
      borderStyle="solid"
      borderColor={finalBorderColor}
      borderRadius="xl"
      p={4}
      pb="20px"
      overflowY="auto"
      overflowX="visible"
      shadow="md"
      position="relative"
      transition="border-width 0.2s, border-color 0.2s"
    >
      {/* Draggable handle - only this area can be used to drag */}
      <Box
        className="grid-drag-handle"
        position="absolute"
        top={0}
        left={0}
        right={0}
        bottom={0}
        cursor="grab"
        _active={{ cursor: "grabbing" }}
        zIndex={1}
      />
      {/* Pin/Unpin Button - Top Right */}
      {(() => {
        if (!onTogglePin) {
          console.warn("⚠️ Pin button not rendered - onTogglePin is missing:", { itemId: data.i })
          return null
        }
        
        console.log("🔘 Pin button rendered:", { itemId: data.i, isPinned, hasOnTogglePin: !!onTogglePin })
        
        return (
          <Box 
            position="absolute" 
            top={2} 
            right={2} 
            zIndex={1001}
            pointerEvents="auto"
            className="grid-pin-button"
            onMouseDown={(e) => {
              // Prevent drag from starting when clicking button
              e.stopPropagation()
              if (e.nativeEvent) {
                e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
              }
            }}
          >
            <Tooltip label={isPinned ? "Unpin" : "Pin"} placement="top">
              <IconButton
                aria-label={isPinned ? "Unpin" : "Pin"}
                icon={isPinned ? <FiLock /> : <FiUnlock />}
                size="sm"
                variant="ghost"
                colorScheme={isPinned ? "orange" : "gray"}
                onMouseDown={(e) => {
                  // Use onMouseDown instead of onClick to avoid drag interception
                  e.preventDefault()
                  e.stopPropagation()
                  if (e.nativeEvent) {
                    e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                  }
                  console.log("🖱️ Pin button mousedown:", { 
                    itemId: data.i, 
                    currentIsPinned: isPinned,
                    hasOnTogglePin: !!onTogglePin,
                    timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
                  })
                  if (onTogglePin) {
                    onTogglePin(data.i)
                  } else {
                    console.error("❌ onTogglePin is undefined!")
                  }
                }}
                onClick={(e) => {
                  // Also handle onClick as fallback
                  e.preventDefault()
                  e.stopPropagation()
                  if (e.nativeEvent) {
                    e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                  }
                  console.log("🖱️ Pin button clicked (fallback):", { 
                    itemId: data.i, 
                    currentIsPinned: isPinned
                  })
                  if (onTogglePin) {
                    onTogglePin(data.i)
                  }
                }}
                _hover={{
                  transform: "scale(1.05)",
                  bg: isPinned ? "orange.100" : "gray.100",
                }}
                transition="all 0.2s"
                borderRadius="md"
              />
            </Tooltip>
          </Box>
        )
      })()}
      <VStack align="stretch" spacing={4} h="100%" position="relative" zIndex={2} minW="0" w="100%">
        {/* Disks Section */}
        <VStack align="stretch" spacing={4} flex="1" overflow="auto">
          {data.disks.length > 0 ? (
            data.disks.map((disk) => (
              <Box key={disk.id} w="100%" minW="0" flexShrink={1}>
                <VStack align="stretch" spacing={2} w="100%" minW="0">
                  {/* Disk Header */}
                  <HStack spacing={2}>
                    <Badge colorScheme="blue" size="sm">
                      DISK
                    </Badge>
                    <Text {...titleTextStyle} fontWeight="semibold" color={textColor}>
                      {disk.name}
                    </Text>
                    {disk.create_time && (
                      <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500">
                        {new Date(disk.create_time).toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
                          year: "numeric",
                          month: "2-digit",
                          day: "2-digit",
                        })}
                      </Text>
                    )}
                  </HStack>

                  {/* Execution Result or Dashboard Charts */}
                  {disk.category === "dashboard" ? (
                    // Dashboard type disk: render charts from requirement
                    <Box
                      w="100%"
                      minW="0"
                      flexShrink={1}
                      p={3}
                      bg={resultBgColor}
                      borderRadius="lg"
                      border="1px solid"
                      borderColor={borderColor}
                    >
                      {disk.dashboardError ? (
                        <Box
                          p={4}
                          bg="red.50"
                          borderRadius="md"
                          border="1px solid"
                          borderColor="red.200"
                        >
                          <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="red.600" fontWeight="medium" mb={1}>
                            Dashboard Error
                          </Text>
                          <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="red.500">
                            {disk.dashboardError}
                          </Text>
                        </Box>
                      ) : disk.dashboardCharts && disk.dashboardCharts.length > 0 ? (
                        <Box
                          w="100%"
                          overflowX="auto"
                          overflowY="hidden"
                          sx={{
                            "&::-webkit-scrollbar": {
                              height: "8px",
                            },
                            "&::-webkit-scrollbar-track": {
                              background: scrollbarTrackBg,
                              borderRadius: "4px",
                            },
                            "&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb": {
                              background: scrollbarThumbBg,
                              borderRadius: "4px",
                              "&:hover": {
                                background: scrollbarThumbHoverBg,
                              },
                            },
                            scrollbarWidth: "thin",
                            scrollbarColor: `${scrollbarThumbBg} ${scrollbarTrackBg}`,
                          }}
                        >
                          <HStack spacing={4} align="flex-start" minW="max-content">
                            {disk.dashboardCharts.map((chart, index) => (
                              <Box
                                key={index}
                                minW="400px"
                                w="400px"
                                flexShrink={0}
                                p={3}
                                bg={useColorModeValue("white", "gray.900")}
                                borderRadius="md"
                                border="1px solid"
                                borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                              >
                                <VStack align="stretch" spacing={2}>
                                  <Tooltip
                                    label={chart.question_title}
                                    placement="top"
                                    hasArrow
                                    bg="gray.700"
                                    color="white"
                                    fontSize="sm"
                                    maxW="400px"
                                    openDelay={300}
                                  >
                                    <Text
                                      {...titleTextStyle}
                                      fontWeight="semibold"
                                      color={textColor}
                                      mb={1}
                                      noOfLines={3}
                                      w="100%"
                                      whiteSpace="normal"
                                      wordBreak="break-word"
                                      lineHeight="1.5"
                                      cursor="help"
                                    >
                                      {chart.question_title}
                                    </Text>
                                  </Tooltip>
                                  <Box h="350px" w="100%">
                                    <ReactECharts
                                      option={chart.echarts_option}
                                      style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
                                      opts={{ renderer: "svg" }}
                                    />
                                  </Box>
                                </VStack>
                              </Box>
                            ))}
                          </HStack>
                        </Box>
                      ) : (
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                          No dashboard charts available
                        </Text>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  ) : disk.latestResult ? (
                    <Box
                      w="100%"
                      minW="0"
                      flexShrink={1}
                      p={3}
                      bg={resultBgColor}
                      borderRadius="lg"
                      border="1px solid"
                      borderColor={borderColor}
                    >
                      <HStack spacing={2} mb={2}>
                        <Badge
                          colorScheme={disk.latestResult.is_processed ? "green" : "yellow"}
                          size="sm"
                          fontSize="12px"
                          fontFamily="Arial, sans-serif"
                        >
                          {disk.latestResult.is_processed ? "Processed" : "Pending"}
                        </Badge>
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500">
                          {new Date(disk.latestResult.created_at).toLocaleString("en-US")}
                        </Text>
                      </HStack>

                      {/* Content Rendering */}
                      {disk.latestResult.conclusion_detail ? (
                        (() => {
                          const content = disk.latestResult.conclusion_detail
                          if (isEChartsConfig(content)) {
                            const echartsOption = extractEChartsOption(content)
                            if (echartsOption) {
                              return (
                                <Box w="100%" h="300px" minH="200px">
                                  <ReactECharts
                                    option={echartsOption}
                                    style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
                                    opts={{ renderer: "svg" }}
                                  />
                                </Box>
                              )
                            }
                          }
                          // Render as Markdown with remarkGfm for table support
                          const tableRef = useRef<HTMLTableElement | null>(null)
                          
                          return (
                            <Box
                              w="100%"
                              minW="0"
                              maxW="100%"
                              flexShrink={1}
                              position="relative"
                              overflowX="hidden"
                              overflowY="visible"
                            >
                              {/* Table container - adaptive width */}
                              <Box
                                w="100%"
                                minW="0"
                                maxW="100%"
                                overflowX="hidden"
                                overflowY="visible"
                                position="relative"
                                display="block"
                                sx={{
                                "& h1, & h2, & h3, & h4, & h5, & h6": {
                                  fontWeight: "bold",
                                  marginTop: "1rem",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  fontSize: "14px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& p": {
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  lineHeight: "1.6",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& ul, & ol": {
                                  marginLeft: "1.5rem",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& li": {
                                  marginBottom: "0.25rem",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& code": {
                                  backgroundColor: codeBgColor,
                                  padding: "0.125rem 0.25rem",
                                  borderRadius: "0.25rem",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, monospace",
                                },
                                "& pre": {
                                  backgroundColor: codeBgColor,
                                  padding: "1rem",
                                  borderRadius: "0.5rem",
                                  overflow: "auto",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, monospace",
                                },
                                "& blockquote": {
                                  borderLeft: "4px solid #e2e8f0",
                                  paddingLeft: "1rem",
                                  fontStyle: "italic",
                                  color: "#4a5568",
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& table": {
                                  width: "100%", // Adaptive to container width
                                  borderCollapse: "collapse",
                                  marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                  fontSize: "sm",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  display: "table",
                                  tableLayout: "auto", // Auto layout for better text wrapping
                                  boxSizing: "border-box",
                                },
                                "& th, & td": {
                                  border: "1px solid",
                                  borderColor: tableBorderColor,
                                  padding: "0.5rem",
                                  textAlign: "left",
                                  whiteSpace: "normal", // Allow text wrapping in cells
                                  wordWrap: "break-word", // Break long words
                                  overflowWrap: "break-word", // Break words when necessary
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& th": {
                                  backgroundColor: tableHeaderBg,
                                  color: tableHeaderTextColor,
                                  fontWeight: "bold",
                                  borderBottom: "2px solid",
                                  borderBottomColor: tableHeaderBorderBottom,
                                  fontSize: "14px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  padding: "0.75rem 0.5rem",
                                  minHeight: "2.5rem",
                                  whiteSpace: "normal", // Allow header text wrapping
                                  wordWrap: "break-word",
                                  overflowWrap: "break-word",
                                },
                                "& td": {
                                  fontSize: "12px",
                                  fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                },
                                "& thead": {
                                  display: "table-header-group",
                                },
                                "& tbody": {
                                  display: "table-row-group",
                                },
                                "& tr:nth-of-type(even)": {
                                  backgroundColor: tableRowEvenBg,
                                },
                              }}
                            >
                                <ReactMarkdown 
                                  remarkPlugins={[remarkGfm]}
                                  components={{
                                    table: ({ children, ...props }) => {
                                      // Extract table data from children
                                      const tableData = extractTableData(children)
                                      
                                      // Transpose the table data
                                      const transposedData = transposeTable(tableData)
                                      
                                      // Build transposed table structure
                                      if (transposedData.length === 0) {
                                        return (
                                          <table
                                            {...props}
                                          style={{
                                            width: "100%",
                                            display: "table",
                                            boxSizing: "border-box",
                                          }}
                                          >
                                            {children}
                                          </table>
                                        )
                                      }
                                      
                                      // First row becomes header row
                                      const headerRow = transposedData[0] || []
                                      const dataRows = transposedData.slice(1)
                                      
                                      return (
                                        <table
                                          ref={(node) => {
                                            if (node) {
                                              tableRef.current = node
                                            }
                                          }}
                                          {...props}
                                          style={{
                                            width: "100%",
                                            display: "table",
                                            boxSizing: "border-box",
                                          }}
                                        >
                                          <thead>
                                            <tr>
                                              {headerRow.map((cell, index) => (
                                                <th key={index}>{cell}</th>
                                              ))}
                                            </tr>
                                          </thead>
                                          <tbody>
                                            {dataRows.map((row, rowIndex) => (
                                              <tr key={rowIndex}>
                                                {row.map((cell, cellIndex) => (
                                                  <td key={cellIndex}>{cell}</td>
                                                ))}
                                              </tr>
                                            ))}
                                          </tbody>
                                        </table>
                                      )
                                    },
                                  }}
                                >
                                {content}
                                </ReactMarkdown>
                              </Box>
                            </Box>
                          )
                        })()
                          ) : (
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                          No execution result content
                        </Text>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  ) : (
                    <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                      No execution results available
                    </Text>
                  )}
                </VStack>
              </Box>
            ))
          ) : (
            <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic" textAlign="center" py={4}>
              No disks attached to this application
            </Text>
          )}
        </VStack>
      </VStack>
    </Box>
  )
}

// Export with React.memo and custom comparison function
export const AIGridItem = React.memo(AIGridItemComponent, (prevProps, nextProps) => {
  const prevIsPinned = prevProps.data?.isPinned || false
  const nextIsPinned = nextProps.data?.isPinned || false
  
  // Always re-render if isPinned changes
  if (prevIsPinned !== nextIsPinned) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: isPinned changed, will re-render", {
      prevIsPinned,
      nextIsPinned,
      itemId: prevProps.data.i,
      prevData: prevProps.data,
      nextData: nextProps.data
    })
    return false // false = should re-render
  }
  
  // Re-render if data reference changes
  if (prevProps.data !== nextProps.data) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: data reference changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i,
      prevIsPinned: prevProps.data?.isPinned,
      nextIsPinned: nextProps.data?.isPinned
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Re-render if onTogglePin reference changes
  if (prevProps.onTogglePin !== nextProps.onTogglePin) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: onTogglePin reference changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Skip re-render if nothing changed
  console.log("⏭️ React.memo: skipping re-render (no changes)", {
    itemId: prevProps.data.i,
    isPinned: prevIsPinned
  })
  return true // true = skip re-render
})

AIGridItem.displayName = "AIGridItem"

```

检查是否还有未使用的滚动条相关变量：


查看这些变量是否仍在使用：


这些变量用于 Dashboard Charts 的横向滚动，应保留。修改已完成。

## 修改总结

已按方案一完成：

### ✅ 1. 移除底部横向滚动条
- 删除了 `gridBottomScrollbarRef` 和 `scrollContainersRef` 引用
- 移除了整个滚动条同步逻辑的 `useEffect`
- 移除了底部滚动条的渲染代码
- 清理了相关的滚动容器注册逻辑

### ✅ 2. 表格自适应容器宽度
- 表格宽度从 `max-content` 改为 `100%`
- 移除了 `minWidth: "max-content"` 限制
- 表格单元格允许换行：`whiteSpace: "normal"`
- 添加了 `wordWrap: "break-word"` 和 `overflowWrap: "break-word"` 支持
- 表头也允许换行
- 表格使用 `tableLayout: "auto"` 和 `boxSizing: "border-box"`

### ✅ 3. 文本内容自适应
- Markdown 段落、列表等已自适应容器宽度
- 表格内容会根据容器宽度自动换行

### 代码清理
- 移除了未使用的 `useEffect` 导入
- 移除了调试用的表格溢出检查代码
- 保留了 Dashboard Charts 的横向滚动条样式（用于图表横向滑动）

现在 grid 中的表格和文字会根据 grid 的实际宽度自适应，不再显示底部横向滚动条。表格内容会换行显示，避免横向溢出。

---

**User**

很好，你解决了移除grid框底部的横向滚动条和解决了grid 中的表格和文字不会根据 grid 的实际宽度自适应得问题，真棒。现在有个新的优化点，如图所示，红色框中的空隙太大，删除，重命名，保存按钮可以往左边挪一挪，下面的current unsaved的右边的空隙太大，应该贴合有边框，也就是这个space的卡片可以窄一点，紧凑一点，如果space名字太长，可以增加，鼠标悬浮显示完整名字的功能，在修改前，请征求我的意见

---

**Cursor**

查看当前空间卡片的布局代码：


基于代码分析，提出以下优化方案：

## 优化方案

### 当前问题分析：
1. 顶部行：使用 `justify="space-between"` 导致标题与按钮之间空隙过大
2. 底部行：状态指示器未贴合右边界，右侧空隙过大
3. 卡片宽度：整体较宽，不够紧凑
4. 标题截断：已有 `title` 属性，但建议使用 Chakra UI 的 Tooltip

### 优化方案：

**方案一（推荐）：紧凑布局 + Tooltip**
1. 顶部行调整：
   - 将 `justify="space-between"` 改为 `justify="flex-start"`，并添加 `gap={2}` 控制间距
   - 标题使用 `maxW` 限制最大宽度，避免过度拉伸
   - 按钮组始终显示（或 hover 时快速显示），减少空隙
2. 底部行调整：
   - 使用 `justify="flex-end"` 让状态指示器右对齐
   - 减少 `spacing` 从 `3` 到 `2`
   - 添加 `w="100%"` 确保占满宽度
3. 卡片宽度：
   - 保持 `w="100%"`，但通过减少内边距和间距实现紧凑
4. 标题 Tooltip：
   - 使用 Chakra UI 的 `Tooltip` 包裹标题
   - 当文字被截断时显示完整名称

**方案二：更激进的紧凑布局**
- 进一步减少所有间距和内边距
- 按钮组默认显示，不需要 hover
- 底部行使用 `justify="space-between"` 但减少间距

**方案三：保留当前布局，仅微调**
- 只调整间距值
- 添加 Tooltip 功能
- 不改变整体布局结构

## 推荐

建议采用方案一：
- 紧凑且保持可读性
- 按钮左移，减少顶部空隙
- 状态指示器右对齐，贴合边框
- Tooltip 改善用户体验
- 符合工业风格

请确认是否采用方案一，或需要调整。

---

**User**

方案一（推荐）：紧凑布局 + Tooltip，请开始

---

**Cursor**

按方案一开始实现：紧凑布局 + Tooltip。


开始实现修改：


```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo, useCallback } from "react"
import {
  Box,
  VStack,
  HStack,
  Text,
  Input,
  InputGroup,
  InputLeftElement,
  Card,
  CardBody,
  SimpleGrid,
  Badge,
  IconButton,
  Tooltip,
  Divider,
  useToast,
  Modal,
  ModalOverlay,
  ModalContent,
  ModalHeader,
  ModalBody,
  ModalCloseButton,
  useDisclosure,
  Button,
} from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { FiSearch, FiGrid, FiUsers, FiEdit3, FiTrash2, FiPlus, FiSave } from "react-icons/fi"
import { useDrag } from "react-dnd"
import AppNodeService from "@/services/appNodeService"
import ApplicationMarketplace from "@/components/ApplicationMarketplace/ApplicationMarketplace"
import { GridSpaceService, type GridSpace } from "@/services/gridSpaceService"
import type { AppNode } from "@/types/appNode"

// GridSpace Card Component for SPACES section
interface GridSpaceCardProps {
  gridSpace: {
    id: string
    name: string
    description?: string
    createdAt: string
    isTemporary?: boolean
  }
  onClick: (id: string) => void
  onRename?: (id: string, newName: string) => void
  onDelete?: (id: string) => void
  onSave?: (id: string) => Promise<void>
  isCurrent?: boolean
  hasUnsavedChanges?: boolean
}

const GridSpaceCard = React.memo(function GridSpaceCard({
  gridSpace,
  onClick,
  onRename,
  onDelete,
  onSave,
  isCurrent = false,
  hasUnsavedChanges = false,
}: GridSpaceCardProps) {
  const { isOpen, onOpen, onClose } = useDisclosure()
  const { isOpen: isDeleteOpen, onOpen: onDeleteOpen, onClose: onDeleteClose } = useDisclosure()
  const [newName, setNewName] = useState(gridSpace.name)
  const [isRenaming, setIsRenaming] = useState(false)
  const [isDeleting, setIsDeleting] = useState(false)
  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)
  const toast = useToast()

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    const date = new Date(dateString)
    return date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
      month: "short",
      day: "numeric",
      hour: "2-digit",
      minute: "2-digit",
    })
  }

  const handleRename = async () => {
    if (!onRename || newName.trim() === "" || newName === gridSpace.name) {
      onClose()
      return
    }

    try {
      setIsRenaming(true)
      await onRename(gridSpace.id, newName.trim())
      toast({
        title: "Grid Space Renamed",
        description: `Grid Space renamed to "${newName.trim()}"`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      onClose()
    } catch (error) {
      toast({
        title: "Rename Failed",
        description: "Failed to rename grid space",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
    } finally {
      setIsRenaming(false)
    }
  }

  const handleKeyPress = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
    if (e.key === "Enter") {
      handleRename()
    } else if (e.key === "Escape") {
      setNewName(gridSpace.name)
      onClose()
    }
  }

  const handleDelete = async () => {
    if (!onDelete) return

    try {
      setIsDeleting(true)
      await onDelete(gridSpace.id)
      toast({
        title: "Grid Space Deleted",
        description: `Grid Space "${gridSpace.name}" has been deleted`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      onDeleteClose()
    } catch (error) {
      toast({
        title: "Delete Failed",
        description: "Failed to delete grid space",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      setIsDeleting(false)
    }
  }

  const handleSave = async () => {
    if (!onSave) return

    try {
      setIsSaving(true)
      await onSave(gridSpace.id)
    } catch (error) {
      // Error toast is handled by the save function
    } finally {
      setIsSaving(false)
    }
  }

  return (
    <>
      <Card
        size="sm"
        cursor="pointer"
        _hover={{ transform: "translateY(-2px)", shadow: "md" }}
        transition="all 0.2s"
        w="100%"
        position="relative"
        role="group"
        bg={isCurrent ? "gray.50" : "white"}
        borderLeft={isCurrent ? "3px solid" : "none"}
        borderLeftColor={isCurrent ? "green.500" : "transparent"}
        borderRadius="md"
      >
        <CardBody p={1}>
          <VStack spacing={0.5} align="stretch">
            {/* First row: Name + Action buttons */}
            <HStack justify="flex-start" align="center" gap={2} w="100%">
              <Tooltip label={gridSpace.name} placement="top" isDisabled={gridSpace.name.length <= 15}>
                <Text
                  fontSize="sm"
                  fontWeight="semibold"
                  color="gray.800"
                  noOfLines={1}
                  lineHeight="1.3"
                  cursor="pointer"
                  onClick={() => onClick(gridSpace.id)}
                  flex="1"
                  minW={0}
                  maxW="calc(100% - 80px)" // Reserve space for buttons
                >
                  {gridSpace.name}
                </Text>
              </Tooltip>

              {/* Action buttons - show on hover */}
              <HStack spacing={1} opacity={0} _groupHover={{ opacity: 1 }} transition="opacity 0.2s" flexShrink={0} ml="auto">
                {onSave && isCurrent && (
                  <Tooltip label={hasUnsavedChanges || gridSpace.isTemporary ? "Save Changes" : "Save"} placement="top">
                    <IconButton
                      aria-label="Save Grid Space"
                      icon={<FiSave />}
                      size="xs"
                      variant={hasUnsavedChanges || gridSpace.isTemporary ? "solid" : "ghost"}
                      colorScheme={hasUnsavedChanges || gridSpace.isTemporary ? "blue" : "gray"}
                      _hover={{ bg: hasUnsavedChanges || gridSpace.isTemporary ? "blue.600" : "gray.100" }}
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation()
                        handleSave()
                      }}
                      isLoading={isSaving}
                      loadingText="Saving..."
                      isDisabled={!hasUnsavedChanges && !gridSpace.isTemporary}
                    />
                  </Tooltip>
                )}

                {onRename && !gridSpace.isTemporary && (
                  <Tooltip label="Rename Grid Space" placement="top">
                    <IconButton
                      aria-label="Rename Grid Space"
                      icon={<FiEdit3 />}
                      size="xs"
                      variant="ghost"
                      _hover={{ bg: "gray.100" }}
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation()
                        setNewName(gridSpace.name)
                        onOpen()
                      }}
                    />
                  </Tooltip>
                )}

                {onDelete && !gridSpace.isTemporary && (
                  <Tooltip label="Delete Grid Space" placement="top">
                    <IconButton
                      aria-label="Delete Grid Space"
                      icon={<FiTrash2 />}
                      size="xs"
                      variant="ghost"
                      colorScheme="red"
                      _hover={{ bg: "red.50" }}
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation()
                        onDeleteOpen()
                      }}
                    />
                  </Tooltip>
                )}
              </HStack>
            </HStack>

            {/* Second row: Timestamp + Status indicators - compact single line, no wrapping */}
            <HStack 
              spacing={3} 
              align="center" 
              fontSize="9px" 
              color="gray.500"
              flexWrap="nowrap"
              minW={0}
            >
              <Text fontSize="9px" color="gray.500" flexShrink={0}>
                {formatDate(gridSpace.createdAt)}
              </Text>
              {isCurrent && (
                <Badge 
                  size="sm" 
                  colorScheme="green" 
                  variant="subtle" 
                  fontSize="9px"
                  fontWeight="medium"
                  px={1}
                  py={0}
                  flexShrink={0}
                >
                  CURRENT
                </Badge>
              )}
              {isCurrent && (gridSpace.isTemporary || hasUnsavedChanges) && (
                <HStack spacing={1} align="center" flexShrink={0}>
                  <Text fontSize="8px" color="gray.500">
                    UNSAVED
                  </Text>
                  <Box
                    w="6px"
                    h="6px"
                    borderRadius="full"
                    bg="orange.500"
                    flexShrink={0}
                    title="Unsaved Changes"
                    boxShadow="0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)"
                  />
                </HStack>
              )}
            </HStack>
          </VStack>
        </CardBody>
      </Card>

      <Modal isOpen={isOpen} onClose={onClose} isCentered>
        <ModalOverlay />
        <ModalContent>
          <ModalHeader>Rename Grid Space</ModalHeader>
          <ModalCloseButton />
          <ModalBody>
            <Input
              value={newName}
              onChange={(e) => setNewName(e.target.value)}
              onKeyDown={handleKeyPress}
              placeholder="Enter grid space name"
              autoFocus
            />
          </ModalBody>
          <ModalBody>
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              mr={3}
              onClick={() => {
                setNewName(gridSpace.name)
                onClose()
              }}
            >
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button
              colorScheme="blue"
              onClick={handleRename}
              isLoading={isRenaming}
              loadingText="Renaming..."
              isDisabled={newName.trim() === "" || newName === gridSpace.name}
            >
              Save
            </Button>
          </ModalBody>
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>

      <Modal isOpen={isDeleteOpen} onClose={onDeleteClose} isCentered>
        <ModalOverlay />
        <ModalContent>
          <ModalHeader>Delete Grid Space</ModalHeader>
          <ModalCloseButton />
          <ModalBody>
            <Text>
              Are you sure you want to delete "{gridSpace.name}"? This action cannot be undone.
            </Text>
          </ModalBody>
          <ModalBody>
            <Button variant="ghost" mr={3} onClick={onDeleteClose}>
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button colorScheme="red" onClick={handleDelete} isLoading={isDeleting} loadingText="Deleting...">
              Delete
            </Button>
          </ModalBody>
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>
    </>
  )
})

// Application Card Component for AGENTS section
interface ApplicationCardProps {
  application: AppNode
  onUnpin?: (applicationId: number) => void
  showUnpinButton?: boolean
}

const ApplicationCard = React.memo(function ApplicationCard({
  application,
  onUnpin,
  showUnpinButton = false,
}: ApplicationCardProps) {
  const dragItem = React.useMemo(() => ({ application }), [application.id])

  const [{ isDragging }, drag] = useDrag(
    () => ({
      type: "application",
      item: dragItem,
      collect: (monitor) => ({
        isDragging: monitor.isDragging(),
      }),
    }),
    [dragItem]
  )

  return (
    <Card
      ref={drag}
      size="sm"
      cursor="grab"
      opacity={isDragging ? 0.5 : 1}
      _hover={{ transform: "translateY(-2px)", shadow: "md" }}
      transition="all 0.2s"
      _active={{ cursor: "grabbing" }}
      position="relative"
      role="group"
    >
      <CardBody p={3}>
        <VStack align="start" spacing={2}>
          <HStack justify="space-between" w="100%" align="flex-start">
            <Box flex="1">
              <Text fontSize="sm" fontWeight="medium" noOfLines={1}>
                {application.name}
              </Text>
              {application.description && (
                <Text fontSize="xs" color="gray.500" noOfLines={2} mt={1}>
                  {application.description}
                </Text>
              )}
            </Box>
            {showUnpinButton && onUnpin && (
              <Tooltip label="Unpin" placement="top">
                <IconButton
                  aria-label="Unpin Application"
                  icon={<FiTrash2 />}
                  size="xs"
                  variant="ghost"
                  colorScheme="red"
                  opacity={0}
                  _groupHover={{ opacity: 1 }}
                  transition="opacity 0.2s"
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    onUnpin(application.id)
                  }}
                />
              </Tooltip>
            )}
          </HStack>
          <HStack spacing={2} w="100%">
            {application.category && (
              <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="blue" variant="subtle">
                {application.category}
              </Badge>
            )}
            {application.area && (
              <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="green" variant="subtle">
                {application.area}
              </Badge>
            )}
          </HStack>
          {application.owner && (
            <Text fontSize="xs" color="gray.400">
              by {application.owner.full_name || application.owner.email}
            </Text>
          )}
        </VStack>
      </CardBody>
    </Card>
  )
})

interface AIGridSidebarProps {
  onGridSpaceSelect: (gridSpaceId: string) => void
  currentGridSpaceId: string | null
  onCreateGridSpace?: () => Promise<string | null> // 返回新创建的 gridSpaceId
  onSaveGridSpace?: (gridSpaceId: string) => Promise<void> // 保存 Grid Space
  unsavedSpaces?: Map<string, boolean> // 未保存的 space ID 映射
  w?: string
}

function AIGridSidebar({ 
  onGridSpaceSelect, 
  currentGridSpaceId, 
  onCreateGridSpace, 
  onSaveGridSpace,
  unsavedSpaces = new Map(),
  w = "280px" 
}: AIGridSidebarProps) {
  const toast = useToast()
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("")
  const [isSearchFocused, setIsSearchFocused] = useState(false)
  const [isMarketplaceOpen, setIsMarketplaceOpen] = useState(false)
  const [pinnedApps, setPinnedApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [dropdownHighlight, setDropdownHighlight] = useState(true)
  const [savedGridSpaces, setSavedGridSpaces] = useState<GridSpace[]>([])
  const [currentGridSpace, setCurrentGridSpace] = useState<GridSpace | null>(null)

  // Load grid spaces
  const loadGridSpaces = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const spaces = await GridSpaceService.getUserGridSpaces()
      setSavedGridSpaces(spaces)
      
      if (currentGridSpaceId) {
        const space = spaces.find((s) => s.id === currentGridSpaceId)
        setCurrentGridSpace(space || null)
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load grid spaces:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to load grid spaces",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, toast])

  useEffect(() => {
    loadGridSpaces()
  }, [loadGridSpaces])

  // Load pinned applications
  useEffect(() => {
    try {
      const stored = localStorage.getItem("pinned_apps")
      if (stored) {
        setPinnedApps(JSON.parse(stored))
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("Failed to parse pinned_apps from localStorage", e)
    }
  }, [])

  const handleAppPin = (app: AppNode) => {
    const isAlreadyPinned = pinnedApps.some((p) => p.id === app.id)
    if (isAlreadyPinned) return
    const next = [...pinnedApps, app]
    setPinnedApps(next)
    localStorage.setItem("pinned_apps", JSON.stringify(next))
    toast({
      title: "Application Pinned",
      description: `${app.name} added to menu`,
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
      isClosable: true,
    })
  }

  const handleGridSpaceRename = async (gridSpaceId: string, newName: string) => {
    try {
      await GridSpaceService.updateGridSpace(gridSpaceId, { name: newName })
      await loadGridSpaces()
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to rename grid space:", error)
      throw error
    }
  }

  const handleGridSpaceDelete = async (gridSpaceId: string) => {
    try {
      await GridSpaceService.deleteGridSpace(gridSpaceId)
      await loadGridSpaces()
      if (currentGridSpaceId === gridSpaceId) {
        onGridSpaceSelect("")
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to delete grid space:", error)
      throw error
    }
  }

  const filteredGridSpaces = useMemo(() => {
    const allSpaces: GridSpace[] = []
    
    if (currentGridSpace) {
      allSpaces.push(currentGridSpace)
    }
    
    const otherSpaces = savedGridSpaces.filter(
      (space) => !currentGridSpace || space.id !== currentGridSpace.id
    )
    allSpaces.push(...otherSpaces)
    
    return allSpaces.filter(
      (space) =>
        space.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
        (space.description &&
          space.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()))
    )
  }, [savedGridSpaces, currentGridSpace, searchQuery])

  const filteredApplications = useMemo(
    () =>
      pinnedApps.filter(
        (app) =>
          app.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
          (app.description &&
            app.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()))
      ),
    [pinnedApps, searchQuery]
  )

  return (
    <Box
      w={w}
      h="100%"
      bg="white"
      borderRight="1px solid"
      borderColor="gray.200"
      display="flex"
      flexDirection="column"
    >
      {/* Search Section */}
      <Box p={4} borderBottom="1px solid" borderColor="gray.100" position="relative">
        <InputGroup size="sm">
          <InputLeftElement pointerEvents="none">
```
