              <Tooltip label={gridSpace.name} placement="top" isDisabled={gridSpace.name.length <= 15}>
                <Text
                  fontSize="sm"
                  fontWeight="semibold"
                  color="gray.800"
                  noOfLines={1}
                  lineHeight="1.3"
                  cursor="pointer"
                  onClick={() => onClick(gridSpace.id)}
                  flex="1"
                  minW={0}
                  maxW="calc(100% - 80px)" // Reserve space for buttons
                >
                  {gridSpace.name}
                </Text>
              </Tooltip>

              {/* Action buttons - show on hover */}
              <HStack spacing={1} opacity={0} _groupHover={{ opacity: 1 }} transition="opacity 0.2s" flexShrink={0} ml="auto">
                {onSave && isCurrent && (
                  <Tooltip label={hasUnsavedChanges || gridSpace.isTemporary ? "Save Changes" : "Save"} placement="top">
                    <IconButton
                      aria-label="Save Grid Space"
                      icon={<FiSave />}
                      size="xs"
                      variant={hasUnsavedChanges || gridSpace.isTemporary ? "solid" : "ghost"}
                      colorScheme={hasUnsavedChanges || gridSpace.isTemporary ? "blue" : "gray"}
                      _hover={{ bg: hasUnsavedChanges || gridSpace.isTemporary ? "blue.600" : "gray.100" }}
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation()
                        handleSave()
                      }}
                      isLoading={isSaving}
                      loadingText="Saving..."
                      isDisabled={!hasUnsavedChanges && !gridSpace.isTemporary}
                    />
                  </Tooltip>
                )}

                {onRename && !gridSpace.isTemporary && (
                  <Tooltip label="Rename Grid Space" placement="top">
                    <IconButton
                      aria-label="Rename Grid Space"
                      icon={<FiEdit3 />}
                      size="xs"
                      variant="ghost"
                      _hover={{ bg: "gray.100" }}
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation()
                        setNewName(gridSpace.name)
                        onOpen()
                      }}
                    />
                  </Tooltip>
                )}

                {onDelete && !gridSpace.isTemporary && (
                  <Tooltip label="Delete Grid Space" placement="top">
                    <IconButton
                      aria-label="Delete Grid Space"
                      icon={<FiTrash2 />}
                      size="xs"
                      variant="ghost"
                      colorScheme="red"
                      _hover={{ bg: "red.50" }}
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation()
                        onDeleteOpen()
                      }}
                    />
                  </Tooltip>
                )}
              </HStack>
            </HStack>

            {/* Second row: Timestamp + Status indicators - compact single line, right-aligned */}
            <HStack 
              spacing={2} 
              align="center" 
              fontSize="9px" 
              color="gray.500"
              flexWrap="nowrap"
              justify="flex-end"
              w="100%"
            >
              <Text fontSize="9px" color="gray.500" flexShrink={0}>
                {formatDate(gridSpace.createdAt)}
              </Text>
              {isCurrent && (
                <Badge 
                  size="sm" 
                  colorScheme="green" 
                  variant="subtle" 
                  fontSize="9px"
                  fontWeight="medium"
                  px={1}
                  py={0}
                  flexShrink={0}
                >
                  CURRENT
                </Badge>
              )}
              {isCurrent && (gridSpace.isTemporary || hasUnsavedChanges) && (
                <HStack spacing={1} align="center" flexShrink={0}>
                  <Text fontSize="8px" color="gray.500">
                    UNSAVED
                  </Text>
                  <Box
                    w="6px"
                    h="6px"
                    borderRadius="full"
                    bg="orange.500"
                    flexShrink={0}
                    title="Unsaved Changes"
                    boxShadow="0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)"
                  />
                </HStack>
              )}
            </HStack>
          </VStack>
        </CardBody>
      </Card>

      <Modal isOpen={isOpen} onClose={onClose} isCentered>
        <ModalOverlay />
        <ModalContent>
          <ModalHeader>Rename Grid Space</ModalHeader>
          <ModalCloseButton />
          <ModalBody>
            <Input
              value={newName}
              onChange={(e) => setNewName(e.target.value)}
              onKeyDown={handleKeyPress}
              placeholder="Enter grid space name"
              autoFocus
            />
          </ModalBody>
          <ModalBody>
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              mr={3}
              onClick={() => {
                setNewName(gridSpace.name)
                onClose()
              }}
            >
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button
              colorScheme="blue"
              onClick={handleRename}
              isLoading={isRenaming}
              loadingText="Renaming..."
              isDisabled={newName.trim() === "" || newName === gridSpace.name}
            >
              Save
            </Button>
          </ModalBody>
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>

      <Modal isOpen={isDeleteOpen} onClose={onDeleteClose} isCentered>
        <ModalOverlay />
        <ModalContent>
          <ModalHeader>Delete Grid Space</ModalHeader>
          <ModalCloseButton />
          <ModalBody>
            <Text>
              Are you sure you want to delete "{gridSpace.name}"? This action cannot be undone.
            </Text>
          </ModalBody>
          <ModalBody>
            <Button variant="ghost" mr={3} onClick={onDeleteClose}>
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button colorScheme="red" onClick={handleDelete} isLoading={isDeleting} loadingText="Deleting...">
              Delete
            </Button>
          </ModalBody>
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>
    </>
  )
})

// Application Card Component for AGENTS section
interface ApplicationCardProps {
  application: AppNode
  onUnpin?: (applicationId: number) => void
  showUnpinButton?: boolean
}

const ApplicationCard = React.memo(function ApplicationCard({
  application,
  onUnpin,
  showUnpinButton = false,
}: ApplicationCardProps) {
  const dragItem = React.useMemo(() => ({ application }), [application.id])

  const [{ isDragging }, drag] = useDrag(
    () => ({
      type: "application",
      item: dragItem,
      collect: (monitor) => ({
        isDragging: monitor.isDragging(),
      }),
    }),
    [dragItem]
  )

  return (
    <Card
      ref={drag}
      size="sm"
      cursor="grab"
      opacity={isDragging ? 0.5 : 1}
      _hover={{ transform: "translateY(-2px)", shadow: "md" }}
      transition="all 0.2s"
      _active={{ cursor: "grabbing" }}
      position="relative"
      role="group"
    >
      <CardBody p={1}>
        <VStack align="start" spacing={0.5} w="100%">
          {/* First row: Name + Unpin button */}
          <HStack justify="flex-start" align="center" gap={2} w="100%">
            <Tooltip label={application.name} placement="top" isDisabled={application.name.length <= 20}>
              <Text
                fontSize="sm"
                fontWeight="medium"
                noOfLines={1}
                flex="1"
                minW={0}
                maxW="calc(100% - 32px)" // Reserve space for unpin button
                cursor="grab"
              >
                {application.name}
              </Text>
            </Tooltip>
            {showUnpinButton && onUnpin && (
              <Tooltip label="Unpin" placement="top">
                <IconButton
                  aria-label="Unpin Application"
                  icon={<FiTrash2 />}
                  size="xs"
                  variant="ghost"
                  colorScheme="red"
                  opacity={0}
                  _groupHover={{ opacity: 1 }}
                  transition="opacity 0.2s"
                  flexShrink={0}
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    onUnpin(application.id)
                  }}
                />
              </Tooltip>
            )}
          </HStack>
          {/* Second row: Category and Area badges */}
          {(application.category || application.area) && (
            <HStack spacing={2} w="100%" flexWrap="wrap">
              {application.category && (
                <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="blue" variant="subtle" fontSize="xs">
                  {application.category}
                </Badge>
              )}
              {application.area && (
                <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="green" variant="subtle" fontSize="xs">
                  {application.area}
                </Badge>
              )}
            </HStack>
          )}
        </VStack>
      </CardBody>
    </Card>
  )
})

interface AIGridSidebarProps {
  onGridSpaceSelect: (gridSpaceId: string) => void
  currentGridSpaceId: string | null
  onCreateGridSpace?: () => Promise<string | null> // 返回新创建的 gridSpaceId
  onSaveGridSpace?: (gridSpaceId: string) => Promise<void> // 保存 Grid Space
  unsavedSpaces?: Map<string, boolean> // 未保存的 space ID 映射
  w?: string
}

function AIGridSidebar({ 
  onGridSpaceSelect, 
  currentGridSpaceId, 
  onCreateGridSpace, 
  onSaveGridSpace,
  unsavedSpaces = new Map(),
  w = "220px" 
}: AIGridSidebarProps) {
  const toast = useToast()
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("")
  const [isSearchFocused, setIsSearchFocused] = useState(false)
  const [isMarketplaceOpen, setIsMarketplaceOpen] = useState(false)
  const [pinnedApps, setPinnedApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [dropdownHighlight, setDropdownHighlight] = useState(true)
  const [savedGridSpaces, setSavedGridSpaces] = useState<GridSpace[]>([])
  const [currentGridSpace, setCurrentGridSpace] = useState<GridSpace | null>(null)

  // Load grid spaces
  const loadGridSpaces = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const spaces = await GridSpaceService.getUserGridSpaces()
      setSavedGridSpaces(spaces)
      
      if (currentGridSpaceId) {
        const space = spaces.find((s) => s.id === currentGridSpaceId)
        setCurrentGridSpace(space || null)
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load grid spaces:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to load grid spaces",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, toast])

  useEffect(() => {
    loadGridSpaces()
  }, [loadGridSpaces])

  // Load pinned applications
  useEffect(() => {
    try {
      const stored = localStorage.getItem("pinned_apps")
      if (stored) {
        setPinnedApps(JSON.parse(stored))
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("Failed to parse pinned_apps from localStorage", e)
    }
  }, [])

  const handleAppPin = (app: AppNode) => {
    const isAlreadyPinned = pinnedApps.some((p) => p.id === app.id)
    if (isAlreadyPinned) return
    const next = [...pinnedApps, app]
    setPinnedApps(next)
    localStorage.setItem("pinned_apps", JSON.stringify(next))
    toast({
      title: "Application Pinned",
      description: `${app.name} added to menu`,
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
      isClosable: true,
    })
  }

  const handleGridSpaceRename = async (gridSpaceId: string, newName: string) => {
    try {
      await GridSpaceService.updateGridSpace(gridSpaceId, { name: newName })
      await loadGridSpaces()
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to rename grid space:", error)
      throw error
    }
  }

  const handleGridSpaceDelete = async (gridSpaceId: string) => {
    try {
      await GridSpaceService.deleteGridSpace(gridSpaceId)
      await loadGridSpaces()
      if (currentGridSpaceId === gridSpaceId) {
        onGridSpaceSelect("")
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to delete grid space:", error)
      throw error
    }
  }

  const filteredGridSpaces = useMemo(() => {
    const allSpaces: GridSpace[] = []
    
    if (currentGridSpace) {
      allSpaces.push(currentGridSpace)
    }
    
    const otherSpaces = savedGridSpaces.filter(
      (space) => !currentGridSpace || space.id !== currentGridSpace.id
    )
    allSpaces.push(...otherSpaces)
    
    return allSpaces.filter(
      (space) =>
        space.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
        (space.description &&
          space.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()))
    )
  }, [savedGridSpaces, currentGridSpace, searchQuery])

  const filteredApplications = useMemo(
    () =>
      pinnedApps.filter(
        (app) =>
          app.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
          (app.description &&
            app.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()))
      ),
    [pinnedApps, searchQuery]
  )

  return (
    <Box
      w={w}
      h="100%"
      bg="white"
      borderRight="1px solid"
      borderColor="gray.200"
      display="flex"
      flexDirection="column"
    >
      {/* Search Section */}
      <Box p={4} borderBottom="1px solid" borderColor="gray.100" position="relative">
        <InputGroup size="sm">
          <InputLeftElement pointerEvents="none">
            <FiSearch color="gray.400" />
          </InputLeftElement>
          <Input
            placeholder="Search Space/Agents/Cards"
            value={searchQuery}
            onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
            onFocus={() => setIsSearchFocused(true)}
            onBlur={() => setTimeout(() => setIsSearchFocused(false), 150)}
            onKeyDown={(e) => {
              if (searchQuery.trim() === "" && isSearchFocused) {
                if (e.key === "ArrowDown" || e.key === "ArrowUp") {
                  setDropdownHighlight(true)
                } else if (e.key === "Enter" && dropdownHighlight) {
                  setIsMarketplaceOpen(true)
                  setDropdownHighlight(false)
                } else if (e.key === "Escape") {
                  setDropdownHighlight(false)
                }
              }
            }}
            bg="gray.50"
            border="none"
            _focus={{ bg: "white", border: "1px solid", borderColor: "blue.200" }}
          />
        </InputGroup>
        {isSearchFocused && searchQuery.trim() === "" && (
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            top="56px"
            left="16px"
            right="16px"
            zIndex={20}
            border="1px solid"
            borderColor="gray.200"
            borderRadius="md"
            shadow="md"
            bg="white"
          >
            <Box
              px={2}
              py={2}
              cursor="pointer"
              bg={dropdownHighlight ? "blue.50" : undefined}
              _hover={{ bg: "blue.50" }}
              onMouseEnter={() => setDropdownHighlight(true)}
              onMouseLeave={() => setDropdownHighlight(false)}
              onMouseDown={(e) => {
                e.preventDefault()
                setIsMarketplaceOpen(true)
              }}
            >
              <HStack spacing={1}>
                <FiGrid color="gray.500" />
                <Text fontSize="xs">Application Marketplace</Text>
              </HStack>
            </Box>
          </Box>
        )}
      </Box>

      {/* Content Sections */}
      <VStack flex="1" spacing={0} align="stretch" overflow="hidden">
        {/* SPACES Section */}
        <Box flex="1" overflow="hidden" data-section="spaces">
          <HStack p={3} justify="space-between" bg="gray.50">
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <FiGrid size={14} color="gray.600" />
              <Text fontSize="xs" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.600" textTransform="uppercase">
                SPACES
              </Text>
            </HStack>
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="gray" variant="subtle">
                {filteredGridSpaces.length}
              </Badge>
              {onCreateGridSpace && (
                <Tooltip label="Create New Grid Space" placement="top">
                  <IconButton
                    aria-label="Create New Grid Space"
                    icon={<FiPlus />}
                    size="xs"
                    variant="ghost"
                    colorScheme="blue"
                    onClick={async () => {
                      const newId = await onCreateGridSpace()
                      if (newId) {
                        onGridSpaceSelect(newId)
                      }
                    }}
                  />
                </Tooltip>
              )}
            </HStack>
          </HStack>

          <Box p={3} overflow="auto" maxH="300px">
            {filteredGridSpaces.length > 0 ? (
              <SimpleGrid columns={1} spacing={3}>
                {filteredGridSpaces.map((space) => {
                  const isCurrent = currentGridSpace && space.id === currentGridSpace.id
                  const hasUnsavedChanges = unsavedSpaces.get(space.id) || false
                  return (
                    <GridSpaceCard
                      key={space.id}
                      gridSpace={{
                        id: space.id,
                        name: space.name,
                        description: space.description,
                        createdAt: space.create_time,
                        isTemporary: (space as any).isTemporary,
                      }}
                      onClick={onGridSpaceSelect}
                      onRename={handleGridSpaceRename}
                      onDelete={handleGridSpaceDelete}
                      onSave={onSaveGridSpace}
                      isCurrent={isCurrent || false}
                      hasUnsavedChanges={hasUnsavedChanges}
                    />
                  )
                })}
              </SimpleGrid>
            ) : (
              <VStack spacing={3} py={4}>
                <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500" textAlign="center">
                  {searchQuery ? "No matching spaces" : "No grid spaces yet"}
                </Text>
                {onCreateGridSpace && !searchQuery && (
                  <Button
                    size="sm"
                    colorScheme="blue"
                    leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
                    onClick={async () => {
                      const newId = await onCreateGridSpace()
                      if (newId) {
                        onGridSpaceSelect(newId)
                      }
                    }}
                  >
                    Create New Grid Space
                  </Button>
                )}
              </VStack>
            )}
          </Box>
        </Box>

        <Divider />

        {/* AGENTS Section */}
        <Box flex="1" overflow="hidden" data-section="agents">
          <HStack p={3} justify="space-between" bg="gray.50">
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <FiUsers size={14} color="gray.600" />
              <Text fontSize="xs" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.600" textTransform="uppercase">
                AGENTS
              </Text>
            </HStack>
            <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="gray" variant="subtle">
              {pinnedApps.length}
            </Badge>
          </HStack>
          <Box p={3} overflow="auto" maxH="400px">
            {pinnedApps.length === 0 ? (
              <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500" textAlign="center" py={4}>
                No pinned applications, add them from Application Marketplace
              </Text>
            ) : (
              <SimpleGrid columns={1} spacing={2}>
                {filteredApplications.map((app) => {
                  const handleUnpin = (applicationId: number) => {
                    setPinnedApps((prev) => {
                      const updated = prev.filter((a) => a.id !== applicationId)
                      localStorage.setItem("pinned_apps", JSON.stringify(updated))
                      return updated
                    })
                    toast({
                      title: "Unpinned",
                      description: `${app.name} removed from AGENTS area`,
                      status: "info",
                      duration: 2000,
                      isClosable: true,
                    })
                  }

                  return (
                    <ApplicationCard
                      key={app.id}
                      application={app}
                      showUnpinButton={true}
                      onUnpin={handleUnpin}
                    />
                  )
                })}
              </SimpleGrid>
            )}
          </Box>
        </Box>
      </VStack>

      {/* Marketplace Modal */}
      <Modal
        isOpen={isMarketplaceOpen}
        onClose={() => setIsMarketplaceOpen(false)}
        size="6xl"
        motionPreset="scale"
        closeOnOverlayClick={false}
      >
        <ModalOverlay />
        <ModalContent maxW="90vw">
          <ModalHeader />
          <ModalCloseButton />
          <ModalBody p={0}>
            <ApplicationMarketplace
              isOpen={isMarketplaceOpen}
              onAppPin={(app) => {
                handleAppPin(app)
                setPinnedApps(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("pinned_apps") || "[]"))
              }}
              pinnedApps={pinnedApps}
              onBack={() => setIsMarketplaceOpen(false)}
              onAppSelect={() => {
                setPinnedApps(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("pinned_apps") || "[]"))
              }}
            />
          </ModalBody>
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>
    </Box>
  )
}

export default React.memo(AIGridSidebar)


```

```typescriptreact
import { AppNodeService } from "@/services/appNodeService"
import type { AppNode } from "@/types/appNode"
import {
  Badge,
  Box,
  Button,
  Container,
  Divider,
  Flex,
  HStack,
  Heading,
  Icon,
  IconButton,
  Input,
  InputGroup,
  InputLeftElement,
  SimpleGrid,
  Spinner,
  Text,
  Tooltip,
  VStack,
  useColorModeValue,
  useToast,
} from "@chakra-ui/react"
import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"
import {
  FiBarChart,
  FiBookOpen,
  FiBriefcase,
  FiEdit3,
  FiFileText,
  FiGrid,
  FiHelpCircle,
  FiPlus,
  FiSearch,
  FiSettings,
  FiX,
  FiZap,
} from "react-icons/fi"

interface ApplicationMarketplaceProps {
  onAppPin: (app: AppNode) => void
  pinnedApps: AppNode[]
  onBack?: () => void
  onAppSelect?: (app: AppNode) => void
  isOpen?: boolean // 用于触发重新加载应用列表
}

// Agent category interface
interface AgentCategory {
  id: string
  name: string
  description: string
  icon: any
  color: string
  gradient: string
}

// Mock agent categories for demonstration
const agentCategories: AgentCategory[] = [
  {
    id: "productivity",
    name: "Productivity Coach",
    description:
      "Enhance your productivity with AI-powered coaching and task management.",
    icon: FiEdit3,
    color: "purple",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, purple.100, purple.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "writing",
    name: "Writing Coach",
    description: "Take your writing to the next level with Writing Coach.",
    icon: FiFileText,
    color: "blue",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, blue.100, blue.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "idea",
    name: "Idea Coach",
    description: "Plan and navigate the brainstorming process.",
    icon: FiZap,
    color: "orange",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, orange.100, orange.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "career",
    name: "Career Coach",
    description: "Elevate your career with Career Coach.",
    icon: FiBriefcase,
    color: "teal",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, teal.100, teal.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "learning",
    name: "Learning Coach",
    description: "Unlock your potential with Learning Coach.",
    icon: FiBookOpen,
    color: "orange",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, orange.100, orange.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "analytics",
    name: "Analytics Agent",
    description: "Advanced data analysis and reporting capabilities.",
    icon: FiBarChart,
    color: "purple",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, purple.100, purple.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "admin",
    name: "System Admin",
    description: "Use AI to help you manage system administration tasks.",
    icon: FiSettings,
    color: "gray",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, gray.100, gray.200)",
  },
]

export default function ApplicationMarketplace({
  onAppPin,
  pinnedApps,
  onBack,
  onAppSelect,
  isOpen = true, // 默认true，兼容未传入的情况
}: ApplicationMarketplaceProps) {
  const toast = useToast()

  const [allApps, setAllApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [filteredApps, setFilteredApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState("")
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
  const [selectedCategory] = useState<string>("all")

  // 颜色模式
  const bgColor = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")
  const cardBg = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")

  // 加载所有应用函数
  const loadAllApps = React.useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      setIsLoading(true)
      // 在Standard模式下，只获取用户有权限访问的应用
      // 在Custom模式下，获取所有已发布的应用
      const apps = await AppNodeService.getUserApps()
      console.log("🔄 ApplicationMarketplace - Loaded apps:", {
        totalApps: apps.length,
        apps: apps.map(app => ({ id: app.id, name: app.name })),
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
      })
      setAllApps(apps)
      setFilteredApps(apps)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load all apps:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Loading Failed",
        description: "Unable to load application list",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      // 即使失败也要清空状态，避免显示旧数据
      setAllApps([])
      setFilteredApps([])
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false)
    }
  }, [toast])

  // 加载所有应用 - 在组件挂载时和Modal打开时重新加载
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      loadAllApps()
    }
  }, [isOpen, loadAllApps]) // 依赖isOpen，每次打开Modal时重新加载

  // 搜索和分类过滤
  useEffect(() => {
    let filtered = allApps

    // 按搜索词过滤
    if (searchTerm.trim() !== "") {
      filtered = filtered.filter(
        (app) =>
          app.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
          app.description?.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()),
      )
    }

    // 按分类过滤
    if (selectedCategory !== "all") {
      filtered = filtered.filter((app) => {
        // 这里可以根据实际需求添加分类逻辑
        // 暂时按应用名称包含关键词来分类
        const categoryKeywords: { [key: string]: string[] } = {
          productivity: ["productivity", "task", "management"],
          writing: ["writing", "document", "text"],
          idea: ["idea", "brainstorm", "creative"],
          career: ["career", "job", "professional"],
          learning: ["learning", "education", "study"],
          analytics: ["analytics", "report", "data"],
          admin: ["admin", "system", "management"],
        }

        const keywords = categoryKeywords[selectedCategory] || []
        return keywords.some(
          (keyword) =>
            app.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword) ||
            app.description?.toLowerCase().includes(keyword),
        )
      })
    }

    setFilteredApps(filtered)
  }, [searchTerm, selectedCategory, allApps])

  const handleAppPin = (app: AppNode) => {
    // 检查是否已经PIN了
    const isAlreadyPinned = pinnedApps.some((pinned) => pinned.id === app.id)
    if (isAlreadyPinned) {
      toast({
        title: "Application Already Pinned",
        description: `${app.name} is already in the left menu`,
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      return
    }

    onAppPin(app)
    toast({
      title: "Application Pinned",
      description: `${app.name} has been added to the left menu`,
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
      isClosable: true,
    })
  }

  const isAppPinned = (app: AppNode) => {
    return pinnedApps.some((pinned) => pinned.id === app.id)
  }

  const handleAppSelect = (app: AppNode) => {
    // 点击卡片时，如果未pin则pin，已pin则只触发选择回调
    if (!isAppPinned(app)) {
      // 未pin的应用，点击卡片时pin
      handleAppPin(app)
    }
    // 调用onAppSelect回调（如果有）
    if (onAppSelect) {
      onAppSelect(app)
    }
  }

  return (
    <Box bg={bgColor} minH="100vh">
      {/* Header Section - Moved to top */}
      <Box pt={4} px={6} pb={4} borderBottom="1px solid" borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}>
        {/* 顶部行只展示标题，隐藏返回按钮，Modal有X关闭键 */}
        <Flex justify="space-between" align="flex-start" mb={2}>
          <Heading fontSize="20px" fontWeight="bold" color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}>Application Marketplace</Heading>
        </Flex>

        {/* Description text */}
        <Text
          fontSize="sm"
          color={useColorModeValue("gray.600", "gray.300")}
          maxW="2xl"
          mb={4}
        >
          Find applications with the expertise to help you complete complex
          tasks.
        </Text>

        {/* Search Bar - Microsoft Style */}
        <Box maxW="2xl" mb={4}>
              <InputGroup size="lg">
                <InputLeftElement pointerEvents="none" pl={4}>
                  <FiSearch color="gray.400" size={20} />
                </InputLeftElement>
                <Input
                  placeholder="Search Applications"
                  value={searchTerm}
                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
                  bg={useColorModeValue("white", "gray.700")}
                  border="2px solid"
                  borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                  borderRadius="lg"
                  pl={12}
                  pr={4}
                  py={6}
                  fontSize="md"
                  _focus={{
                    borderColor: "blue.500",
                    boxShadow: "0 0 0 1px #3182ce",
                  }}
                  _hover={{
                    borderColor: useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.500"),
                  }}
                />
              </InputGroup>
            </Box>
          </Box>

          {/* Featured Section */}
          <Box>
            <Heading
              fontSize="14px"
              fontWeight="bold"
              color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
              mb={6}
            >
              Featured
            </Heading>

            {/* Search and Filter Controls */}
            <Flex
              justify="space-between"
              align="center"
              mb={6}
              wrap="wrap"
              gap={4}
            >
              <HStack spacing={4}>
                <Badge
                  colorScheme="blue"
                  variant="subtle"
                  px={4}
                  py={2}
                  borderRadius="full"
                  fontSize="sm"
                  fontWeight="600"
                >
                  TOTAL {filteredApps.length} APPS
                </Badge>
                <Badge
                  colorScheme="green"
                  variant="subtle"
                  px={4}
                  py={2}
                  borderRadius="full"
                  fontSize="sm"
                  fontWeight="600"
                >
                  PINNED {pinnedApps.length}
                </Badge>
              </HStack>
            </Flex>

            {/* Applications Grid */}
            {isLoading ? (
              <Flex justify="center" align="center" py={20}>
                <Spinner size="xl" color="blue.500" />
              </Flex>
            ) : filteredApps.length === 0 ? (
              <Box textAlign="center" py={20}>
                <Icon as={FiGrid} boxSize={16} color="gray.300" mb={4} />
                <Text fontSize="lg" color="gray.500" mb={2}>
                  {searchTerm
                    ? "No matching applications found"
                    : "No applications available"}
                </Text>
                <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.400">
                  Try adjusting your search terms or check back later for new
                  applications.
                </Text>
              </Box>
            ) : (
              <SimpleGrid
                columns={{ base: 1, md: 2, lg: 3, xl: 4 }}
                spacing={6}
              >
                {filteredApps.map((app) => {
                  const isPinned = isAppPinned(app)
                  return (
                    <Box
                      key={app.id}
                      bg={cardBg}
                      borderRadius="xl"
                      p={6}
                      cursor="pointer"
                      border="1px solid"
                      borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                      _hover={{
                        transform: "translateY(-2px)",
                        boxShadow: "0 8px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)",
                        borderColor: "blue.300",
                      }}
                      transition="all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)"
                      position="relative"
                      overflow="hidden"
                      // 点击整个卡片触发handleAppSelect，内部会处理pin逻辑
                      onClick={() => {
                        handleAppSelect(app)
                      }}
                    >
                      {/* Gradient Background */}
                      <Box
                        position="absolute"
                        top={0}
                        left={0}
                        right={0}
                        height="120px"
                        bgGradient="linear(to-br, blue.100, blue.200)"
                        opacity={0.1}
                      />

                      {/* Add Icon - Only show for unpinned apps */}
                      {!isPinned && (
                        <Box position="absolute" top={3} right={3} zIndex={10}>
                          <Tooltip label="PIN Application" placement="top">
                            <IconButton
                              aria-label="PIN Application"
                              icon={<FiPlus />}
                              size="sm"
                              variant="ghost"
                              onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); onAppPin(app); }}
                              _hover={{
                                transform: "scale(1.05)",
                                bg: "gray.100",
                              }}
                              transition="all 0.2s"
                              borderRadius="md"
                            />
                          </Tooltip>
                        </Box>
                      )}

                      {/* Icon */}
                      <Box position="relative" zIndex={1} mb={4}>
                        <Icon as={FiGrid} boxSize={8} color="blue.500" />
                      </Box>

                      {/* Content */}
                      <Box position="relative" zIndex={1}>
                        <HStack
                          spacing={2}
                          align="center"
                          justify="space-between"
                        >
                          <Tooltip
                            label={app.name}
                            placement="bottom"
                            hasArrow
                            bg="white"
                            color="gray.800"
                            fontSize="sm"
                            borderRadius="lg"
                            boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                            border="1px solid"
                            borderColor="gray.200"
                            px={3}
                            py={2}
                            openDelay={500}
                            closeOnClick={false}
                          >
                            <Heading
                              fontSize="sm"
                              fontWeight="bold"
                              color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
                              flex="1"
                              minW="0"
                              noOfLines={1}
                              cursor="help"
                              _hover={{ color: "blue.500" }}
                              transition="color 0.2s"
                            >
                              {app.name}
                            </Heading>
                          </Tooltip>
                          <Tooltip
                            label={
                              app.description ||
                              `The ${app.name} application provides comprehensive management and monitoring capabilities for your business needs.`
                            }
                            placement="right"
                            hasArrow
                            bg="white"
                            color="gray.800"
                            fontSize="sm"
                            maxW="280px"
                            whiteSpace="pre-wrap"
                            openDelay={300}
                            closeOnClick={false}
                            borderRadius="lg"
                            boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                            border="1px solid"
                            borderColor="gray.200"
                            px={3}
                            py={2}
                          >
                            <Box
                              display="flex"
                              alignItems="center"
                              justifyContent="center"
                              w="20px"
                              h="20px"
                              cursor="help"
                            >
                              <Icon
                                as={FiHelpCircle}
                                boxSize={4}
                                color={useColorModeValue(
                                  "gray.400",
                                  "gray.500",
                                )}
                                _hover={{
                                  color: "blue.500",
                                  transform: "scale(1.1)",
                                }}
                                transition="all 0.2s"
                              />
                            </Box>
                          </Tooltip>
                        </HStack>
                      </Box>
                    </Box>
                  )
                })}
              </SimpleGrid>
            )}
          </Box>

          <Divider />

          {/* Fake Examples Section */}
          <Box>
            <Heading
              fontSize="14px"
              fontWeight="bold"
              color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
              mb={6}
            >
              Fake Examples
            </Heading>
            <SimpleGrid columns={{ base: 1, md: 2, lg: 3, xl: 4 }} spacing={6}>
              {agentCategories.map((category) => (
                <Box
                  key={category.id}
                  bg={cardBg}
                  borderRadius="xl"
                  p={6}
                  cursor="pointer"
                  border="1px solid"
                  borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                  _hover={{
                    transform: "translateY(-2px)",
                    boxShadow: "0 8px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)",
                    borderColor: "blue.300",
                  }}
                  transition="all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)"
                  position="relative"
                  overflow="hidden"
                >
                  {/* Gradient Background */}
                  <Box
                    position="absolute"
                    top={0}
                    left={0}
                    right={0}
                    height="120px"
                    bgGradient={category.gradient}
                    opacity={0.1}
                  />

                  {/* Icon */}
                  <Box position="relative" zIndex={1} mb={4}>
                    <Icon
                      as={category.icon}
                      boxSize={8}
                      color={`${category.color}.500`}
                    />
                  </Box>

                  {/* Content */}
                  <Box position="relative" zIndex={1}>
                    <HStack spacing={2} align="center" justify="space-between">
                      <Tooltip
                        label={category.name}
                        placement="bottom"
                        hasArrow
                        bg="white"
                        color="gray.800"
                        fontSize="sm"
                        borderRadius="lg"
                        boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                        border="1px solid"
                        borderColor="gray.200"
                        px={3}
                        py={2}
                        openDelay={500}
                        closeOnClick={false}
                      >
                        <Heading
                          fontSize="sm"
                          fontWeight="bold"
                          color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
                          flex="1"
                          minW="0"
                          noOfLines={1}
                          cursor="help"
                          _hover={{ color: "blue.500" }}
                          transition="color 0.2s"
                        >
                          {category.name}
                        </Heading>
                      </Tooltip>
                      <Tooltip
                        label={category.description}
                        placement="right"
                        hasArrow
                        bg="white"
                        color="gray.800"
                        fontSize="sm"
                        maxW="280px"
                        whiteSpace="pre-wrap"
                        openDelay={300}
                        closeOnClick={false}
                        borderRadius="lg"
                        boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                        border="1px solid"
                        borderColor="gray.200"
                        px={3}
                        py={2}
                      >
                        <Box
                          display="flex"
                          alignItems="center"
                          justifyContent="center"
                          w="20px"
                          h="20px"
                          cursor="help"
                        >
                          <Icon
                            as={FiHelpCircle}
                            boxSize={4}
                            color={useColorModeValue("gray.400", "gray.500")}
                            _hover={{
                              color: "blue.500",
                              transform: "scale(1.1)",
                            }}
                            transition="all 0.2s"
                          />
                        </Box>
                      </Tooltip>
                    </HStack>
                  </Box>
                </Box>
              ))}
            </SimpleGrid>
          </Box>
        </VStack>
      </Container>
    </Box>
  )
}

```

```typescriptreact
import { AppNodeService } from "@/services/appNodeService"
import type { AppNode } from "@/types/appNode"
import {
  Badge,
  Box,
  Button,
  Container,
  Divider,
  Flex,
  HStack,
  Heading,
  Icon,
  IconButton,
  Input,
  InputGroup,
  InputLeftElement,
  SimpleGrid,
  Spinner,
  Text,
  Tooltip,
  VStack,
  useColorModeValue,
  useToast,
} from "@chakra-ui/react"
import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"
import {
  FiBarChart,
  FiBookOpen,
  FiBriefcase,
  FiEdit3,
  FiFileText,
  FiGrid,
  FiHelpCircle,
  FiPlus,
  FiSearch,
  FiSettings,
  FiX,
  FiZap,
} from "react-icons/fi"

interface ApplicationMarketplaceProps {
  onAppPin: (app: AppNode) => void
  pinnedApps: AppNode[]
  onBack?: () => void
  onAppSelect?: (app: AppNode) => void
  isOpen?: boolean // 用于触发重新加载应用列表
}

// Agent category interface
interface AgentCategory {
  id: string
  name: string
  description: string
  icon: any
  color: string
  gradient: string
}

// Mock agent categories for demonstration
const agentCategories: AgentCategory[] = [
  {
    id: "productivity",
    name: "Productivity Coach",
    description:
      "Enhance your productivity with AI-powered coaching and task management.",
    icon: FiEdit3,
    color: "purple",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, purple.100, purple.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "writing",
    name: "Writing Coach",
    description: "Take your writing to the next level with Writing Coach.",
    icon: FiFileText,
    color: "blue",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, blue.100, blue.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "idea",
    name: "Idea Coach",
    description: "Plan and navigate the brainstorming process.",
    icon: FiZap,
    color: "orange",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, orange.100, orange.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "career",
    name: "Career Coach",
    description: "Elevate your career with Career Coach.",
    icon: FiBriefcase,
    color: "teal",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, teal.100, teal.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "learning",
    name: "Learning Coach",
    description: "Unlock your potential with Learning Coach.",
    icon: FiBookOpen,
    color: "orange",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, orange.100, orange.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "analytics",
    name: "Analytics Agent",
    description: "Advanced data analysis and reporting capabilities.",
    icon: FiBarChart,
    color: "purple",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, purple.100, purple.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "admin",
    name: "System Admin",
    description: "Use AI to help you manage system administration tasks.",
    icon: FiSettings,
    color: "gray",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, gray.100, gray.200)",
  },
]

export default function ApplicationMarketplace({
  onAppPin,
  pinnedApps,
  onBack,
  onAppSelect,
  isOpen = true, // 默认true，兼容未传入的情况
}: ApplicationMarketplaceProps) {
  const toast = useToast()

  const [allApps, setAllApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [filteredApps, setFilteredApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState("")
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
  const [selectedCategory] = useState<string>("all")

  // 颜色模式
  const bgColor = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")
  const cardBg = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")

  // 加载所有应用函数
  const loadAllApps = React.useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      setIsLoading(true)
      // 在Standard模式下，只获取用户有权限访问的应用
      // 在Custom模式下，获取所有已发布的应用
      const apps = await AppNodeService.getUserApps()
      console.log("🔄 ApplicationMarketplace - Loaded apps:", {
        totalApps: apps.length,
        apps: apps.map(app => ({ id: app.id, name: app.name })),
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
      })
      setAllApps(apps)
      setFilteredApps(apps)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load all apps:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Loading Failed",
        description: "Unable to load application list",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      // 即使失败也要清空状态，避免显示旧数据
      setAllApps([])
      setFilteredApps([])
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false)
    }
  }, [toast])

  // 加载所有应用 - 在组件挂载时和Modal打开时重新加载
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      loadAllApps()
    }
  }, [isOpen, loadAllApps]) // 依赖isOpen，每次打开Modal时重新加载

  // 搜索和分类过滤
  useEffect(() => {
    let filtered = allApps

    // 按搜索词过滤
    if (searchTerm.trim() !== "") {
      filtered = filtered.filter(
        (app) =>
          app.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
          app.description?.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()),
      )
    }

    // 按分类过滤
    if (selectedCategory !== "all") {
      filtered = filtered.filter((app) => {
        // 这里可以根据实际需求添加分类逻辑
        // 暂时按应用名称包含关键词来分类
        const categoryKeywords: { [key: string]: string[] } = {
          productivity: ["productivity", "task", "management"],
          writing: ["writing", "document", "text"],
          idea: ["idea", "brainstorm", "creative"],
          career: ["career", "job", "professional"],
          learning: ["learning", "education", "study"],
          analytics: ["analytics", "report", "data"],
          admin: ["admin", "system", "management"],
        }

        const keywords = categoryKeywords[selectedCategory] || []
        return keywords.some(
          (keyword) =>
            app.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword) ||
            app.description?.toLowerCase().includes(keyword),
        )
      })
    }

    setFilteredApps(filtered)
  }, [searchTerm, selectedCategory, allApps])

  const handleAppPin = (app: AppNode) => {
    // 检查是否已经PIN了
    const isAlreadyPinned = pinnedApps.some((pinned) => pinned.id === app.id)
    if (isAlreadyPinned) {
      toast({
        title: "Application Already Pinned",
        description: `${app.name} is already in the left menu`,
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      return
    }

    onAppPin(app)
    toast({
      title: "Application Pinned",
      description: `${app.name} has been added to the left menu`,
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
      isClosable: true,
    })
  }

  const isAppPinned = (app: AppNode) => {
    return pinnedApps.some((pinned) => pinned.id === app.id)
  }

  const handleAppSelect = (app: AppNode) => {
    // 点击卡片时，如果未pin则pin，已pin则只触发选择回调
    if (!isAppPinned(app)) {
      // 未pin的应用，点击卡片时pin
      handleAppPin(app)
    }
    // 调用onAppSelect回调（如果有）
    if (onAppSelect) {
      onAppSelect(app)
    }
  }

  return (
    <Box bg={bgColor} minH="100vh">
      {/* Header Section - Moved to top */}
      <Box pt={4} px={6} pb={4} borderBottom="1px solid" borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}>
        {/* 顶部行只展示标题，隐藏返回按钮，Modal有X关闭键 */}
        <Flex justify="space-between" align="flex-start" mb={2}>
          <Heading fontSize="20px" fontWeight="bold" color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}>Application Marketplace</Heading>
        </Flex>

        {/* Description text */}
        <Text
          fontSize="sm"
          color={useColorModeValue("gray.600", "gray.300")}
          maxW="2xl"
          mb={4}
        >
          Find applications with the expertise to help you complete complex
          tasks.
        </Text>

        {/* Search Bar - Microsoft Style */}
        <Box maxW="2xl" mb={4}>
              <InputGroup size="lg">
                <InputLeftElement pointerEvents="none" pl={4}>
                  <FiSearch color="gray.400" size={20} />
                </InputLeftElement>
                <Input
                  placeholder="Search Applications"
                  value={searchTerm}
                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
                  bg={useColorModeValue("white", "gray.700")}
                  border="2px solid"
                  borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                  borderRadius="lg"
                  pl={12}
                  pr={4}
                  py={6}
                  fontSize="md"
                  _focus={{
                    borderColor: "blue.500",
                    boxShadow: "0 0 0 1px #3182ce",
                  }}
                  _hover={{
                    borderColor: useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.500"),
                  }}
                />
              </InputGroup>
            </Box>
      </Box>

      <Container maxW="7xl" py={4}>
        <VStack spacing={4} align="stretch">

          {/* Featured Section */}
          <Box>
            <Heading
              fontSize="14px"
              fontWeight="bold"
              color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
              mb={6}
            >
              Featured
            </Heading>

            {/* Search and Filter Controls */}
            <Flex
              justify="space-between"
              align="center"
              mb={6}
              wrap="wrap"
              gap={4}
            >
              <HStack spacing={4}>
                <Badge
                  colorScheme="blue"
                  variant="subtle"
                  px={4}
                  py={2}
                  borderRadius="full"
                  fontSize="sm"
                  fontWeight="600"
                >
                  TOTAL {filteredApps.length} APPS
                </Badge>
                <Badge
                  colorScheme="green"
                  variant="subtle"
                  px={4}
                  py={2}
                  borderRadius="full"
                  fontSize="sm"
                  fontWeight="600"
                >
                  PINNED {pinnedApps.length}
                </Badge>
              </HStack>
            </Flex>

            {/* Applications Grid */}
            {isLoading ? (
              <Flex justify="center" align="center" py={20}>
                <Spinner size="xl" color="blue.500" />
              </Flex>
            ) : filteredApps.length === 0 ? (
              <Box textAlign="center" py={20}>
                <Icon as={FiGrid} boxSize={16} color="gray.300" mb={4} />
                <Text fontSize="lg" color="gray.500" mb={2}>
                  {searchTerm
                    ? "No matching applications found"
                    : "No applications available"}
                </Text>
                <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.400">
                  Try adjusting your search terms or check back later for new
                  applications.
                </Text>
              </Box>
            ) : (
              <SimpleGrid
                columns={{ base: 1, md: 2, lg: 3, xl: 4 }}
                spacing={6}
              >
                {filteredApps.map((app) => {
                  const isPinned = isAppPinned(app)
                  return (
                    <Box
                      key={app.id}
                      bg={cardBg}
                      borderRadius="xl"
                      p={6}
                      cursor="pointer"
                      border="1px solid"
                      borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                      _hover={{
                        transform: "translateY(-2px)",
                        boxShadow: "0 8px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)",
                        borderColor: "blue.300",
                      }}
                      transition="all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)"
                      position="relative"
                      overflow="hidden"
                      // 点击整个卡片触发handleAppSelect，内部会处理pin逻辑
                      onClick={() => {
                        handleAppSelect(app)
                      }}
                    >
                      {/* Gradient Background */}
                      <Box
                        position="absolute"
                        top={0}
                        left={0}
                        right={0}
                        height="120px"
                        bgGradient="linear(to-br, blue.100, blue.200)"
                        opacity={0.1}
                      />

                      {/* Add Icon - Only show for unpinned apps */}
                      {!isPinned && (
                        <Box position="absolute" top={3} right={3} zIndex={10}>
                          <Tooltip label="PIN Application" placement="top">
                            <IconButton
                              aria-label="PIN Application"
                              icon={<FiPlus />}
                              size="sm"
                              variant="ghost"
                              onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); onAppPin(app); }}
                              _hover={{
                                transform: "scale(1.05)",
                                bg: "gray.100",
                              }}
                              transition="all 0.2s"
                              borderRadius="md"
                            />
                          </Tooltip>
                        </Box>
                      )}

                      {/* Icon */}
                      <Box position="relative" zIndex={1} mb={4}>
                        <Icon as={FiGrid} boxSize={8} color="blue.500" />
                      </Box>

                      {/* Content */}
                      <Box position="relative" zIndex={1}>
                        <HStack
                          spacing={2}
                          align="center"
                          justify="space-between"
                        >
                          <Tooltip
                            label={app.name}
                            placement="bottom"
                            hasArrow
                            bg="white"
                            color="gray.800"
                            fontSize="sm"
                            borderRadius="lg"
                            boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                            border="1px solid"
                            borderColor="gray.200"
                            px={3}
                            py={2}
                            openDelay={500}
                            closeOnClick={false}
                          >
                            <Heading
                              fontSize="sm"
                              fontWeight="bold"
                              color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
                              flex="1"
                              minW="0"
                              noOfLines={1}
                              cursor="help"
                              _hover={{ color: "blue.500" }}
                              transition="color 0.2s"
                            >
                              {app.name}
                            </Heading>
                          </Tooltip>
                          <Tooltip
                            label={
                              app.description ||
                              `The ${app.name} application provides comprehensive management and monitoring capabilities for your business needs.`
                            }
                            placement="right"
                            hasArrow
                            bg="white"
                            color="gray.800"
                            fontSize="sm"
                            maxW="280px"
                            whiteSpace="pre-wrap"
                            openDelay={300}
                            closeOnClick={false}
                            borderRadius="lg"
                            boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                            border="1px solid"
                            borderColor="gray.200"
                            px={3}
                            py={2}
                          >
                            <Box
                              display="flex"
                              alignItems="center"
                              justifyContent="center"
                              w="20px"
                              h="20px"
                              cursor="help"
                            >
                              <Icon
                                as={FiHelpCircle}
                                boxSize={4}
                                color={useColorModeValue(
                                  "gray.400",
                                  "gray.500",
                                )}
                                _hover={{
                                  color: "blue.500",
                                  transform: "scale(1.1)",
                                }}
                                transition="all 0.2s"
                              />
                            </Box>
                          </Tooltip>
                        </HStack>
                      </Box>
                    </Box>
                  )
                })}
              </SimpleGrid>
            )}
          </Box>

          <Divider />

          {/* Fake Examples Section */}
          <Box>
            <Heading
              fontSize="14px"
              fontWeight="bold"
              color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
              mb={6}
            >
              Fake Examples
            </Heading>
            <SimpleGrid columns={{ base: 1, md: 2, lg: 3, xl: 4 }} spacing={6}>
              {agentCategories.map((category) => (
                <Box
                  key={category.id}
                  bg={cardBg}
                  borderRadius="xl"
                  p={6}
                  cursor="pointer"
                  border="1px solid"
                  borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                  _hover={{
                    transform: "translateY(-2px)",
                    boxShadow: "0 8px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)",
                    borderColor: "blue.300",
                  }}
                  transition="all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)"
                  position="relative"
                  overflow="hidden"
                >
                  {/* Gradient Background */}
                  <Box
                    position="absolute"
                    top={0}
                    left={0}
                    right={0}
                    height="120px"
                    bgGradient={category.gradient}
                    opacity={0.1}
                  />

                  {/* Icon */}
                  <Box position="relative" zIndex={1} mb={4}>
                    <Icon
                      as={category.icon}
                      boxSize={8}
                      color={`${category.color}.500`}
                    />
                  </Box>

                  {/* Content */}
                  <Box position="relative" zIndex={1}>
                    <HStack spacing={2} align="center" justify="space-between">
                      <Tooltip
                        label={category.name}
                        placement="bottom"
                        hasArrow
                        bg="white"
                        color="gray.800"
                        fontSize="sm"
                        borderRadius="lg"
                        boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                        border="1px solid"
                        borderColor="gray.200"
                        px={3}
                        py={2}
                        openDelay={500}
                        closeOnClick={false}
                      >
                        <Heading
                          fontSize="sm"
                          fontWeight="bold"
                          color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
                          flex="1"
                          minW="0"
                          noOfLines={1}
                          cursor="help"
                          _hover={{ color: "blue.500" }}
                          transition="color 0.2s"
                        >
                          {category.name}
                        </Heading>
                      </Tooltip>
                      <Tooltip
                        label={category.description}
                        placement="right"
                        hasArrow
                        bg="white"
                        color="gray.800"
                        fontSize="sm"
                        maxW="280px"
                        whiteSpace="pre-wrap"
                        openDelay={300}
                        closeOnClick={false}
                        borderRadius="lg"
                        boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                        border="1px solid"
                        borderColor="gray.200"
                        px={3}
                        py={2}
                      >
                        <Box
                          display="flex"
                          alignItems="center"
                          justifyContent="center"
                          w="20px"
                          h="20px"
                          cursor="help"
                        >
                          <Icon
                            as={FiHelpCircle}
                            boxSize={4}
                            color={useColorModeValue("gray.400", "gray.500")}
                            _hover={{
                              color: "blue.500",
                              transform: "scale(1.1)",
                            }}
                            transition="all 0.2s"
                          />
                        </Box>
                      </Tooltip>
                    </HStack>
                  </Box>
                </Box>
              ))}
            </SimpleGrid>
          </Box>
        </VStack>
      </Container>
    </Box>
  )
}

```

```typescriptreact
import { AppNodeService } from "@/services/appNodeService"
import type { AppNode } from "@/types/appNode"
import {
  Badge,
  Box,
  Button,
  Container,
  Divider,
  Flex,
  HStack,
  Heading,
  Icon,
  IconButton,
  Input,
  InputGroup,
  InputLeftElement,
  SimpleGrid,
  Spinner,
  Text,
  Tooltip,
  VStack,
  useColorModeValue,
  useToast,
} from "@chakra-ui/react"
import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"
import {
  FiBarChart,
  FiBookOpen,
  FiBriefcase,
  FiEdit3,
  FiFileText,
  FiGrid,
  FiHelpCircle,
  FiPlus,
  FiSearch,
  FiSettings,
  FiX,
  FiZap,
} from "react-icons/fi"

interface ApplicationMarketplaceProps {
  onAppPin: (app: AppNode) => void
  pinnedApps: AppNode[]
  onBack?: () => void
  onAppSelect?: (app: AppNode) => void
  isOpen?: boolean // 用于触发重新加载应用列表
}

// Agent category interface
interface AgentCategory {
  id: string
  name: string
  description: string
  icon: any
  color: string
  gradient: string
}

// Mock agent categories for demonstration
const agentCategories: AgentCategory[] = [
  {
    id: "productivity",
    name: "Productivity Coach",
    description:
      "Enhance your productivity with AI-powered coaching and task management.",
    icon: FiEdit3,
    color: "purple",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, purple.100, purple.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "writing",
    name: "Writing Coach",
    description: "Take your writing to the next level with Writing Coach.",
    icon: FiFileText,
    color: "blue",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, blue.100, blue.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "idea",
    name: "Idea Coach",
    description: "Plan and navigate the brainstorming process.",
    icon: FiZap,
    color: "orange",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, orange.100, orange.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "career",
    name: "Career Coach",
    description: "Elevate your career with Career Coach.",
    icon: FiBriefcase,
    color: "teal",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, teal.100, teal.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "learning",
    name: "Learning Coach",
    description: "Unlock your potential with Learning Coach.",
    icon: FiBookOpen,
    color: "orange",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, orange.100, orange.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "analytics",
    name: "Analytics Agent",
    description: "Advanced data analysis and reporting capabilities.",
    icon: FiBarChart,
    color: "purple",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, purple.100, purple.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "admin",
    name: "System Admin",
    description: "Use AI to help you manage system administration tasks.",
    icon: FiSettings,
    color: "gray",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, gray.100, gray.200)",
  },
]

export default function ApplicationMarketplace({
  onAppPin,
  pinnedApps,
  onBack,
  onAppSelect,
  isOpen = true, // 默认true，兼容未传入的情况
}: ApplicationMarketplaceProps) {
  const toast = useToast()

  const [allApps, setAllApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [filteredApps, setFilteredApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState("")
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
  const [selectedCategory] = useState<string>("all")

  // 颜色模式
  const bgColor = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")
  const cardBg = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")

  // 加载所有应用函数
  const loadAllApps = React.useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      setIsLoading(true)
      // 在Standard模式下，只获取用户有权限访问的应用
      // 在Custom模式下，获取所有已发布的应用
      const apps = await AppNodeService.getUserApps()
      console.log("🔄 ApplicationMarketplace - Loaded apps:", {
        totalApps: apps.length,
        apps: apps.map(app => ({ id: app.id, name: app.name })),
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
      })
      setAllApps(apps)
      setFilteredApps(apps)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load all apps:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Loading Failed",
        description: "Unable to load application list",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      // 即使失败也要清空状态，避免显示旧数据
      setAllApps([])
      setFilteredApps([])
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false)
    }
  }, [toast])

  // 加载所有应用 - 在组件挂载时和Modal打开时重新加载
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      loadAllApps()
    }
  }, [isOpen, loadAllApps]) // 依赖isOpen，每次打开Modal时重新加载

  // 搜索和分类过滤
  useEffect(() => {
    let filtered = allApps

    // 按搜索词过滤
    if (searchTerm.trim() !== "") {
      filtered = filtered.filter(
        (app) =>
          app.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
          app.description?.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()),
      )
    }

    // 按分类过滤
    if (selectedCategory !== "all") {
      filtered = filtered.filter((app) => {
        // 这里可以根据实际需求添加分类逻辑
        // 暂时按应用名称包含关键词来分类
        const categoryKeywords: { [key: string]: string[] } = {
          productivity: ["productivity", "task", "management"],
          writing: ["writing", "document", "text"],
          idea: ["idea", "brainstorm", "creative"],
          career: ["career", "job", "professional"],
          learning: ["learning", "education", "study"],
          analytics: ["analytics", "report", "data"],
          admin: ["admin", "system", "management"],
        }

        const keywords = categoryKeywords[selectedCategory] || []
        return keywords.some(
          (keyword) =>
            app.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword) ||
            app.description?.toLowerCase().includes(keyword),
        )
      })
    }

    setFilteredApps(filtered)
  }, [searchTerm, selectedCategory, allApps])

  const handleAppPin = (app: AppNode) => {
    // 检查是否已经PIN了
    const isAlreadyPinned = pinnedApps.some((pinned) => pinned.id === app.id)
    if (isAlreadyPinned) {
      toast({
        title: "Application Already Pinned",
        description: `${app.name} is already in the left menu`,
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      return
    }

    onAppPin(app)
    toast({
      title: "Application Pinned",
      description: `${app.name} has been added to the left menu`,
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
      isClosable: true,
    })
  }

  const isAppPinned = (app: AppNode) => {
    return pinnedApps.some((pinned) => pinned.id === app.id)
  }

  const handleAppSelect = (app: AppNode) => {
    // 点击卡片时，如果未pin则pin，已pin则只触发选择回调
    if (!isAppPinned(app)) {
      // 未pin的应用，点击卡片时pin
      handleAppPin(app)
    }
    // 调用onAppSelect回调（如果有）
    if (onAppSelect) {
      onAppSelect(app)
    }
  }

  return (
    <Box bg={bgColor} minH="100vh">
      {/* Header Section - Moved to top */}
      <Box pt={4} px={6} pb={4} borderBottom="1px solid" borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}>
        {/* 顶部行只展示标题，隐藏返回按钮，Modal有X关闭键 */}
        <Flex justify="space-between" align="flex-start" mb={2}>
          <Heading fontSize="20px" fontWeight="bold" color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}>Application Marketplace</Heading>
        </Flex>

        {/* Description text */}
        <Text
          fontSize="sm"
          color={useColorModeValue("gray.600", "gray.300")}
          maxW="2xl"
          mb={4}
        >
          Find applications with the expertise to help you complete complex
          tasks.
        </Text>

        {/* Search Bar - Microsoft Style */}
        <Box maxW="2xl" mb={4}>
              <InputGroup size="lg">
                <InputLeftElement pointerEvents="none" pl={4}>
                  <FiSearch color="gray.400" size={20} />
                </InputLeftElement>
                <Input
                  placeholder="Search Applications"
                  value={searchTerm}
                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
                  bg={useColorModeValue("white", "gray.700")}
                  border="2px solid"
                  borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                  borderRadius="lg"
                  pl={12}
                  pr={4}
                  py={6}
                  fontSize="md"
                  _focus={{
                    borderColor: "blue.500",
                    boxShadow: "0 0 0 1px #3182ce",
                  }}
                  _hover={{
                    borderColor: useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.500"),
                  }}
                />
              </InputGroup>
            </Box>
      </Box>

      <Container maxW="7xl" py={4}>
        <VStack spacing={4} align="stretch">

          {/* Featured Section */}
          <Box>
            <Heading
              fontSize="14px"
              fontWeight="bold"
              color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
              mb={6}
            >
              Featured
            </Heading>

            {/* Search and Filter Controls */}
            <Flex
              justify="space-between"
              align="center"
              mb={6}
              wrap="wrap"
              gap={4}
            >
              <HStack spacing={4}>
                <Badge
                  colorScheme="blue"
                  variant="subtle"
                  px={4}
                  py={2}
                  borderRadius="full"
                  fontSize="sm"
                  fontWeight="600"
                >
                  TOTAL {filteredApps.length} APPS
                </Badge>
                <Badge
                  colorScheme="green"
                  variant="subtle"
                  px={4}
                  py={2}
                  borderRadius="full"
                  fontSize="sm"
                  fontWeight="600"
                >
                  PINNED {pinnedApps.length}
                </Badge>
              </HStack>
            </Flex>

            {/* Applications Grid */}
            {isLoading ? (
              <Flex justify="center" align="center" py={20}>
                <Spinner size="xl" color="blue.500" />
              </Flex>
            ) : filteredApps.length === 0 ? (
              <Box textAlign="center" py={20}>
                <Icon as={FiGrid} boxSize={16} color="gray.300" mb={4} />
                <Text fontSize="lg" color="gray.500" mb={2}>
                  {searchTerm
                    ? "No matching applications found"
                    : "No applications available"}
                </Text>
                <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.400">
                  Try adjusting your search terms or check back later for new
                  applications.
                </Text>
              </Box>
            ) : (
              <SimpleGrid
                columns={{ base: 1, md: 2, lg: 3, xl: 4 }}
                spacing={6}
              >
                {filteredApps.map((app) => {
                  const isPinned = isAppPinned(app)
                  return (
                    <Box
                      key={app.id}
                      bg={cardBg}
                      borderRadius="xl"
                      p={2}
                      cursor="pointer"
                      border="1px solid"
                      borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                      _hover={{
                        transform: "translateY(-2px)",
                        boxShadow: "0 8px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)",
                        borderColor: "blue.300",
                      }}
                      transition="all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)"
                      position="relative"
                      overflow="hidden"
                      // 点击整个卡片触发handleAppSelect，内部会处理pin逻辑
                      onClick={() => {
                        handleAppSelect(app)
                      }}
                    >
                      {/* Gradient Background */}
                      <Box
                        position="absolute"
                        top={0}
                        left={0}
                        right={0}
                        height="60px"
                        bgGradient="linear(to-br, blue.100, blue.200)"
                        opacity={0.1}
                      />

                      {/* Add Icon - Only show for unpinned apps */}
                      {!isPinned && (
                        <Box position="absolute" top={1} right={1} zIndex={10}>
                          <Tooltip label="PIN Application" placement="top">
                            <IconButton
                              aria-label="PIN Application"
                              icon={<FiPlus />}
                              size="xs"
                              variant="ghost"
                              onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); onAppPin(app); }}
                              _hover={{
                                transform: "scale(1.05)",
                                bg: "gray.100",
                              }}
                              transition="all 0.2s"
                              borderRadius="md"
                            />
                          </Tooltip>
                        </Box>
                      )}

                      {/* Content - Icon and Text in same row */}
                      <Box position="relative" zIndex={1}>
                        <HStack
                          spacing={2}
                          align="center"
                          justify="space-between"
                        >
                          {/* Icon and Text in same row */}
                          <HStack spacing={2} align="center" flex="1" minW={0}>
                            <Icon as={FiGrid} boxSize={5} color="blue.500" flexShrink={0} />
                          <Tooltip
                            label={app.name}
                            placement="bottom"
                            hasArrow
                            bg="white"
