```typescriptreact
  pinnedApps: AppNode[]
  onBack?: () => void
  onAppSelect?: (app: AppNode) => void
  isOpen?: boolean // 用于触发重新加载应用列表
}

// Agent category interface
interface AgentCategory {
  id: string
  name: string
  description: string
  icon: any
  color: string
  gradient: string
}

// Mock agent categories for demonstration
const agentCategories: AgentCategory[] = [
  {
    id: "productivity",
    name: "Productivity Coach",
    description:
      "Enhance your productivity with AI-powered coaching and task management.",
    icon: FiEdit3,
    color: "purple",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, purple.100, purple.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "writing",
    name: "Writing Coach",
    description: "Take your writing to the next level with Writing Coach.",
    icon: FiFileText,
    color: "blue",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, blue.100, blue.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "idea",
    name: "Idea Coach",
    description: "Plan and navigate the brainstorming process.",
    icon: FiZap,
    color: "orange",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, orange.100, orange.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "career",
    name: "Career Coach",
    description: "Elevate your career with Career Coach.",
    icon: FiBriefcase,
    color: "teal",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, teal.100, teal.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "learning",
    name: "Learning Coach",
    description: "Unlock your potential with Learning Coach.",
    icon: FiBookOpen,
    color: "orange",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, orange.100, orange.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "analytics",
    name: "Analytics Agent",
    description: "Advanced data analysis and reporting capabilities.",
    icon: FiBarChart,
    color: "purple",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, purple.100, purple.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "admin",
    name: "System Admin",
    description: "Use AI to help you manage system administration tasks.",
    icon: FiSettings,
    color: "gray",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, gray.100, gray.200)",
  },
]

export default function ApplicationMarketplace({
  onAppPin,
  pinnedApps,
  onBack,
  onAppSelect,
  isOpen = true, // 默认true，兼容未传入的情况
}: ApplicationMarketplaceProps) {
  const toast = useToast()

  const [allApps, setAllApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [filteredApps, setFilteredApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState("")
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
  const [selectedCategory] = useState<string>("all")

  // 颜色模式
  const bgColor = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")
  const cardBg = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")

  // 加载所有应用函数
  const loadAllApps = React.useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      setIsLoading(true)
      // 在Standard模式下，只获取用户有权限访问的应用
      // 在Custom模式下，获取所有已发布的应用
      const apps = await AppNodeService.getUserApps()
      console.log("🔄 ApplicationMarketplace - Loaded apps:", {
        totalApps: apps.length,
        apps: apps.map(app => ({ id: app.id, name: app.name })),
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
      })
      setAllApps(apps)
      setFilteredApps(apps)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load all apps:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Loading Failed",
        description: "Unable to load application list",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      // 即使失败也要清空状态，避免显示旧数据
      setAllApps([])
      setFilteredApps([])
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false)
    }
  }, [toast])

  // 加载所有应用 - 在组件挂载时和Modal打开时重新加载
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      loadAllApps()
    }
  }, [isOpen, loadAllApps]) // 依赖isOpen，每次打开Modal时重新加载

  // 搜索和分类过滤
  useEffect(() => {
    let filtered = allApps

    // 按搜索词过滤
    if (searchTerm.trim() !== "") {
      filtered = filtered.filter(
        (app) =>
          app.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
          app.description?.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()),
      )
    }

    // 按分类过滤
    if (selectedCategory !== "all") {
      filtered = filtered.filter((app) => {
        // 这里可以根据实际需求添加分类逻辑
        // 暂时按应用名称包含关键词来分类
        const categoryKeywords: { [key: string]: string[] } = {
          productivity: ["productivity", "task", "management"],
          writing: ["writing", "document", "text"],
          idea: ["idea", "brainstorm", "creative"],
          career: ["career", "job", "professional"],
          learning: ["learning", "education", "study"],
          analytics: ["analytics", "report", "data"],
          admin: ["admin", "system", "management"],
        }

        const keywords = categoryKeywords[selectedCategory] || []
        return keywords.some(
          (keyword) =>
            app.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword) ||
            app.description?.toLowerCase().includes(keyword),
        )
      })
    }

    setFilteredApps(filtered)
  }, [searchTerm, selectedCategory, allApps])

  const handleAppPin = (app: AppNode) => {
    // 检查是否已经PIN了
    const isAlreadyPinned = pinnedApps.some((pinned) => pinned.id === app.id)
    if (isAlreadyPinned) {
      toast({
        title: "Application Already Pinned",
        description: `${app.name} is already in the left menu`,
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      return
    }

    onAppPin(app)
    toast({
      title: "Application Pinned",
      description: `${app.name} has been added to the left menu`,
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
      isClosable: true,
    })
  }

  const isAppPinned = (app: AppNode) => {
    return pinnedApps.some((pinned) => pinned.id === app.id)
  }

  const handleAppSelect = (app: AppNode) => {
    // 点击卡片时，如果未pin则pin，已pin则只触发选择回调
    if (!isAppPinned(app)) {
      // 未pin的应用，点击卡片时pin
      handleAppPin(app)
    }
    // 调用onAppSelect回调（如果有）
    if (onAppSelect) {
      onAppSelect(app)
    }
  }

  return (
    <Box bg={bgColor} minH="100vh">
      {/* Header Section - Moved to top */}
      <Box pt={4} px={6} pb={4} borderBottom="1px solid" borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}>
        {/* 顶部行只展示标题，隐藏返回按钮，Modal有X关闭键 */}
        <Flex justify="space-between" align="flex-start" mb={2}>
          <Heading fontSize="20px" fontWeight="bold" color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}>Application Marketplace</Heading>
        </Flex>

        {/* Description text */}
        <Text
          fontSize="sm"
          color={useColorModeValue("gray.600", "gray.300")}
          maxW="2xl"
          mb={4}
        >
          Find applications with the expertise to help you complete complex
          tasks.
        </Text>

        {/* Search Bar - Microsoft Style */}
        <Box maxW="2xl" mb={4}>
              <InputGroup size="lg">
                <InputLeftElement pointerEvents="none" pl={4}>
                  <FiSearch color="gray.400" size={20} />
                </InputLeftElement>
                <Input
                  placeholder="Search Applications"
                  value={searchTerm}
                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
                  bg={useColorModeValue("white", "gray.700")}
                  border="2px solid"
                  borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                  borderRadius="lg"
                  pl={12}
                  pr={4}
                  py={6}
                  fontSize="md"
                  _focus={{
                    borderColor: "blue.500",
                    boxShadow: "0 0 0 1px #3182ce",
                  }}
                  _hover={{
                    borderColor: useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.500"),
                  }}
                />
              </InputGroup>
            </Box>
      </Box>

      <Container maxW="7xl" py={4}>
        <VStack spacing={4} align="stretch">

          {/* Featured Section */}
          <Box>
            <Heading
              fontSize="14px"
              fontWeight="bold"
              color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
              mb={6}
            >
              Featured
            </Heading>

            {/* Search and Filter Controls */}
            <Flex
              justify="space-between"
              align="center"
              mb={6}
              wrap="wrap"
              gap={4}
            >
              <HStack spacing={4}>
                <Badge
                  colorScheme="blue"
                  variant="subtle"
                  px={4}
                  py={2}
                  borderRadius="full"
                  fontSize="sm"
                  fontWeight="600"
                >
                  TOTAL {filteredApps.length} APPS
                </Badge>
                <Badge
                  colorScheme="green"
                  variant="subtle"
                  px={4}
                  py={2}
                  borderRadius="full"
                  fontSize="sm"
                  fontWeight="600"
                >
                  PINNED {pinnedApps.length}
                </Badge>
              </HStack>
            </Flex>

            {/* Applications Grid */}
            {isLoading ? (
              <Flex justify="center" align="center" py={20}>
                <Spinner size="xl" color="blue.500" />
              </Flex>
            ) : filteredApps.length === 0 ? (
              <Box textAlign="center" py={20}>
                <Icon as={FiGrid} boxSize={16} color="gray.300" mb={4} />
                <Text fontSize="lg" color="gray.500" mb={2}>
                  {searchTerm
                    ? "No matching applications found"
                    : "No applications available"}
                </Text>
                <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.400">
                  Try adjusting your search terms or check back later for new
                  applications.
                </Text>
              </Box>
            ) : (
              <SimpleGrid
                columns={{ base: 1, md: 2, lg: 3, xl: 4 }}
                spacing={6}
              >
                {filteredApps.map((app) => {
                  const isPinned = isAppPinned(app)
                  return (
                    <Box
                      key={app.id}
                      bg={cardBg}
                      borderRadius="xl"
                      p={2}
                      cursor="pointer"
                      border="1px solid"
                      borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                      _hover={{
                        transform: "translateY(-2px)",
                        boxShadow: "0 8px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)",
                        borderColor: "blue.300",
                      }}
                      transition="all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)"
                      position="relative"
                      overflow="hidden"
                      // 点击整个卡片触发handleAppSelect，内部会处理pin逻辑
                      onClick={() => {
                        handleAppSelect(app)
                      }}
                    >
                      {/* Gradient Background */}
                      <Box
                        position="absolute"
                        top={0}
                        left={0}
                        right={0}
                        height="60px"
                        bgGradient="linear(to-br, blue.100, blue.200)"
                        opacity={0.1}
                      />

                      {/* Add Icon - Only show for unpinned apps */}
                      {!isPinned && (
                        <Box position="absolute" top={1} right={1} zIndex={10}>
                          <Tooltip label="PIN Application" placement="top">
                            <IconButton
                              aria-label="PIN Application"
                              icon={<FiPlus />}
                              size="xs"
                              variant="ghost"
                              onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); onAppPin(app); }}
                              _hover={{
                                transform: "scale(1.05)",
                                bg: "gray.100",
                              }}
                              transition="all 0.2s"
                              borderRadius="md"
                            />
                          </Tooltip>
                        </Box>
                      )}

                      {/* Content - Icon and Text in same row */}
                      <Box position="relative" zIndex={1}>
                        <HStack
                          spacing={2}
                          align="center"
                          justify="space-between"
                        >
                          {/* Icon and Text in same row */}
                          <HStack spacing={2} align="center" flex="1" minW={0}>
                            <Icon as={FiGrid} boxSize={5} color="blue.500" flexShrink={0} />
                          <Tooltip
                            label={app.name}
                            placement="bottom"
                            hasArrow
                            bg="white"
                            color="gray.800"
                            fontSize="sm"
                            borderRadius="lg"
                            boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                            border="1px solid"
                            borderColor="gray.200"
                            px={3}
                            py={2}
                            openDelay={500}
                            closeOnClick={false}
                          >
                            <Heading
                              fontSize="sm"
                              fontWeight="bold"
                              color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
                              flex="1"
                              minW="0"
                              noOfLines={1}
                              cursor="help"
                              _hover={{ color: "blue.500" }}
                              transition="color 0.2s"
                            >
                              {app.name}
                            </Heading>
                          </Tooltip>
                          </HStack>
                          <Tooltip
                            label={
                              app.description ||
                              `The ${app.name} application provides comprehensive management and monitoring capabilities for your business needs.`
                            }
                            placement="right"
                            hasArrow
                            bg="white"
                            color="gray.800"
                            fontSize="sm"
                            maxW="280px"
                            whiteSpace="pre-wrap"
                            openDelay={300}
                            closeOnClick={false}
                            borderRadius="lg"
                            boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                            border="1px solid"
                            borderColor="gray.200"
                            px={3}
                            py={2}
                          >
                            <Box
                              display="flex"
                              alignItems="center"
                              justifyContent="center"
                              w="20px"
                              h="20px"
                              cursor="help"
                              flexShrink={0}
                            >
                              <Icon
                                as={FiHelpCircle}
                                boxSize={4}
                                color={useColorModeValue(
                                  "gray.400",
                                  "gray.500",
                                )}
                                _hover={{
                                  color: "blue.500",
                                  transform: "scale(1.1)",
                                }}
                                transition="all 0.2s"
                              />
                            </Box>
                          </Tooltip>
                        </HStack>
                      </Box>
                    </Box>
                  )
                })}
              </SimpleGrid>
            )}
          </Box>

          <Divider />

          {/* Fake Examples Section */}
          <Box>
            <Heading
              fontSize="14px"
              fontWeight="bold"
              color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
              mb={6}
            >
              Fake Examples
            </Heading>
            <SimpleGrid columns={{ base: 1, md: 2, lg: 3, xl: 4 }} spacing={6}>
              {agentCategories.map((category) => (
                <Box
                  key={category.id}
                  bg={cardBg}
                  borderRadius="xl"
                  p={2}
                  cursor="pointer"
                  border="1px solid"
                  borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                  _hover={{
                    transform: "translateY(-2px)",
                    boxShadow: "0 8px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)",
                    borderColor: "blue.300",
                  }}
                  transition="all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)"
                  position="relative"
                  overflow="hidden"
                >
                  {/* Gradient Background */}
                  <Box
                    position="absolute"
                    top={0}
                    left={0}
                    right={0}
                    height="60px"
                    bgGradient={category.gradient}
                    opacity={0.1}
                  />

                  {/* Content - Icon and Text in same row */}
                  <Box position="relative" zIndex={1}>
                    <HStack spacing={2} align="center" justify="space-between">
                      {/* Icon and Text in same row */}
                      <HStack spacing={2} align="center" flex="1" minW={0}>
                        <Icon
                          as={category.icon}
                          boxSize={5}
                          color={`${category.color}.500`}
                          flexShrink={0}
                        />
                      <Tooltip
                        label={category.name}
                        placement="bottom"
                        hasArrow
                        bg="white"
                        color="gray.800"
                        fontSize="sm"
                        borderRadius="lg"
                        boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                        border="1px solid"
                        borderColor="gray.200"
                        px={3}
                        py={2}
                        openDelay={500}
                        closeOnClick={false}
                      >
                        <Heading
                          fontSize="sm"
                          fontWeight="bold"
                          color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
                          flex="1"
                          minW="0"
                          noOfLines={1}
                          cursor="help"
                          _hover={{ color: "blue.500" }}
                          transition="color 0.2s"
                        >
                          {category.name}
                        </Heading>
                      </Tooltip>
                      <Tooltip
                        label={category.description}
                        placement="right"
                        hasArrow
                        bg="white"
                        color="gray.800"
                        fontSize="sm"
                        maxW="280px"
                        whiteSpace="pre-wrap"
                        openDelay={300}
                        closeOnClick={false}
                        borderRadius="lg"
                        boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                        border="1px solid"
                        borderColor="gray.200"
                        px={3}
                        py={2}
                      >
                        <Box
                          display="flex"
                          alignItems="center"
                          justifyContent="center"
                          w="20px"
                          h="20px"
                          cursor="help"
                          flexShrink={0}
                        >
                          <Icon
                            as={FiHelpCircle}
                            boxSize={4}
                            color={useColorModeValue("gray.400", "gray.500")}
                            _hover={{
                              color: "blue.500",
                              transform: "scale(1.1)",
                            }}
                            transition="all 0.2s"
                          />
                        </Box>
                      </Tooltip>
                    </HStack>
                  </Box>
                </Box>
              ))}
            </SimpleGrid>
          </Box>
        </VStack>
      </Container>
    </Box>
  )
}

```

检查并修复 HStack 未闭合问题：


```typescriptreact
import { AppNodeService } from "@/services/appNodeService"
import type { AppNode } from "@/types/appNode"
import {
  Badge,
  Box,
  Button,
  Container,
  Divider,
  Flex,
  HStack,
  Heading,
  Icon,
  IconButton,
  Input,
  InputGroup,
  InputLeftElement,
  SimpleGrid,
  Spinner,
  Text,
  Tooltip,
  VStack,
  useColorModeValue,
  useToast,
} from "@chakra-ui/react"
import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"
import {
  FiBarChart,
  FiBookOpen,
  FiBriefcase,
  FiEdit3,
  FiFileText,
  FiGrid,
  FiHelpCircle,
  FiPlus,
  FiSearch,
  FiSettings,
  FiX,
  FiZap,
} from "react-icons/fi"

interface ApplicationMarketplaceProps {
  onAppPin: (app: AppNode) => void
  pinnedApps: AppNode[]
  onBack?: () => void
  onAppSelect?: (app: AppNode) => void
  isOpen?: boolean // 用于触发重新加载应用列表
}

// Agent category interface
interface AgentCategory {
  id: string
  name: string
  description: string
  icon: any
  color: string
  gradient: string
}

// Mock agent categories for demonstration
const agentCategories: AgentCategory[] = [
  {
    id: "productivity",
    name: "Productivity Coach",
    description:
      "Enhance your productivity with AI-powered coaching and task management.",
    icon: FiEdit3,
    color: "purple",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, purple.100, purple.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "writing",
    name: "Writing Coach",
    description: "Take your writing to the next level with Writing Coach.",
    icon: FiFileText,
    color: "blue",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, blue.100, blue.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "idea",
    name: "Idea Coach",
    description: "Plan and navigate the brainstorming process.",
    icon: FiZap,
    color: "orange",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, orange.100, orange.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "career",
    name: "Career Coach",
    description: "Elevate your career with Career Coach.",
    icon: FiBriefcase,
    color: "teal",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, teal.100, teal.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "learning",
    name: "Learning Coach",
    description: "Unlock your potential with Learning Coach.",
    icon: FiBookOpen,
    color: "orange",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, orange.100, orange.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "analytics",
    name: "Analytics Agent",
    description: "Advanced data analysis and reporting capabilities.",
    icon: FiBarChart,
    color: "purple",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, purple.100, purple.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "admin",
    name: "System Admin",
    description: "Use AI to help you manage system administration tasks.",
    icon: FiSettings,
    color: "gray",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, gray.100, gray.200)",
  },
]

export default function ApplicationMarketplace({
  onAppPin,
  pinnedApps,
  onBack,
  onAppSelect,
  isOpen = true, // 默认true，兼容未传入的情况
}: ApplicationMarketplaceProps) {
  const toast = useToast()

  const [allApps, setAllApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [filteredApps, setFilteredApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState("")
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
  const [selectedCategory] = useState<string>("all")

  // 颜色模式
  const bgColor = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")
  const cardBg = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")

  // 加载所有应用函数
  const loadAllApps = React.useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      setIsLoading(true)
      // 在Standard模式下，只获取用户有权限访问的应用
      // 在Custom模式下，获取所有已发布的应用
      const apps = await AppNodeService.getUserApps()
      console.log("🔄 ApplicationMarketplace - Loaded apps:", {
        totalApps: apps.length,
        apps: apps.map(app => ({ id: app.id, name: app.name })),
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
      })
      setAllApps(apps)
      setFilteredApps(apps)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load all apps:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Loading Failed",
        description: "Unable to load application list",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      // 即使失败也要清空状态，避免显示旧数据
      setAllApps([])
      setFilteredApps([])
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false)
    }
  }, [toast])

  // 加载所有应用 - 在组件挂载时和Modal打开时重新加载
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      loadAllApps()
    }
  }, [isOpen, loadAllApps]) // 依赖isOpen，每次打开Modal时重新加载

  // 搜索和分类过滤
  useEffect(() => {
    let filtered = allApps

    // 按搜索词过滤
    if (searchTerm.trim() !== "") {
      filtered = filtered.filter(
        (app) =>
          app.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
          app.description?.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()),
      )
    }

    // 按分类过滤
    if (selectedCategory !== "all") {
      filtered = filtered.filter((app) => {
        // 这里可以根据实际需求添加分类逻辑
        // 暂时按应用名称包含关键词来分类
        const categoryKeywords: { [key: string]: string[] } = {
          productivity: ["productivity", "task", "management"],
          writing: ["writing", "document", "text"],
          idea: ["idea", "brainstorm", "creative"],
          career: ["career", "job", "professional"],
          learning: ["learning", "education", "study"],
          analytics: ["analytics", "report", "data"],
          admin: ["admin", "system", "management"],
        }

        const keywords = categoryKeywords[selectedCategory] || []
        return keywords.some(
          (keyword) =>
            app.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword) ||
            app.description?.toLowerCase().includes(keyword),
        )
      })
    }

    setFilteredApps(filtered)
  }, [searchTerm, selectedCategory, allApps])

  const handleAppPin = (app: AppNode) => {
    // 检查是否已经PIN了
    const isAlreadyPinned = pinnedApps.some((pinned) => pinned.id === app.id)
    if (isAlreadyPinned) {
      toast({
        title: "Application Already Pinned",
        description: `${app.name} is already in the left menu`,
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      return
    }

    onAppPin(app)
    toast({
      title: "Application Pinned",
      description: `${app.name} has been added to the left menu`,
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
      isClosable: true,
    })
  }

  const isAppPinned = (app: AppNode) => {
    return pinnedApps.some((pinned) => pinned.id === app.id)
  }

  const handleAppSelect = (app: AppNode) => {
    // 点击卡片时，如果未pin则pin，已pin则只触发选择回调
    if (!isAppPinned(app)) {
      // 未pin的应用，点击卡片时pin
      handleAppPin(app)
    }
    // 调用onAppSelect回调（如果有）
    if (onAppSelect) {
      onAppSelect(app)
    }
  }

  return (
    <Box bg={bgColor} minH="100vh">
      {/* Header Section - Moved to top */}
      <Box pt={4} px={6} pb={4} borderBottom="1px solid" borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}>
        {/* 顶部行只展示标题，隐藏返回按钮，Modal有X关闭键 */}
        <Flex justify="space-between" align="flex-start" mb={2}>
          <Heading fontSize="20px" fontWeight="bold" color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}>Application Marketplace</Heading>
        </Flex>

        {/* Description text */}
        <Text
          fontSize="sm"
          color={useColorModeValue("gray.600", "gray.300")}
          maxW="2xl"
          mb={4}
        >
          Find applications with the expertise to help you complete complex
          tasks.
        </Text>

        {/* Search Bar - Microsoft Style */}
        <Box maxW="2xl" mb={4}>
              <InputGroup size="lg">
                <InputLeftElement pointerEvents="none" pl={4}>
                  <FiSearch color="gray.400" size={20} />
                </InputLeftElement>
                <Input
                  placeholder="Search Applications"
                  value={searchTerm}
                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
                  bg={useColorModeValue("white", "gray.700")}
                  border="2px solid"
                  borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                  borderRadius="lg"
                  pl={12}
                  pr={4}
                  py={6}
                  fontSize="md"
                  _focus={{
                    borderColor: "blue.500",
                    boxShadow: "0 0 0 1px #3182ce",
                  }}
                  _hover={{
                    borderColor: useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.500"),
                  }}
                />
              </InputGroup>
            </Box>
      </Box>

      <Container maxW="7xl" py={4}>
        <VStack spacing={4} align="stretch">

          {/* Featured Section */}
          <Box>
            <Heading
              fontSize="14px"
              fontWeight="bold"
              color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
              mb={6}
            >
              Featured
            </Heading>

            {/* Search and Filter Controls */}
            <Flex
              justify="space-between"
              align="center"
              mb={6}
              wrap="wrap"
              gap={4}
            >
              <HStack spacing={4}>
                <Badge
                  colorScheme="blue"
                  variant="subtle"
                  px={4}
                  py={2}
                  borderRadius="full"
                  fontSize="sm"
                  fontWeight="600"
                >
                  TOTAL {filteredApps.length} APPS
                </Badge>
                <Badge
                  colorScheme="green"
                  variant="subtle"
                  px={4}
                  py={2}
                  borderRadius="full"
                  fontSize="sm"
                  fontWeight="600"
                >
                  PINNED {pinnedApps.length}
                </Badge>
              </HStack>
            </Flex>

            {/* Applications Grid */}
            {isLoading ? (
              <Flex justify="center" align="center" py={20}>
                <Spinner size="xl" color="blue.500" />
              </Flex>
            ) : filteredApps.length === 0 ? (
              <Box textAlign="center" py={20}>
                <Icon as={FiGrid} boxSize={16} color="gray.300" mb={4} />
                <Text fontSize="lg" color="gray.500" mb={2}>
                  {searchTerm
                    ? "No matching applications found"
                    : "No applications available"}
                </Text>
                <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.400">
                  Try adjusting your search terms or check back later for new
                  applications.
                </Text>
              </Box>
            ) : (
              <SimpleGrid
                columns={{ base: 1, md: 2, lg: 3, xl: 4 }}
                spacing={6}
              >
                {filteredApps.map((app) => {
                  const isPinned = isAppPinned(app)
                  return (
                    <Box
                      key={app.id}
                      bg={cardBg}
                      borderRadius="xl"
                      p={2}
                      cursor="pointer"
                      border="1px solid"
                      borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                      _hover={{
                        transform: "translateY(-2px)",
                        boxShadow: "0 8px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)",
                        borderColor: "blue.300",
                      }}
                      transition="all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)"
                      position="relative"
                      overflow="hidden"
                      // 点击整个卡片触发handleAppSelect，内部会处理pin逻辑
                      onClick={() => {
                        handleAppSelect(app)
                      }}
                    >
                      {/* Gradient Background */}
                      <Box
                        position="absolute"
                        top={0}
                        left={0}
                        right={0}
                        height="60px"
                        bgGradient="linear(to-br, blue.100, blue.200)"
                        opacity={0.1}
                      />

                      {/* Add Icon - Only show for unpinned apps */}
                      {!isPinned && (
                        <Box position="absolute" top={1} right={1} zIndex={10}>
                          <Tooltip label="PIN Application" placement="top">
                            <IconButton
                              aria-label="PIN Application"
                              icon={<FiPlus />}
                              size="xs"
                              variant="ghost"
                              onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); onAppPin(app); }}
                              _hover={{
                                transform: "scale(1.05)",
                                bg: "gray.100",
                              }}
                              transition="all 0.2s"
                              borderRadius="md"
                            />
                          </Tooltip>
                        </Box>
                      )}

                      {/* Content - Icon and Text in same row */}
                      <Box position="relative" zIndex={1}>
                        <HStack
                          spacing={2}
                          align="center"
                          justify="space-between"
                        >
                          {/* Icon and Text in same row */}
                          <HStack spacing={2} align="center" flex="1" minW={0}>
                            <Icon as={FiGrid} boxSize={5} color="blue.500" flexShrink={0} />
                          <Tooltip
                            label={app.name}
                            placement="bottom"
                            hasArrow
                            bg="white"
                            color="gray.800"
                            fontSize="sm"
                            borderRadius="lg"
                            boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                            border="1px solid"
                            borderColor="gray.200"
                            px={3}
                            py={2}
                            openDelay={500}
                            closeOnClick={false}
                          >
                            <Heading
                              fontSize="sm"
                              fontWeight="bold"
                              color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
                              flex="1"
                              minW="0"
                              noOfLines={1}
                              cursor="help"
                              _hover={{ color: "blue.500" }}
                              transition="color 0.2s"
                            >
                              {app.name}
                            </Heading>
                          </Tooltip>
                          </HStack>
                          <Tooltip
                            label={
                              app.description ||
                              `The ${app.name} application provides comprehensive management and monitoring capabilities for your business needs.`
                            }
                            placement="right"
                            hasArrow
                            bg="white"
                            color="gray.800"
                            fontSize="sm"
                            maxW="280px"
                            whiteSpace="pre-wrap"
                            openDelay={300}
                            closeOnClick={false}
                            borderRadius="lg"
                            boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                            border="1px solid"
                            borderColor="gray.200"
                            px={3}
                            py={2}
                          >
                            <Box
                              display="flex"
                              alignItems="center"
                              justifyContent="center"
                              w="20px"
                              h="20px"
                              cursor="help"
                              flexShrink={0}
                            >
                              <Icon
                                as={FiHelpCircle}
                                boxSize={4}
                                color={useColorModeValue(
                                  "gray.400",
                                  "gray.500",
                                )}
                                _hover={{
                                  color: "blue.500",
                                  transform: "scale(1.1)",
                                }}
                                transition="all 0.2s"
                              />
                            </Box>
                          </Tooltip>
                        </HStack>
                      </Box>
                    </Box>
                  )
                })}
              </SimpleGrid>
            )}
          </Box>

          <Divider />

          {/* Fake Examples Section */}
          <Box>
            <Heading
              fontSize="14px"
              fontWeight="bold"
              color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
              mb={6}
            >
              Fake Examples
            </Heading>
            <SimpleGrid columns={{ base: 1, md: 2, lg: 3, xl: 4 }} spacing={6}>
              {agentCategories.map((category) => (
                <Box
                  key={category.id}
                  bg={cardBg}
                  borderRadius="xl"
                  p={2}
                  cursor="pointer"
                  border="1px solid"
                  borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                  _hover={{
                    transform: "translateY(-2px)",
                    boxShadow: "0 8px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)",
                    borderColor: "blue.300",
                  }}
                  transition="all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)"
                  position="relative"
                  overflow="hidden"
                >
                  {/* Gradient Background */}
                  <Box
                    position="absolute"
                    top={0}
                    left={0}
                    right={0}
                    height="60px"
                    bgGradient={category.gradient}
                    opacity={0.1}
                  />

                  {/* Content - Icon and Text in same row */}
                  <Box position="relative" zIndex={1}>
                    <HStack spacing={2} align="center" justify="space-between">
                      {/* Icon and Text in same row */}
                      <HStack spacing={2} align="center" flex="1" minW={0}>
                        <Icon
                          as={category.icon}
                          boxSize={5}
                          color={`${category.color}.500`}
                          flexShrink={0}
                        />
                        <Tooltip
                        label={category.name}
                        placement="bottom"
                        hasArrow
                        bg="white"
                        color="gray.800"
                        fontSize="sm"
                        borderRadius="lg"
                        boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                        border="1px solid"
                        borderColor="gray.200"
                        px={3}
                        py={2}
                        openDelay={500}
                        closeOnClick={false}
                      >
                        <Heading
                          fontSize="sm"
                          fontWeight="bold"
                          color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
                          flex="1"
                          minW="0"
                          noOfLines={1}
                          cursor="help"
                          _hover={{ color: "blue.500" }}
                          transition="color 0.2s"
                        >
                          {category.name}
                        </Heading>
                      </Tooltip>
                      <Tooltip
                        label={category.description}
                        placement="right"
                        hasArrow
                        bg="white"
                        color="gray.800"
                        fontSize="sm"
                        maxW="280px"
                        whiteSpace="pre-wrap"
                        openDelay={300}
                        closeOnClick={false}
                        borderRadius="lg"
                        boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                        border="1px solid"
                        borderColor="gray.200"
                        px={3}
                        py={2}
                      >
                        <Box
                          display="flex"
                          alignItems="center"
                          justifyContent="center"
                          w="20px"
                          h="20px"
                          cursor="help"
                          flexShrink={0}
                        >
                          <Icon
                            as={FiHelpCircle}
                            boxSize={4}
                            color={useColorModeValue("gray.400", "gray.500")}
                            _hover={{
                              color: "blue.500",
                              transform: "scale(1.1)",
                            }}
                            transition="all 0.2s"
                          />
                        </Box>
                      </Tooltip>
                    </HStack>
                  </Box>
                </Box>
              ))}
            </SimpleGrid>
          </Box>
        </VStack>
      </Container>
    </Box>
  )
}

```

检查并修复 HStack 闭合问题：


```typescriptreact
import { AppNodeService } from "@/services/appNodeService"
import type { AppNode } from "@/types/appNode"
import {
  Badge,
  Box,
  Button,
  Container,
  Divider,
  Flex,
  HStack,
  Heading,
  Icon,
  IconButton,
  Input,
  InputGroup,
  InputLeftElement,
  SimpleGrid,
  Spinner,
  Text,
  Tooltip,
  VStack,
  useColorModeValue,
  useToast,
} from "@chakra-ui/react"
import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"
import {
  FiBarChart,
  FiBookOpen,
  FiBriefcase,
  FiEdit3,
  FiFileText,
  FiGrid,
  FiHelpCircle,
  FiPlus,
  FiSearch,
  FiSettings,
  FiX,
  FiZap,
} from "react-icons/fi"

interface ApplicationMarketplaceProps {
  onAppPin: (app: AppNode) => void
  pinnedApps: AppNode[]
  onBack?: () => void
  onAppSelect?: (app: AppNode) => void
  isOpen?: boolean // 用于触发重新加载应用列表
}

// Agent category interface
interface AgentCategory {
  id: string
  name: string
  description: string
  icon: any
  color: string
  gradient: string
}

// Mock agent categories for demonstration
const agentCategories: AgentCategory[] = [
  {
    id: "productivity",
    name: "Productivity Coach",
    description:
      "Enhance your productivity with AI-powered coaching and task management.",
    icon: FiEdit3,
    color: "purple",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, purple.100, purple.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "writing",
    name: "Writing Coach",
    description: "Take your writing to the next level with Writing Coach.",
    icon: FiFileText,
    color: "blue",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, blue.100, blue.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "idea",
    name: "Idea Coach",
    description: "Plan and navigate the brainstorming process.",
    icon: FiZap,
    color: "orange",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, orange.100, orange.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "career",
    name: "Career Coach",
    description: "Elevate your career with Career Coach.",
    icon: FiBriefcase,
    color: "teal",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, teal.100, teal.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "learning",
    name: "Learning Coach",
    description: "Unlock your potential with Learning Coach.",
    icon: FiBookOpen,
    color: "orange",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, orange.100, orange.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "analytics",
    name: "Analytics Agent",
    description: "Advanced data analysis and reporting capabilities.",
    icon: FiBarChart,
    color: "purple",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, purple.100, purple.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "admin",
    name: "System Admin",
    description: "Use AI to help you manage system administration tasks.",
    icon: FiSettings,
    color: "gray",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, gray.100, gray.200)",
  },
]

export default function ApplicationMarketplace({
  onAppPin,
  pinnedApps,
  onBack,
  onAppSelect,
  isOpen = true, // 默认true，兼容未传入的情况
}: ApplicationMarketplaceProps) {
  const toast = useToast()

  const [allApps, setAllApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [filteredApps, setFilteredApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState("")
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
  const [selectedCategory] = useState<string>("all")

  // 颜色模式
  const bgColor = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")
  const cardBg = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")

  // 加载所有应用函数
  const loadAllApps = React.useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      setIsLoading(true)
      // 在Standard模式下，只获取用户有权限访问的应用
      // 在Custom模式下，获取所有已发布的应用
      const apps = await AppNodeService.getUserApps()
      console.log("🔄 ApplicationMarketplace - Loaded apps:", {
        totalApps: apps.length,
        apps: apps.map(app => ({ id: app.id, name: app.name })),
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
      })
      setAllApps(apps)
      setFilteredApps(apps)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load all apps:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Loading Failed",
        description: "Unable to load application list",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      // 即使失败也要清空状态，避免显示旧数据
      setAllApps([])
      setFilteredApps([])
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false)
    }
  }, [toast])

  // 加载所有应用 - 在组件挂载时和Modal打开时重新加载
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      loadAllApps()
    }
  }, [isOpen, loadAllApps]) // 依赖isOpen，每次打开Modal时重新加载

  // 搜索和分类过滤
  useEffect(() => {
    let filtered = allApps

    // 按搜索词过滤
    if (searchTerm.trim() !== "") {
      filtered = filtered.filter(
        (app) =>
          app.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
          app.description?.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()),
      )
    }

    // 按分类过滤
    if (selectedCategory !== "all") {
      filtered = filtered.filter((app) => {
        // 这里可以根据实际需求添加分类逻辑
        // 暂时按应用名称包含关键词来分类
        const categoryKeywords: { [key: string]: string[] } = {
          productivity: ["productivity", "task", "management"],
          writing: ["writing", "document", "text"],
          idea: ["idea", "brainstorm", "creative"],
          career: ["career", "job", "professional"],
          learning: ["learning", "education", "study"],
          analytics: ["analytics", "report", "data"],
          admin: ["admin", "system", "management"],
        }

        const keywords = categoryKeywords[selectedCategory] || []
        return keywords.some(
          (keyword) =>
            app.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword) ||
            app.description?.toLowerCase().includes(keyword),
        )
      })
    }

    setFilteredApps(filtered)
  }, [searchTerm, selectedCategory, allApps])

  const handleAppPin = (app: AppNode) => {
    // 检查是否已经PIN了
    const isAlreadyPinned = pinnedApps.some((pinned) => pinned.id === app.id)
    if (isAlreadyPinned) {
      toast({
        title: "Application Already Pinned",
        description: `${app.name} is already in the left menu`,
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      return
    }

    onAppPin(app)
    toast({
      title: "Application Pinned",
      description: `${app.name} has been added to the left menu`,
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
      isClosable: true,
    })
  }

  const isAppPinned = (app: AppNode) => {
    return pinnedApps.some((pinned) => pinned.id === app.id)
  }

  const handleAppSelect = (app: AppNode) => {
    // 点击卡片时，如果未pin则pin，已pin则只触发选择回调
    if (!isAppPinned(app)) {
      // 未pin的应用，点击卡片时pin
      handleAppPin(app)
    }
    // 调用onAppSelect回调（如果有）
    if (onAppSelect) {
      onAppSelect(app)
    }
  }

  return (
    <Box bg={bgColor} minH="100vh">
      {/* Header Section - Moved to top */}
      <Box pt={4} px={6} pb={4} borderBottom="1px solid" borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}>
        {/* 顶部行只展示标题，隐藏返回按钮，Modal有X关闭键 */}
        <Flex justify="space-between" align="flex-start" mb={2}>
          <Heading fontSize="20px" fontWeight="bold" color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}>Application Marketplace</Heading>
        </Flex>

        {/* Description text */}
        <Text
          fontSize="sm"
          color={useColorModeValue("gray.600", "gray.300")}
          maxW="2xl"
          mb={4}
        >
          Find applications with the expertise to help you complete complex
          tasks.
        </Text>

        {/* Search Bar - Microsoft Style */}
        <Box maxW="2xl" mb={4}>
              <InputGroup size="lg">
                <InputLeftElement pointerEvents="none" pl={4}>
                  <FiSearch color="gray.400" size={20} />
                </InputLeftElement>
                <Input
                  placeholder="Search Applications"
                  value={searchTerm}
                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
                  bg={useColorModeValue("white", "gray.700")}
                  border="2px solid"
                  borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                  borderRadius="lg"
                  pl={12}
                  pr={4}
                  py={6}
                  fontSize="md"
                  _focus={{
                    borderColor: "blue.500",
                    boxShadow: "0 0 0 1px #3182ce",
                  }}
                  _hover={{
                    borderColor: useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.500"),
                  }}
                />
              </InputGroup>
            </Box>
      </Box>

      <Container maxW="7xl" py={4}>
        <VStack spacing={4} align="stretch">

          {/* Featured Section */}
          <Box>
            <Heading
              fontSize="14px"
              fontWeight="bold"
              color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
              mb={6}
            >
              Featured
            </Heading>

            {/* Search and Filter Controls */}
            <Flex
              justify="space-between"
              align="center"
              mb={6}
              wrap="wrap"
              gap={4}
            >
              <HStack spacing={4}>
                <Badge
                  colorScheme="blue"
                  variant="subtle"
                  px={4}
                  py={2}
                  borderRadius="full"
                  fontSize="sm"
                  fontWeight="600"
                >
                  TOTAL {filteredApps.length} APPS
                </Badge>
                <Badge
                  colorScheme="green"
                  variant="subtle"
                  px={4}
                  py={2}
                  borderRadius="full"
                  fontSize="sm"
                  fontWeight="600"
                >
                  PINNED {pinnedApps.length}
                </Badge>
              </HStack>
            </Flex>

            {/* Applications Grid */}
            {isLoading ? (
              <Flex justify="center" align="center" py={20}>
                <Spinner size="xl" color="blue.500" />
              </Flex>
            ) : filteredApps.length === 0 ? (
              <Box textAlign="center" py={20}>
                <Icon as={FiGrid} boxSize={16} color="gray.300" mb={4} />
                <Text fontSize="lg" color="gray.500" mb={2}>
                  {searchTerm
                    ? "No matching applications found"
                    : "No applications available"}
                </Text>
                <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.400">
                  Try adjusting your search terms or check back later for new
                  applications.
                </Text>
              </Box>
            ) : (
              <SimpleGrid
                columns={{ base: 1, md: 2, lg: 3, xl: 4 }}
                spacing={6}
              >
                {filteredApps.map((app) => {
                  const isPinned = isAppPinned(app)
                  return (
                    <Box
                      key={app.id}
                      bg={cardBg}
                      borderRadius="xl"
                      p={2}
                      cursor="pointer"
                      border="1px solid"
                      borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                      _hover={{
                        transform: "translateY(-2px)",
                        boxShadow: "0 8px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)",
                        borderColor: "blue.300",
                      }}
                      transition="all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)"
                      position="relative"
                      overflow="hidden"
                      // 点击整个卡片触发handleAppSelect，内部会处理pin逻辑
                      onClick={() => {
                        handleAppSelect(app)
                      }}
                    >
                      {/* Gradient Background */}
                      <Box
                        position="absolute"
                        top={0}
                        left={0}
                        right={0}
                        height="60px"
                        bgGradient="linear(to-br, blue.100, blue.200)"
                        opacity={0.1}
                      />

                      {/* Add Icon - Only show for unpinned apps */}
                      {!isPinned && (
                        <Box position="absolute" top={1} right={1} zIndex={10}>
                          <Tooltip label="PIN Application" placement="top">
                            <IconButton
                              aria-label="PIN Application"
                              icon={<FiPlus />}
                              size="xs"
                              variant="ghost"
                              onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); onAppPin(app); }}
                              _hover={{
                                transform: "scale(1.05)",
                                bg: "gray.100",
                              }}
                              transition="all 0.2s"
                              borderRadius="md"
                            />
                          </Tooltip>
                        </Box>
                      )}

                      {/* Content - Icon and Text in same row */}
                      <Box position="relative" zIndex={1}>
                        <HStack
                          spacing={2}
                          align="center"
                          justify="space-between"
                        >
                          {/* Icon and Text in same row */}
                          <HStack spacing={2} align="center" flex="1" minW={0}>
                            <Icon as={FiGrid} boxSize={5} color="blue.500" flexShrink={0} />
                          <Tooltip
                            label={app.name}
                            placement="bottom"
                            hasArrow
                            bg="white"
                            color="gray.800"
                            fontSize="sm"
                            borderRadius="lg"
                            boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                            border="1px solid"
                            borderColor="gray.200"
                            px={3}
                            py={2}
                            openDelay={500}
                            closeOnClick={false}
                          >
                            <Heading
                              fontSize="sm"
                              fontWeight="bold"
                              color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
                              flex="1"
                              minW="0"
                              noOfLines={1}
                              cursor="help"
                              _hover={{ color: "blue.500" }}
                              transition="color 0.2s"
                            >
                              {app.name}
                            </Heading>
                          </Tooltip>
                          </HStack>
                          <Tooltip
                            label={
                              app.description ||
                              `The ${app.name} application provides comprehensive management and monitoring capabilities for your business needs.`
                            }
                            placement="right"
                            hasArrow
                            bg="white"
                            color="gray.800"
                            fontSize="sm"
                            maxW="280px"
                            whiteSpace="pre-wrap"
                            openDelay={300}
                            closeOnClick={false}
                            borderRadius="lg"
                            boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                            border="1px solid"
                            borderColor="gray.200"
                            px={3}
                            py={2}
                          >
                            <Box
                              display="flex"
                              alignItems="center"
                              justifyContent="center"
                              w="20px"
                              h="20px"
                              cursor="help"
                              flexShrink={0}
                            >
                              <Icon
                                as={FiHelpCircle}
                                boxSize={4}
                                color={useColorModeValue(
                                  "gray.400",
                                  "gray.500",
                                )}
                                _hover={{
                                  color: "blue.500",
                                  transform: "scale(1.1)",
                                }}
                                transition="all 0.2s"
                              />
                            </Box>
                          </Tooltip>
                        </HStack>
                      </Box>
                    </Box>
                  )
                })}
              </SimpleGrid>
            )}
          </Box>

          <Divider />

          {/* Fake Examples Section */}
          <Box>
            <Heading
              fontSize="14px"
              fontWeight="bold"
              color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
              mb={6}
            >
              Fake Examples
            </Heading>
            <SimpleGrid columns={{ base: 1, md: 2, lg: 3, xl: 4 }} spacing={6}>
              {agentCategories.map((category) => (
                <Box
                  key={category.id}
                  bg={cardBg}
                  borderRadius="xl"
                  p={2}
                  cursor="pointer"
                  border="1px solid"
                  borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                  _hover={{
                    transform: "translateY(-2px)",
                    boxShadow: "0 8px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)",
                    borderColor: "blue.300",
                  }}
                  transition="all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)"
                  position="relative"
                  overflow="hidden"
                >
                  {/* Gradient Background */}
                  <Box
                    position="absolute"
                    top={0}
                    left={0}
                    right={0}
                    height="60px"
                    bgGradient={category.gradient}
                    opacity={0.1}
                  />

                  {/* Content - Icon and Text in same row */}
                  <Box position="relative" zIndex={1}>
                    <HStack spacing={2} align="center" justify="space-between">
                      {/* Icon and Text in same row */}
                      <HStack spacing={2} align="center" flex="1" minW={0}>
                        <Icon
                          as={category.icon}
                          boxSize={5}
                          color={`${category.color}.500`}
                          flexShrink={0}
                        />
                        <Tooltip
                        label={category.name}
                        placement="bottom"
                        hasArrow
                        bg="white"
                        color="gray.800"
                        fontSize="sm"
                        borderRadius="lg"
                        boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                        border="1px solid"
                        borderColor="gray.200"
                        px={3}
                        py={2}
                        openDelay={500}
                        closeOnClick={false}
                      >
                        <Heading
                          fontSize="sm"
                          fontWeight="bold"
                          color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
                          flex="1"
                          minW="0"
                          noOfLines={1}
                          cursor="help"
                          _hover={{ color: "blue.500" }}
                          transition="color 0.2s"
                        >
                          {category.name}
                        </Heading>
                        </Tooltip>
                      </HStack>
                      <Tooltip
                        label={category.description}
                        placement="right"
                        hasArrow
                        bg="white"
                        color="gray.800"
                        fontSize="sm"
                        maxW="280px"
                        whiteSpace="pre-wrap"
                        openDelay={300}
                        closeOnClick={false}
                        borderRadius="lg"
                        boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                        border="1px solid"
                        borderColor="gray.200"
                        px={3}
                        py={2}
                      >
                        <Box
                          display="flex"
                          alignItems="center"
                          justifyContent="center"
                          w="20px"
                          h="20px"
                          cursor="help"
                          flexShrink={0}
                        >
                          <Icon
                            as={FiHelpCircle}
                            boxSize={4}
                            color={useColorModeValue("gray.400", "gray.500")}
                            _hover={{
                              color: "blue.500",
                              transform: "scale(1.1)",
                            }}
                            transition="all 0.2s"
                          />
                        </Box>
                      </Tooltip>
                    </HStack>
                  </Box>
                </Box>
              ))}
            </SimpleGrid>
          </Box>
        </VStack>
      </Container>
    </Box>
  )
}

```

已按方案一完成优化。修改如下：

## 修改总结

### ✅ 已完成的优化：

1. **移除 ModalHeader 文字**：
   - 在 `AIGridSidebar.tsx` 中，将 `<ModalHeader>Application Marketplace</ModalHeader>` 改为 `<ModalHeader />`
   - 移除了 Modal 顶部的重复文字

2. **标题和描述移到顶部**：
   - 将 ApplicationMarketplace 组件内的标题和描述移到最顶部
   - 添加了独立的顶部 Box，使用 `pt={4} px={6} pb={4}` 和底部边框
   - Container 的 `py` 从 `8` 改为 `4`

3. **卡片 padding 调整**：
   - Featured 卡片：从 `p={6}`（24px）改为 `p={2}`（8px）
   - Fake Examples 卡片：从 `p={6}`（24px）改为 `p={2}`（8px）
   - 卡片更紧凑

4. **图标和文字同一行**：
   - Featured 卡片：将图标从独立的 `<Box mb={4}>` 改为放入 `<HStack>`，与文字并排
   - Fake Examples 卡片：同样将图标和文字放在同一行
   - 图标大小：从 `boxSize={8}` 改为 `boxSize={5}`，更紧凑
   - 使用 `HStack spacing={2}` 让图标和文字在同一行

5. **减少容器间距**：
   - Container `py`：从 `8` 改为 `4`
   - VStack `spacing`：从 `8` 改为 `4`
   - 整体布局更紧凑

6. **其他优化**：
   - Gradient Background 高度：从 `120px` 改为 `60px`，适配更紧凑的卡片
   - Pin 按钮位置：从 `top={3} right={3}` 改为 `top={1} right={1}`，尺寸从 `size="sm"` 改为 `size="xs"`

### 优化效果：

- 标题和描述移到顶部，去除了 ModalHeader 的重复文字
- 卡片更紧凑：padding 从 24px 减少到 8px
- 图标和文字同一行，布局更紧凑
- 整体间距减少，符合工业风格
- 卡片高度减少，信息密度更高

Application Marketplace 弹窗已优化为紧凑工业风格，卡片更小，布局更紧凑。

---

**User**

我还有个问题，如图片所示，点击menue.aigrid页面的搜索框，选中application marketplace后，弹出的悬浮框里的卡片太宽了，如框中的小框所示，需要卡片紧凑点，根据文字长度自适应的卡片宽度，在修改前，请征求我的意见

---

**Cursor**

查看当前卡片布局设置，检查是否有固定宽度限制：


查看完整的卡片布局结构：


基于代码分析，问题在于使用了 `SimpleGrid` 的固定列数，导致卡片宽度固定。优化方案如下：

## 优化方案

### 当前状态分析：
- **Featured 部分**：使用 `SimpleGrid columns={{ base: 1, md: 2, lg: 3, xl: 4 }}`
- **Fake Examples 部分**：使用 `SimpleGrid columns={{ base: 1, md: 2, lg: 3, xl: 4 }}`
- **问题**：固定列数导致卡片宽度固定，内容短时会有多余空白

### 优化方案：

**方案一（推荐）：自适应宽度 + 紧凑布局**
1. **将 SimpleGrid 改为 Flex + wrap**：
   - 使用 `<Flex wrap="wrap" gap={3}>` 替代 `SimpleGrid`
   - 卡片根据内容自适应宽度
2. **卡片宽度设置**：
   - 使用 `w="fit-content"` 或 `minW="fit-content"`
   - 设置 `maxW="300px"` 或 `maxW="250px"` 防止过长
   - 移除固定宽度限制
3. **间距调整**：
   - 从 `spacing={6}` 改为 `gap={3}` 或 `gap={2}`
   - 更紧凑的布局

**方案二：CSS Grid auto-fit**
- 使用 CSS Grid 的 `grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr))`
- 在 Chakra UI 中需要用自定义样式

**方案三：保持 SimpleGrid，但增加列数**
- 增加列数（如 `xl: 6`），让每列更窄
- 但仍是固定宽度，不够灵活

## 推荐

建议采用方案一：
- 卡片根据文字长度自适应宽度
- 使用 Flex + wrap，灵活且易维护
- 设置最大宽度，避免过长
- 减少间距，更紧凑

**具体修改**：
- Featured 部分：`SimpleGrid` → `Flex wrap="wrap" gap={3}`
- Fake Examples 部分：`SimpleGrid` → `Flex wrap="wrap" gap={3}`
- 卡片宽度：添加 `w="fit-content"` 和 `maxW="280px"`
- 间距：从 `spacing={6}`（24px）改为 `gap={3}`（12px）

请确认是否采用方案一，或需要调整。

---

**User**

采用方案一，请开始

---

**Cursor**

按方案一实现：将 SimpleGrid 改为 Flex + wrap，使卡片宽度自适应。


```typescriptreact
import { AppNodeService } from "@/services/appNodeService"
import type { AppNode } from "@/types/appNode"
import {
  Badge,
  Box,
  Button,
  Container,
  Divider,
  Flex,
  HStack,
  Heading,
  Icon,
  IconButton,
  Input,
  InputGroup,
  InputLeftElement,
  SimpleGrid,
  Spinner,
  Text,
  Tooltip,
  VStack,
  useColorModeValue,
  useToast,
} from "@chakra-ui/react"
import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"
import {
  FiBarChart,
  FiBookOpen,
  FiBriefcase,
  FiEdit3,
  FiFileText,
  FiGrid,
  FiHelpCircle,
  FiPlus,
  FiSearch,
  FiSettings,
  FiX,
  FiZap,
} from "react-icons/fi"

interface ApplicationMarketplaceProps {
  onAppPin: (app: AppNode) => void
  pinnedApps: AppNode[]
  onBack?: () => void
  onAppSelect?: (app: AppNode) => void
  isOpen?: boolean // 用于触发重新加载应用列表
}

// Agent category interface
interface AgentCategory {
  id: string
  name: string
  description: string
  icon: any
  color: string
  gradient: string
}

// Mock agent categories for demonstration
const agentCategories: AgentCategory[] = [
  {
    id: "productivity",
    name: "Productivity Coach",
    description:
      "Enhance your productivity with AI-powered coaching and task management.",
    icon: FiEdit3,
    color: "purple",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, purple.100, purple.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "writing",
    name: "Writing Coach",
    description: "Take your writing to the next level with Writing Coach.",
    icon: FiFileText,
    color: "blue",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, blue.100, blue.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "idea",
    name: "Idea Coach",
    description: "Plan and navigate the brainstorming process.",
    icon: FiZap,
    color: "orange",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, orange.100, orange.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "career",
    name: "Career Coach",
    description: "Elevate your career with Career Coach.",
    icon: FiBriefcase,
    color: "teal",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, teal.100, teal.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "learning",
    name: "Learning Coach",
    description: "Unlock your potential with Learning Coach.",
    icon: FiBookOpen,
    color: "orange",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, orange.100, orange.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "analytics",
    name: "Analytics Agent",
    description: "Advanced data analysis and reporting capabilities.",
    icon: FiBarChart,
    color: "purple",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, purple.100, purple.200)",
  },
  {
    id: "admin",
    name: "System Admin",
    description: "Use AI to help you manage system administration tasks.",
    icon: FiSettings,
    color: "gray",
    gradient: "linear(to-br, gray.100, gray.200)",
  },
]

export default function ApplicationMarketplace({
  onAppPin,
  pinnedApps,
  onBack,
  onAppSelect,
  isOpen = true, // 默认true，兼容未传入的情况
}: ApplicationMarketplaceProps) {
  const toast = useToast()

  const [allApps, setAllApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [filteredApps, setFilteredApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState("")
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
  const [selectedCategory] = useState<string>("all")

  // 颜色模式
  const bgColor = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")
  const cardBg = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")

  // 加载所有应用函数
  const loadAllApps = React.useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      setIsLoading(true)
      // 在Standard模式下，只获取用户有权限访问的应用
      // 在Custom模式下，获取所有已发布的应用
      const apps = await AppNodeService.getUserApps()
      console.log("🔄 ApplicationMarketplace - Loaded apps:", {
        totalApps: apps.length,
        apps: apps.map(app => ({ id: app.id, name: app.name })),
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
      })
      setAllApps(apps)
      setFilteredApps(apps)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load all apps:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Loading Failed",
        description: "Unable to load application list",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      // 即使失败也要清空状态，避免显示旧数据
      setAllApps([])
      setFilteredApps([])
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false)
    }
  }, [toast])

  // 加载所有应用 - 在组件挂载时和Modal打开时重新加载
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      loadAllApps()
    }
  }, [isOpen, loadAllApps]) // 依赖isOpen，每次打开Modal时重新加载

  // 搜索和分类过滤
  useEffect(() => {
    let filtered = allApps

    // 按搜索词过滤
    if (searchTerm.trim() !== "") {
      filtered = filtered.filter(
        (app) =>
          app.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
          app.description?.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()),
      )
    }

    // 按分类过滤
    if (selectedCategory !== "all") {
      filtered = filtered.filter((app) => {
        // 这里可以根据实际需求添加分类逻辑
        // 暂时按应用名称包含关键词来分类
        const categoryKeywords: { [key: string]: string[] } = {
          productivity: ["productivity", "task", "management"],
          writing: ["writing", "document", "text"],
          idea: ["idea", "brainstorm", "creative"],
          career: ["career", "job", "professional"],
          learning: ["learning", "education", "study"],
          analytics: ["analytics", "report", "data"],
          admin: ["admin", "system", "management"],
        }

        const keywords = categoryKeywords[selectedCategory] || []
        return keywords.some(
          (keyword) =>
            app.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword) ||
            app.description?.toLowerCase().includes(keyword),
        )
      })
    }

    setFilteredApps(filtered)
  }, [searchTerm, selectedCategory, allApps])

  const handleAppPin = (app: AppNode) => {
    // 检查是否已经PIN了
    const isAlreadyPinned = pinnedApps.some((pinned) => pinned.id === app.id)
    if (isAlreadyPinned) {
      toast({
        title: "Application Already Pinned",
        description: `${app.name} is already in the left menu`,
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      return
    }

    onAppPin(app)
    toast({
      title: "Application Pinned",
      description: `${app.name} has been added to the left menu`,
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
      isClosable: true,
    })
  }

  const isAppPinned = (app: AppNode) => {
    return pinnedApps.some((pinned) => pinned.id === app.id)
  }

  const handleAppSelect = (app: AppNode) => {
    // 点击卡片时，如果未pin则pin，已pin则只触发选择回调
    if (!isAppPinned(app)) {
      // 未pin的应用，点击卡片时pin
      handleAppPin(app)
    }
    // 调用onAppSelect回调（如果有）
    if (onAppSelect) {
      onAppSelect(app)
    }
  }

  return (
    <Box bg={bgColor} minH="100vh">
      {/* Header Section - Moved to top */}
      <Box pt={4} px={6} pb={4} borderBottom="1px solid" borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}>
        {/* 顶部行只展示标题，隐藏返回按钮，Modal有X关闭键 */}
        <Flex justify="space-between" align="flex-start" mb={2}>
          <Heading fontSize="20px" fontWeight="bold" color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}>Application Marketplace</Heading>
        </Flex>

        {/* Description text */}
        <Text
          fontSize="sm"
          color={useColorModeValue("gray.600", "gray.300")}
          maxW="2xl"
          mb={4}
        >
          Find applications with the expertise to help you complete complex
          tasks.
        </Text>

        {/* Search Bar - Microsoft Style */}
        <Box maxW="2xl" mb={4}>
              <InputGroup size="lg">
                <InputLeftElement pointerEvents="none" pl={4}>
                  <FiSearch color="gray.400" size={20} />
                </InputLeftElement>
                <Input
                  placeholder="Search Applications"
                  value={searchTerm}
                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
                  bg={useColorModeValue("white", "gray.700")}
                  border="2px solid"
                  borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                  borderRadius="lg"
                  pl={12}
                  pr={4}
                  py={6}
                  fontSize="md"
                  _focus={{
                    borderColor: "blue.500",
                    boxShadow: "0 0 0 1px #3182ce",
                  }}
                  _hover={{
                    borderColor: useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.500"),
                  }}
                />
              </InputGroup>
            </Box>
      </Box>

      <Container maxW="7xl" py={4}>
        <VStack spacing={4} align="stretch">

          {/* Featured Section */}
          <Box>
            <Heading
              fontSize="14px"
              fontWeight="bold"
              color={useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white")}
              mb={6}
            >
              Featured
            </Heading>

            {/* Search and Filter Controls */}
            <Flex
              justify="space-between"
              align="center"
              mb={6}
              wrap="wrap"
              gap={4}
            >
              <HStack spacing={4}>
                <Badge
                  colorScheme="blue"
                  variant="subtle"
                  px={4}
                  py={2}
                  borderRadius="full"
                  fontSize="sm"
                  fontWeight="600"
                >
                  TOTAL {filteredApps.length} APPS
                </Badge>
                <Badge
                  colorScheme="green"
                  variant="subtle"
                  px={4}
                  py={2}
                  borderRadius="full"
                  fontSize="sm"
                  fontWeight="600"
                >
                  PINNED {pinnedApps.length}
                </Badge>
              </HStack>
            </Flex>

            {/* Applications Grid */}
            {isLoading ? (
              <Flex justify="center" align="center" py={20}>
                <Spinner size="xl" color="blue.500" />
              </Flex>
            ) : filteredApps.length === 0 ? (
              <Box textAlign="center" py={20}>
                <Icon as={FiGrid} boxSize={16} color="gray.300" mb={4} />
                <Text fontSize="lg" color="gray.500" mb={2}>
                  {searchTerm
                    ? "No matching applications found"
                    : "No applications available"}
                </Text>
                <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.400">
                  Try adjusting your search terms or check back later for new
                  applications.
                </Text>
              </Box>
            ) : (
              <Flex wrap="wrap" gap={3}>
                {filteredApps.map((app) => {
                  const isPinned = isAppPinned(app)
                  return (
                    <Box
                      key={app.id}
                      bg={cardBg}
                      borderRadius="xl"
                      p={2}
                      cursor="pointer"
                      border="1px solid"
                      borderColor={useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600")}
                      w="fit-content"
                      minW="fit-content"
                      maxW="280px"
                      _hover={{
                        transform: "translateY(-2px)",
                        boxShadow: "0 8px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)",
                        borderColor: "blue.300",
                      }}
                      transition="all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)"
```
